Glencore — operates Mutanda and Katanga Mining (KCC) copper-cobalt mines, among the world's largest. CMOC (China Molybdenum Co.) — operates Tenke Fungurume, one of the world's largest copper-cobalt mines. Entreprise Générale du Cobalt (EGC) — state-backed enterprise intended to monopolize artisanal cobalt purchasing (established 2019). RMI (Responsible Minerals Initiative) — industry-led supply chain due diligence program used by electronics and automotive manufacturers.

Ministry of Mines — oversees khai thác mỏ policy, licensing, and the 2018 Mining Code (Code Minier), which increased royalty rates and introduced strategic substance classification for cobalt. CTCPM (Cellule Technique de Coordination et de Planification Minière) — the technical coordination unit for khai thác mỏ sector planning. ITSCI (ITRI Tin Supply Chain Initiative) — a traceability program for tin, tantalum, and tungsten (3T) minerals from the DRC.

Parlement de la République démocratique du Congo — bicameral legislature consisting of the Assemblée nationale (500 members) and the Sénat (108 members). The DRC is a semi-presidential republic but governance capacity is limited outside major urban centers. EU Battery Regulation (2023/1542) — effective 2027, requires carbon footprint declarations, recycled content minimums, and supply chain due diligence for batteries containing cobalt. OECD Due Diligence Guidance for Responsible Supply Chains of Minerals from Conflict-Affected and High-Risk Areas — the international standard for mineral supply chain responsibility.

CG.s: Oil-dependent nền kinh tế ($15.7B GDP) with 34.74% combined oil and gas rents — one of Sub-Saharan Africa's highest. TotalEnergies and Eni are major operators. Governance challenges with long-ruling president (Sassou Nguesso since 1997). Significant tropical forest cover.

sectors.w: Congo-Brazzaville's oil production is in long-term decline from mature offshore fields. As extraction costs rise and reserves deplete, the lợi ích chồng chéo between international operators and government revenue suy yếu — diversification becomes necessary.
bp: Redirect oil revenues to economic diversification (forestry, agriculture, services) through transparent budget allocation. Khi non-oil sectors generate more employment and revenue, lợi ích chồng chéo trong continued extraction from depleting fields breaks.
Thực hiện EITI-standard per-block revenue and phát thải disclosure. Congo joined EITI in 2004 — extending to môi trường data makes W computable per production unit.
Không thể phá vỡ by policy alone. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂ by conservation of mass.
a: Report môi trường violations at oil facilities to the Ministry of Environment
Document revenue discrepancies — report to EITI Congo multi-stakeholder group
Report concerns to international operator compliance channels (TotalEnergies, Eni)
TotalEnergies, Eni: Thực hiện Paris-aligned transition plans for Congo operations
SNPC: Phát triển economic diversification strategy using petroleum revenues
Áp dụng per-block phát thải reporting standards
Ministry of Hydrocarbons: Tăng cường môi trường conditions in production sharing contracts
EITI Congo: Expand reporting to include môi trường impact data
Central Bank (BEAC): Integrate resource revenue volatility risk into macroprudential supervision
Vận động qua CEMAC for regional môi trường standards in oil and gas extraction
Support EITI enhanced reporting with môi trường metrics
Thúc đẩy Central African Forest Initiative (CAFI) enforcement on forest protection as alternative revenue source
Leverage UNFCCC mechanisms for fossil fuel transition support
i: Ministère de l'Environnement, du Développement Durable et du Bassin du Congo — the environment ministry. SNPC (Société Nationale des Pétroles du Congo) — the national oil company. EITI Congo — the Republic of Congo has been an EITI member since 2004. Note: Whistleblower protections are minimal under current governance.

TotalEnergies — the largest oil operator in Congo-Brazzaville, operating the Moho Nord deepwater project and other fields. Eni — operates significant offshore concessions. SNPC (Société Nationale des Pétroles du Congo) — the national oil company holding state equity in all production sharing contracts.

Ministère des Hydrocarbures — oversees oil and gas policy and licensing. BEAC (Banque des États de l'Afrique Centrale) — the central bank of the CEMAC monetary zone (shared with Cameroon, CAR, Chad, Equatorial Guinea, Gabon). EITI Congo — publishes annual reports on extractive industry revenues.

Note: Congo-Brazzaville under President Sassou Nguesso is rated 'Not Free' by Freedom House. The Assemblée nationale (151 members) and Sénat (72 members) do not function as independent democratic institutions. International engagement channels: CEMAC (Communauté Économique et Monétaire de l'Afrique Centrale), African Union, CAFI (Central African Forest Initiative) — a partnership between Central African countries and donors to protect tropical forests.

CI.s: Largest nền kinh tế in francophone West Africa ($87.1B GDP). World's largest cocoa producer (~45% of global supply). Agriculture is 15.9% of GDP with cocoa, coffee, and palm oil as main cash crops. Growing oil production (oil=0.7%). Rapid economic growth (~7% annual average).

sectors.w: Côte d'Ivoire's cocoa monoculture has driven 80%+ of original forest loss. EU Deforestation Regulation (EUDR) will require phá rừng-free supply chains — when per-farm phá rừng data is linked to cocoa transactions, W trở nên có thể tính được.
bp: EU Deforestation Regulation compliance forces traceability to farm level. Khi cocoa buyers must verify zero-phá rừng, the lợi ích chồng chéo between traders and smallholders in clearing forest for new plantations breaks — agroforestry becomes the viable model.

Mandatory per-farm môi trường data (tree cover, soil carbon, water use) linked to cocoa lot traceability. The Cocoa and Forests Initiative already creates a framework — extending to mandatory data makes W computable from cocoa prices.

Có thể phá vỡ một phần. Cocoa monoculture inherently reduces biodiversity compared to native forest. However, cocoa agroforestry systems can maintain significant tree cover and biodiversity — Côte d'Ivoire's National REDD+ Strategy includes agroforestry targets.
a: Report illegal phá rừng for cocoa expansion to SODEFOR (Société de Développement des Forêts) or OIPR (Office Ivoirien des Parcs et Réserves)
Document child labor in cocoa production — report to CNS (Comité National de Surveillance des actions de lutte contre le travail des enfants)
Report pesticide misuse — notify ANADER (Agence Nationale d'Appui au Développement Rural)
Cocoa traders (Cargill, Barry Callebaut, Olam): Thực hiện full farm-level traceability ahead of EUDR deadline
Đầu tư vào cocoa agroforestry systems that maintain tree cover while improving yields
Áp dụng living income reference price commitments for cocoa farmers
CCC (Conseil du Café-Cacao): Thực thi traceability requirements and link farmgate prices to môi trường compliance
MINEDD (Ministry of Environment): Tăng cường enforcement against phá rừng in classified forests
ANADER: Scale agroforestry extension programs to all cocoa-growing regions
Liên hệ đại biểu của bạn Député in the Assemblée nationale để yêu cầu enforcement of the Forest Code and protection of classified forests
Support EU Deforestation Regulation implementation with adequate transition support for smallholder farmers
Vận động qua the Cocoa and Forests Initiative for binding phá rừng targets
Thúc đẩy living income benchmarks in international cocoa pricing through ICCO
i: SODEFOR (Société de Développement des Forêts) — the state forestry company responsible for managing classified forests, many of which have been illegally cleared for cocoa. OIPR (Office Ivoirien des Parcs et Réserves) — manages national parks and protected areas. CNS (Comité National de Surveillance) — the national committee monitoring child labor in cocoa, coordinated with the International Cocoa Initiative (ICI). ANADER — the national rural development support agency providing agricultural extension services.

Major cocoa traders operating in Côte d'Ivoire: Cargill, Barry Callebaut, Olam International, Sucden. These companies intermediate the majority of Ivorian cocoa exports. Cocoa and Forests Initiative (CFI) — a public-private partnership between cocoa-producing countries (Côte d'Ivoire, Ghana) and leading chocolate companies to end phá rừng in cocoa supply chains. The Conseil du Café-Cacao (CCC) — the Ivorian cocoa board that sets farmgate prices and regulates the sector.

CCC (Conseil du Café-Cacao) — the government body regulating Côte d'Ivoire's cocoa and coffee sectors, setting minimum farmgate prices, managing quality standards, and overseeing exports. MINEDD (Ministère de l'Environnement et du Développement Durable) — the environment ministry responsible for forest protection, climate policy, and môi trường regulation.

Assemblée nationale de Côte d'Ivoire — unicameral parliament with 255 members. Citizens can contact deputies through the official Assembly website. Sénat — the upper house (99 members, established 2020). ICCO (International Cocoa Organization) — the intergovernmental body coordinating global cocoa policy, headquartered in Abidjan. EU Deforestation Regulation (EUDR, 2023/1115) — requires EU importers to verify that commodities including cocoa are not linked to phá rừng after December 2020.

CL.s: Upper-middle-income nền kinh tế ($330.3B GDP) with massive khai thác mỏ sector (16.23% of GDP). World's largest copper producer (~27% of global supply) and second-largest lithium producer. Strong institutions and democratic governance. Renewable energy leader in Latin America (solar in Atacama).

sectors.w: Chile's copper and lithium khai thác mỏ depletes water resources in the Atacama Desert (one of Earth's driest regions). Khi theo từng mỏ water consumption data is published alongside production revenue, W trở nên có thể tính được from khai thác mỏ output data.
bp: Thực hiện water pricing that reflects true scarcity in khai thác mỏ regions. Khi miners pay the real cost of water extraction in hyper-arid zones, lợi ích chồng chéo trong water-intensive extraction methods suy yếu — desalination and dry processing become economically preferred.

Mandatory theo từng mỏ water balance, tailings chemistry, and phát thải disclosure. Chile's SMA (Superintendencia del Medio Ambiente) already collects môi trường data — making it publicly accessible per mine makes W computable.
Có thể phá vỡ một phần. Mining inherently disturbs landscapes. However, dry processing, desalination, and tailings reprocessing can significantly reduce water dependence and waste generation.
a: Report môi trường violations to SMA (Superintendencia del Medio Ambiente)
Document water rights violations — report to DGA (Dirección General de Aguas)
Use Chile's người tố giác law (Ley 21.015) and môi trường complaint channels (denuncia ambiental) for protected reporting
CODELCO (state copper company): Transition to desalinated water for all operations
Áp dụng Science Based Targets for phát thải reduction across khai thác mỏ operations
Thực hiện ICMM Mining Principles including tailings management standards
SMA: Increase môi trường monitoring frequency and enforce water extraction limits at khai thác mỏ operations
Sernageomin: Tăng cường tailings dam safety standards (Chile has 740+ tailings facilities)
Ministry of Mining: Thực hiện the National Lithium Strategy with binding môi trường standards
Liên hệ đại biểu của bạn Diputado or Senador in the Congreso Nacional để yêu cầu mandatory water-neutral khai thác mỏ operations through desalination requirements
Support the Escazú Agreement on môi trường access rights in Latin America (Chile has not ratified)
Advocate for OECD Due Diligence Guidance enforcement for khai thác mỏ supply chains
Thúc đẩy international coordination on critical mineral sustainability standards through the Minerals Security Partnership
i: SMA (Superintendencia del Medio Ambiente) — Chile's môi trường enforcement agency, responsible for monitoring compliance with môi trường permits (RCA — Resolución de Calificación Ambiental). SMA can impose fines up to $8.2M and order facility closure. DGA (Dirección General de Aguas) — the national water authority managing water rights and monitoring extraction. SEA (Servicio de Evaluación Ambiental) — conducts môi trường impact assessments for khai thác mỏ projects.

CODELCO (Corporación Nacional del Cobre) — Chile's nhà nước copper company and the world's largest copper producer. CODELCO operates Chuquicamata, El Teniente, and other major mines. SQM (Sociedad Química y Minera de Chile) — one of the world's largest lithium producers, operating in the Salar de Atacama. Albemarle — US company operating lithium extraction in the Salar de Atacama alongside SQM. BHP, Anglo American — major international copper khai thác mỏ companies operating in Chile.

Sernageomin (Servicio Nacional de Geología y Minería) — the national geological and khai thác mỏ service, responsible for mine safety, tailings dam oversight, and geological surveys. Chile has over 740 tailings facilities, the largest inventory in the world. Ministry of Mining — oversees khai thác mỏ policy including the 2023 National Lithium Strategy, which established state-led lithium development through public-private partnerships.

Congreso Nacional de Chile — bicameral legislature consisting of the Cámara de Diputadas y Diputados (155 members) and the Senado (50 members). Citizens can contact representatives through camara.cl and senado.cl. Chile is an OECD member with strong democratic institutions. Escazú Agreement — the Regional Agreement on Access to Information, Public Participation and Justice in Environmental Matters in Latin America and the Caribbean. Chile signed but has not ratified.

CM.s: Central African nền kinh tế ($53.3B GDP) with oil production (2.94% combined rents) and significant agriculture (18.5% GDP — cocoa, palm oil, timber). Forest cover declining due to logging and agricultural expansion. Governance challenges and Anglophone crisis.

sectors.w: Cameroon's oil production is declining from mature fields. As extraction costs rise, the lợi ích chồng chéo between operators (Perenco, Addax) and government revenue suy yếu — diversification to sustainable forestry and agriculture becomes economically rational.
bp: Redirect declining oil revenues to sustainable forest management and agricultural diversification. Cameroon's forests are a carbon sink worth more standing than cleared. Khi REDD+ payments exceed marginal oil revenue, lợi ích chồng chéo trong continued extraction breaks.
Thực hiện EITI-standard per-block môi trường disclosure. Cameroon's EITI membership provides the framework — extending to môi trường data makes W computable.
Không thể phá vỡ by policy alone. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂ by conservation of mass.
a: Report môi trường violations to MINEPDED (Ministry of Environment, Nature Protection and Sustainable Phát triểnment)
Document illegal logging or land seizures — report to international forestry monitoring organizations (Global Forest Watch)
Report through EITI Cameroon multi-stakeholder channels
Perenco, Addax/Sinopec: Thực hiện môi trường monitoring and phát thải reporting for all Cameroon operations
SNH: Phát triển post-oil diversification strategy
Áp dụng TCFD-aligned climate disclosure
MINMIDT (Ministry of Mines): Tăng cường môi trường conditions in production licenses
MINEPDED: Thực thi môi trường impact assessment requirements
EITI Cameroon: Expand reporting to môi trường data
Liên hệ đại biểu của bạn Député in the Assemblée nationale để yêu cầu transparent management of declining oil revenues
Support CAFI (Central African Forest Initiative) for forest conservation as alternative revenue
Vận động qua CEMAC for regional môi trường standards
Thúc đẩy EITI enhanced reporting
i: MINEPDED (Ministère de l'Environnement, de la Protection de la Nature et du Développement Durable) — Cameroon's environment ministry. SNH (Société Nationale des Hydrocarbures) — the national hydrocarbons company managing state interests in oil and gas. EITI Cameroon — member since 2007. Note: Whistleblower protections are limited.

Perenco — the largest oil producer in Cameroon. Addax Petroleum (Sinopec subsidiary) — operates offshore concessions. SNH manages the state's petroleum interests and holds equity in production sharing contracts.

MINMIDT (Ministère des Mines, de l'Industrie et du Développement Technologique) — oversees khai thác mỏ and industrial policy. CONAC (Commission Nationale Anti-Corruption) — Cameroon's anti-corruption commission.

Assemblée nationale du Cameroun — 180 members. Sénat — 100 members. Note: Cameroon's democratic institutions are constrained under long-ruling President Paul Biya (in power since 1982). International channels: CEMAC, African Union, CAFI.

CO.s: Major Latin American nền kinh tế ($418.8B GDP) with significant oil (3.42% rents) and coal (0.73% rents) production. Ecopetrol is the largest company. Biodiversity hotspot (most biodiverse country per square kilometer). 2016 peace agreement with FARC opened new governance challenges in former conflict zones.

sectors.w: Colombia's current administration (Petro, 2022-) has announced a policy of no new oil exploration licenses. If maintained, lợi ích chồng chéo trong fossil fuel expansion breaks as existing fields deplete. Colombia's renewable potential (hydro, solar, wind) provides viable alternatives.
bp: Maintain and implement the no-new-exploration-licenses policy while investing transition revenues in năng lượng tái tạo. Khi energy investment flows shift from fossil to renewable, lợi ích chồng chéo trong continued exploration breaks.

Mandatory theo từng mỏ phát thải disclosure for all Ecopetrol and international operator fields. Colombia's ANH (Agencia Nacional de Hidrocarburos) already collects production data — extending to phát thải makes W computable.
Không thể phá vỡ by policy alone. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂ by conservation of mass.
a: Report môi trường violations to ANLA (Autoridad Nacional de Licencias Ambientales)
Document community health impacts near oil operations — report to Defensoría del Pueblo
Report through Ecopetrol's ethics line or international operator compliance channels
Ecopetrol: Accelerate energy transition strategy with binding renewable targets
Thực hiện TCFD-aligned reporting across all operations
Đầu tư vào năng lượng tái tạo in post-conflict zones to provide economic alternatives
MinAmbiente: Tăng cường môi trường licensing for extractive projects in biodiverse regions
CREG: Cải cách energy tariffs to accelerate năng lượng tái tạo deployment
ANH: Thực hiện theo từng mỏ phát thải monitoring
Liên hệ đại biểu của bạn Representante or Senador in the Congreso to support the energy transition framework legislation
Tăng cường Colombia's NDC with binding sectoral phát thải reduction targets
Leverage OECD membership to advance môi trường governance standards
Support the Leticia Pact for Amazon conservation as alternative economic model
i: ANLA (Autoridad Nacional de Licencias Ambientales) — Colombia's môi trường licensing authority, responsible for môi trường impact assessment and compliance monitoring for extractive projects. Defensoría del Pueblo — the national human rights ombudsman. Contraloría General de la República — the national audit office overseeing public resource management including oil revenues.

Ecopetrol — Colombia's largest company (88.5% nhà nước), responsible for most domestic oil production. Ecopetrol has announced energy transition targets but continues significant upstream investment. ANH (Agencia Nacional de Hidrocarburos) — manages exploration and production contracts.

MinAmbiente (Ministerio de Ambiente y Desarrollo Sostenible) — Colombia's environment ministry. CREG (Comisión de Regulación de Energía y Gas) — the cơ quan quản lý năng lượngy commission. CAR (Corporaciones Autónomas Regionales) — regional môi trường authorities.

Congreso de la República de Colombia — bicameral legislature: Cámara de Representantes (188 members) and Senado (108 members). Contact through camara.gov.co and senado.gov.co. Colombia is an OECD member (2020) with strong democratic institutions. The 2016 Peace Agreement (Acuerdo de Paz) created new governance frameworks for former conflict zones that intersect with extractive industry regulation.

CR.s: Upper-middle-income nền kinh tế ($95.4B GDP) with 98%+ renewable electricity generation. No military since 1948. Services-dominant (68.8% GDP). Leader in ecotourism and môi trường policy. Low direct fossil fuel extraction. Main PST exposure through agricultural monoculture (pineapple, banana, palm oil).

sectors.w: Costa Rica's pineapple and banana monoculture uses intensive pesticide application that contaminates waterways. Khi per-farm pesticide runoff and water contamination data is published alongside export revenue, W trở nên có thể tính được.
bp: Cải cách agricultural export incentives to reward biodiversity-positive farming. Khi export tax benefits require môi trường certification, the lợi ích chồng chéo between monoculture producers and exporters in chemical-intensive production suy yếu.

Mandatory per-farm water quality monitoring downstream of monoculture operations. Costa Rica's AyA (water utility) and SINAC already collect water data — linking to agricultural output makes W computable.
Có thể phá vỡ một phần. Tropical monoculture inherently reduces biodiversity. However, Costa Rica's Payment for Environmental Services (PSA) program demonstrates viable alternatives.
a: Report pesticide violations to SFE (Servicio Fitosanitario del Estado)
Document water contamination — report to MINAE (Ministry of Environment) or AyA
Use Costa Rica's labor protections and môi trường complaint mechanisms
Agricultural exporters (Del Monte, Dole, Chiquita): Áp dụng pesticide reduction targets
Đầu tư vào organic certification and agroforestry transitions
Thực hiện watershed-level môi trường monitoring
MAG (Ministry of Agriculture): Cải cách export incentives to require môi trường certification
MINAE: Tăng cường pesticide regulations and enforce water quality standards near monoculture areas
SETENA: Require cumulative môi trường impact assessments for monoculture expansion
Liên hệ đại biểu của bạn Diputado in the Asamblea Legislativa để yêu cầu pesticide reduction legislation for monoculture agriculture
Support the Escazú Agreement implementation (Costa Rica was an early advocate)
Leverage Costa Rica's môi trường reputation to advance international agricultural sustainability standards
Thúc đẩy green trade provisions in bilateral agreements
i: SFE (Servicio Fitosanitario del Estado) — the state phytosanitary service regulating pesticide use. MINAE (Ministerio de Ambiente y Energía) — the environment and energy ministry. AyA (Instituto Costarricense de Acueductos y Alcantarillados) — the national water utility. SETENA (Secretaría Técnica Nacional Ambiental) — conducts môi trường impact assessments.

Costa Rica hosts operations of major fruit multinationals: Del Monte, Dole, Chiquita. CORBANA (Corporación Bananera Nacional) — the national banana corporation coordinating the sector. CANAPEP (Cámara Nacional de Productores y Exportadores de Piña) — the pineapple producers' association.

MAG (Ministerio de Agricultura y Ganadería) — Costa Rica's agriculture ministry. The PSA (Pago por Servicios Ambientales) program — Costa Rica's pioneering payment for môi trường services program, which pays landowners to maintain forest cover, funded partly by a fuel tax.

Asamblea Legislativa de Costa Rica — unicameral parliament with 57 members. Citizens can contact representatives through asamblea.go.cr. Costa Rica is one of Latin America's strongest democracies and a global môi trường leader. The Escazú Agreement — Costa Rica was one of the first signatories of this regional agreement on môi trường access rights.

CU.s: Command nền kinh tế ($107.4B GDP, though estimates vary due to dual currency system). Services-dominant (73.5% GDP, driven by healthcare, education, tourism). Minimal resource extraction. Economic crisis exacerbated by US embargo and collapse of Venezuelan oil subsidies.

sectors.w: Cuba's sugar industry collapsed after Soviet subsidies ended, but remaining agriculture (state farms, cooperatives) relies on monoculture patterns. Cuba's organic farming necessity (post-Soviet fertilizer shortage) demonstrates alternative models. Making soil health data visible breaks system independence.
bp: Expand the urban agriculture and organoponics model that Cuba developed out of necessity. Khi organic production meets domestic food needs more reliably than import-dependent monoculture, lợi ích chồng chéo trong conventional agriculture breaks.
Publish soil health, water quality, and biodiversity data from Cuba's extensive agricultural research system. Cuba's scientific institutions (INIFAT, ICA) generate data that could make W computable.
Có thể phá vỡ một phần. Cuba's experience with organic farming post-1991 shows that sự phụ thuộc hệ thống on chemical inputs can be dramatically reduced through agroecological methods.
a: Document môi trường degradation through academic research channels
Report through workplace union structures (CTC — Central de Trabajadores de Cuba)
Engage with international agricultural research partnerships
State agricultural enterprises: Scale organoponics and agroecological methods
AZCUBA: Diversify sugar industry toward bioenergy and specialty products
International partners: Support technology transfer for sustainable agriculture
MINAG: Expand support for agroecological transition
CITMA: Tăng cường môi trường monitoring of agricultural practices
INIFAT: Publish research on agroecological transition outcomes
Support FAO technical cooperation programs for Cuban agricultural sustainability
Vận động qua CELAC for regional agricultural knowledge exchange
Thúc đẩy relaxation of US embargo restrictions on agricultural technology transfer
Support South-South cooperation on agroecological methods developed in Cuba
i: Note: Cuba is a nhà nước một đảng. Independent xã hội dân sự, media, and labor organizations are not permitted. Reporting channels operate within state structures. CTC (Central de Trabajadores de Cuba) — the state-controlled trade union federation. INIFAT (Instituto Nacional de Investigaciones Fundamentales en Agricultura Tropical) — the national agricultural research institute. CITMA (Ministerio de Ciencia, Tecnología y Medio Ambiente) — the science and environment ministry.

AZCUBA (Empresa Azucarera) — Cuba's state sugar enterprise. State agricultural enterprises and UBPCs (Unidades Básicas de Producción Cooperativa) — cooperatives managing most agricultural production. Cuba's urban agriculture program is one of the world's most successful, producing significant food in cities through organoponics.

MINAG (Ministerio de la Agricultura) — Cuba's agriculture ministry. CITMA — oversees môi trường policy and scientific research. The Asociación Nacional de Agricultores Pequeños (ANAP) — the national small farmers' association, which has been a key partner in agroecological transition.

Note: Cuba's Asamblea Nacional del Poder Popular (605 members) is the legislature but functions within a one-party system. International engagement channels: FAO (Cuba has received recognition for reducing hunger), CELAC (Community of Latin American and Caribbean States), NAM (Non-Aligned Movement). Cuba's agroecological experience is studied globally as a model for post-petrochemical agriculture.

CY.s: Small EU island nền kinh tế ($37.6B GDP) with dominant services sector (76.5% GDP, driven by financial services, shipping, and tourism). No significant resource extraction. Post-2013 banking crisis reforms strengthened financial regulation. Division between Republic of Cyprus and northern territory.

sectors.w: Cyprus's financial services sector has historically facilitated capital flows from Russia and other jurisdictions. EU AML directives and beneficial ownership minh bạch requirements make the welfare impact of opaque financial intermediation computable.
bp: Full implementation of EU Anti-Money Laundering Directives and beneficial ownership minh bạch. Khi financial secrecy is eliminated, the lợi ích chồng chéo between Cypriot service providers and clients seeking opacity suy yếu.

Mandatory publication of Country-by-Country Reporting (CbCR) data for entities registered in Cyprus. EU ATAD and DAC6 frameworks provide the mechanism — making tax planning structures visible breaks system independence.
Có thể phá vỡ một phần. Financial intermediation can relocate — but Cyprus's thành viên EUship, common law heritage, and timezone advantages create switching costs.
a: Report suspicious transactions to MOKAS (Unit for Combating Money Laundering)
Document beneficial ownership concealment — report to CySEC (Cyprus Securities and Exchange Commission)
Use EU Whistleblower Directive protections (transposed 2022)
Thực hiện enhanced due diligence for all high-risk client relationships
Áp dụng full beneficial ownership minh bạch ahead of EU AMLD6 requirements
Integrate ESG criteria into financial advisory services
CySEC: Tăng cường beneficial ownership verification requirements
CBC: Thực thi enhanced AML due diligence for correspondent banking relationships
ICPAC (Institute of Certified Public Accountants): Ensure audit firms enforce minh bạch standards
Liên hệ đại biểu của bạn Βουλευτής in the Βουλή των Αντιπροσώπων (House of Representatives) để yêu cầu full implementation of EU AML directives
Support EU AMLD6 negotiations for enhanced minh bạch requirements
Advocate for OECD BEPS Inclusive Framework strengthening
Thúc đẩy EU-wide beneficial ownership registry interconnection
i: MOKAS (Μονάδα Καταπολέμησης Αδικημάτων Συγκάλυψης / Unit for Combating Money Laundering) — Cyprus's financial intelligence unit. CySEC (Cyprus Securities and Exchange Commission) — the securities and financial markets regulator. CBC (Central Bank of Cyprus) — the prudential supervisor of banks. Cyprus transposed the EU Whistleblower Directive in 2022.

Cyprus hosts approximately 40 licensed banks and numerous investment firms. The Cyprus Investment Firms sector manages significant cross-border capital flows. CIFA (Cyprus Investment Funds Association) — the industry association representing investment fund managers.

CySEC — responsible for securities regulation and investment firm supervision. CBC (Central Bank of Cyprus) — conducts banking supervision and AML compliance monitoring. ICPAC — the professional body for accountants and auditors in Cyprus.

Βουλή των Αντιπροσώπων (House of Representatives) — unicameral parliament with 56 elected members (80 seats including 24 reserved for Turkish Cypriot community). Contact through parliament.cy. Cyprus is an thành viên EU with robust democratic institutions. Moneyval (Council of Europe's Committee of Experts on the Evaluation of Anti-Money Laundering Measures) evaluates Cyprus's AML framework.

CZ.s: Central European industrial nền kinh tế ($347B GDP) with strong manufacturing (19.9% GDP, automotive-dominated). Small coal sector (lignite in northern Bohemia). thành viên EU. Significant nuclear energy capacity (Dukovany, Temelín). Dịch vụ ở mức 60.2% GDP.

sectors.w: Czechia's lignite khai thác mỏ is concentrated in the Ústí nad Labem region (Sokolovská uhelná, Severní energetická). EU ETS carbon pricing makes Czech lignite uncompetitive — the lợi ích chồng chéo between mine operators and local employment breaks when carbon costs exceed revenue.
bp: Align with EU ETS carbon pricing and eliminate free allowances for Czech lignite power. Khi plants pay the full carbon price, lignite electricity becomes more expensive than alternatives and the lợi ích chồng chéo breaks.
Mandatory theo từng nhà máy phát thải and health-impact reporting. Czech lignite plants cause significant air pollution — publishing health costs per MWh makes W computable.
Không thể phá vỡ. Lignite combustion releases CO₂ and pollutants by physical process.
a: Report phát thải violations to ČIŽP (Czech Environmental Inspectorate)
Document health impacts in khai thác mỏ communities — report to regional public health authorities
Use the Czech người tố giác protection law (zákon o ochraně oznamovatelů, 2023)
ČEZ (majority nhà nước): Accelerate coal phase-out timeline and năng lượng tái tạo investment
Sev.en Energy: Phát triển mine closure and site remediation plans
Đầu tư vào nuclear energy expansion as baseload alternative
ERÚ: Cải cách electricity tariffs to reflect carbon costs
MŽP: Tăng cường air quality enforcement in khai thác mỏ regions
Czech Coal Commission: Thực hiện recommendations on coal phase-out by 2033
Liên hệ đại biểu của bạn Poslanec or Senátor in the Parlament để yêu cầu a binding coal phase-out timeline with just transition measures
Support EU Just Transition Fund allocation for Ústí nad Labem and Moravian-Silesian regions
Advocate for accelerated EU ETS reform
Thúc đẩy Territorial Just Transition Plans with concrete retraining programs
i: ČIŽP (Česká inspekce životního prostředí / Czech Environmental Inspectorate) — the enforcement agency for môi trường law, conducting inspections and imposing trừng phạt. MŽP (Ministerstvo životního prostředí / Ministry of the Environment) — oversees môi trường policy. Zákon o ochraně oznamovatelů (Act on Protection of Whistleblowers, 2023) — Czech transposition of EU Whistleblower Directive.

ČEZ Group — Czechia's largest energy company (70% nhà nước), operating coal, nuclear, and renewable power plants. Sev.en Energy — the largest private lignite khai thác mỏ and power company. Sokolovská uhelná — operates lignite mines in the Sokolov basin.

ERÚ (Energetický regulační úřad / Energy Regulatory Office) — the independent cơ quan quản lý năng lượng. Czech Coal Commission (Uhelná komise) — established to recommend a coal phase-out date. Recommended 2033, but implementation timelines remain debated.

Parlament České republiky — bicameral: Poslanecká sněmovna (200 members) and Senát (81 members). Contact through psp.cz and senat.cz. EU Just Transition Fund — Czechia is eligible for significant funding for coal-dependent regions.

DK.s: Advanced Nordic nền kinh tế ($424.5B GDP) with global leadership in wind energy (Vestas, Ørsted). Intensive livestock agriculture (28M pigs for 5.8M people) creates significant nitrogen pollution. Dịch vụ ở mức 63.5% GDP. World's most ambitious climate law (70% reduction by 2030).

sectors.w: Denmark's intensive pig farming generates nitrogen pollution visible in marine dead zones (inner Danish waters, Baltic Sea). EU Nitrates Directive compliance data makes W computable from farm-level nitrogen balance sheets.
bp: Cải cách agricultural subsidies to penalize nitrogen surplus per hectare. Khi the lợi ích chồng chéo between livestock producers and feed importers is broken by internalizing the nitrogen externality, intensive livestock becomes unprofitable without subsidy.

Mandatory farm-level nitrogen and phosphorus balance disclosure. Denmark already has one of Europe's most detailed agricultural data systems — extending to mandatory public disclosure makes W computable.

Có thể phá vỡ một phần. Intensive livestock inherently concentrates nutrients beyond ecosystem absorption. However, Denmark's leadership in biogas from manure demonstrates sự phụ thuộc hệ thống can be reduced through circular nutrient management.
a: Report nitrogen limit violations to Miljøstyrelsen (Danish Environmental Protection Agency)
Document animal welfare violations — report to Fødevarestyrelsen
Use Danish người tố giác law (Lov om beskyttelse af người tố giáce, 2021)
Danish Crown, Arla: Đầu tư vào plant-based protein alternatives
Thực hiện nitrogen-neutral farming targets across supply chains
Áp dụng Scope 3 agricultural phát thải reporting
Miljøministeriet: Tighten nitrogen quotas for marine ecosystem recovery
Landbrugsstyrelsen: Cải cách CAP eco-scheme payments to reward nitrogen-negative farming
Thực hiện the 2021 agreement on green transition of Danish agriculture (55-65% phát thải reduction by 2030)
Liên hệ đại biểu của bạn member of the Folketing để yêu cầu enforcement of agricultural nitrogen reduction targets
Support EU-wide mandatory nitrogen balance disclosure
Advocate for carbon border adjustment on imported animal feed from phá rừng regions
Thúc đẩy Baltic Sea Action Plan implementation through HELCOM
i: Miljøstyrelsen — responsible for môi trường regulation including agricultural phát thải and water quality. Fødevarestyrelsen (Danish Veterinary and Food Administration) — oversees food safety and animal welfare. Danish Whistleblower Act (2021) — transposition of EU Directive 2019/1937.
Danish Crown — one of Europe's largest meat processors (farmer cooperative). Arla Foods — multinational dairy cooperative headquartered in Denmark. DLG Group — major agricultural input cooperative.

Miljøministeriet (Ministry of Environment) — môi trường policy including agricultural regulation. Landbrugsstyrelsen (Danish Agricultural Agency) — administers CAP payments. The 2021 green agriculture agreement is one of Europe's most ambitious.

Folketinget — unicameral parliament (179 members). Contact through ft.dk. Klimaloven (Climate Act, 2020) — legally binding 70% phát thải reduction target by 2030. HELCOM (Helsinki Commission) — the governing body of the Convention on the Protection of the Marine Environment of the Baltic Sea Area.

DO.s: Caribbean's largest nền kinh tế ($124.3B GDP) with tourism, manufacturing (free trade zones), and khai thác mỏ (2.04% GDP — Pueblo Viejo gold mine, one of the world's largest). Dịch vụ ở mức 59.8% GDP. Climate vulnerable — hurricanes and sea level rise.

sectors.w: Pueblo Viejo gold mine (Barrick Gold) generates cyanide and mercury contamination risks. Khi theo từng mỏ water quality and health data is published alongside production revenue, W trở nên có thể tính được.
bp: Mandate môi trường bonds that fully internalize mine closure and remediation costs. Khi khai thác mỏ companies pre-fund cleanup, lợi ích chồng chéo trong extraction without môi trường accountability suy yếu.
Mandatory water quality monitoring and health-impact disclosure per mine. Publishing downstream contamination data makes W computable from khai thác mỏ revenue.
Có thể phá vỡ một phần. Open-pit khai thác mỏ disturbs landscapes. However, improved tailings management and water treatment can reduce sự phụ thuộc hệ thống.
a: Report môi trường violations to the Ministry of Environment and Natural Resources
Document community health impacts — report to health authorities
Report through Barrick Gold's compliance channels
Barrick Gold (Pueblo Viejo): Thực hiện GISTM tailings management standards
Áp dụng full water quality disclosure for all operations
Đầu tư vào community development programs per khai thác mỏ code requirements
Ministry of Energy and Mines: Tăng cường môi trường conditions in khai thác mỏ concessions
Thực thi Mining Law 146-71 môi trường provisions
Publish khai thác mỏ sector môi trường compliance data
Liên hệ đại biểu của bạn Diputado or Senador in the Congreso Nacional để yêu cầu mandatory môi trường bonds for khai thác mỏ operations
Support EITI membership for the Dominican Republic
Vận động qua SICA for regional khai thác mỏ môi trường standards
Thúc đẩy khai thác mỏ revenue minh bạch
i: Ministerio de Medio Ambiente y Recursos Naturales — the environment ministry. Dirección General de Minería — the khai thác mỏ directorate under the Ministry of Energy and Mines. Defensor del Pueblo — the national ombudsman.
Barrick Gold — operates Pueblo Viejo, one of the world's largest gold mines (JV with Newmont). The mine produces ~800,000 ounces of gold annually.
Ministerio de Energía y Minas — oversees khai thác mỏ policy. Ley 146-71 (Mining Law) — governs khai thác mỏ concessions and môi trường obligations.
Congreso Nacional — bicameral: Cámara de Diputados (190 members) and Senado (32 members). The Dominican Republic is a presidential dân chủ.

DZ.s: Major oil and gas producer ($269.3B GDP) with 22.46% combined oil and gas rents. Sonatrach is Africa's largest company. Economy heavily dependent on hydrocarbon exports (90%+ of export revenue). Nông nghiệp ở mức 14% GDP (primarily wheat and dates). Authoritarian governance.

sectors.w: Algeria's oil production is declining from mature Hassi Messaoud and Hassi R'Mel fields. As domestic energy consumption grows (population of 45M+), the exportable surplus shrinks. Khi production costs exceed export revenue minus domestic consumption, lợi ích chồng chéo trong continued expansion breaks.
bp: Redirect hydrocarbon revenues to solar energy (Algeria has the Sahara — one of Earth's highest solar irradiance zones). Khi solar electricity is cheaper than burning domestically-consumed gas, lợi ích chồng chéo trong gas-fired power generation breaks.

Thực hiện theo từng mỏ phát thải disclosure for Sonatrach operations. Algeria's massive gas flaring (visible from satellite) makes môi trường damage measurable — publishing this data makes W computable.
Không thể phá vỡ by policy alone. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂ by conservation of mass.
a: Report môi trường violations through Sonatrach internal channels
Document gas flaring data — report to Ministry of Energy and Mines
Report concerns to international partner compliance systems (Eni, TotalEnergies, Equinor)
Sonatrach: Phát triển solar energy division using Saharan land bank
Thực hiện flaring reduction program
International partners (Eni, TotalEnergies): Apply global phát thải standards to Algerian operations
ALNAFT: Tăng cường môi trường conditions in exploration and production contracts
CREG: Accelerate domestic năng lượng tái tạo deployment (the PNER 2030 targets 22GW solar)
ARH: Thực thi flaring reduction regulations
Vận động qua OPEC for managed production decline aligned with Paris Agreement
Support Mediterranean Solar Plan and Desertec-style initiatives for Saharan solar export
Thúc đẩy EITI membership for Algeria
Leverage Algeria's gas supply role to Europe for energy transition dialogue
i: Sonatrach — Algeria's state oil and gas company, Africa's largest company by revenue. Sonatrach controls all upstream and downstream petroleum operations. Note: Algeria has limited press freedom and no comprehensive người tố giác protection. Independent reporting is constrained.
Sonatrach operates the world's longest natural gas pipelines (Transmed to Italy, MEG to Spain). Eni, TotalEnergies, Equinor, Occidental — major international partners in Algerian upstream operations.

ALNAFT (Agence Nationale pour la Valorisation des Ressources en Hydrocarbures) — the hydrocarbons regulatory agency managing licensing. CREG (Commission de Régulation de l'Électricité et du Gaz) — the electricity and gas regulatory commission. ARH (Autorité de Régulation des Hydrocarbures) — the hydrocarbons sector regulator.

Note: Algeria is rated 'Not Free' by Freedom House. The Assemblée populaire nationale (407 members) and Conseil de la Nation (174 members) do not function as independent democratic institutions. International channels: OPEC membership, Mediterranean dialogue (Union for the Mediterranean), African Union, Arab League. Algeria's strategic gas supply position (supplier to Italy, Spain via pipeline) gives it leverage in energy transition negotiations.

EC.s: Oil-dependent nền kinh tế ($124.7B GDP) with 6.41% oil rents. PetroEcuador manages state interests. Extraordinary biodiversity (Galápagos, Amazon basin). The 2008 Constitution grants 'rights of nature' (Pachamama). Nông nghiệp ở mức 9.5% GDP (bananas, shrimp, cacao).

sectors.w: Ecuador's 2023 referendum voted to ban oil extraction in Yasuní National Park (one of the world's most biodiverse areas). This democratic decision to forgo extraction directly breaks the lợi ích chồng chéo. Extending this precedent to other sensitive areas accelerates the transition.
bp: Thực hiện the Yasuní referendum result (ban extraction in ITT block) and extend the precedent to other ecologically sensitive areas. Khi democratic decisions override extraction interests, the lợi ích chồng chéo breaks through civic action.

Mandate per-block môi trường impact disclosure for all PetroEcuador and private operator fields. Ecuador's môi trường data (Amazon phá rừng, water contamination from legacy Texaco/Chevron operations) makes W measurable.
Không thể phá vỡ by policy alone. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂ by conservation of mass.
a: Report môi trường violations to MAATE (Ministry of Environment, Water and Ecological Transition)
Document community health impacts from oil operations — report to the Defensoría del Pueblo
Use Ecuador's Constitutional protections for môi trường defenders
PetroEcuador: Phát triển transition plan to phase out operations in ecologically sensitive areas
Thực hiện TCFD-aligned disclosure
Đầu tư vào remediation of legacy contamination (Lago Agrio)
MAATE: Thực thi Yasuní referendum result and strengthen môi trường licensing
ARCERNNR: Cải cách energy regulation to accelerate renewable deployment
SHE (Secretaría de Hidrocarburos del Ecuador): Align licensing with rights of nature framework
Liên hệ đại biểu của bạn Asambleísta in the Asamblea Nacional để yêu cầu implementation of the Yasuní referendum and extension to other sensitive areas
Leverage Ecuador's rights of nature framework in international climate negotiations
Support the Amazon Cooperation Treaty Organization (ACTO) for regional môi trường governance
Thúc đẩy debt-for-nature swaps to finance the transition away from oil dependence
i: MAATE (Ministerio del Ambiente, Agua y Transición Ecológica) — Ecuador's environment ministry. Defensoría del Pueblo — the national ombudsman. Ecuador's 2008 Constitution (Articles 71-74) grants legally enforceable rights to nature (Pachamama), a global first.

EP PetroEcuador — the state oil company. PetroAmazonas EP — manages upstream operations in the Amazon basin. The Lago Agrio case (Chevron/Texaco) — one of the world's largest môi trường lawsuits over oil contamination in the Ecuadorian Amazon.
ARCERNNR (Agencia de Regulación y Control de Energía y Recursos Naturales No Renovables) — the energy and natural resources regulatory agency.

Asamblea Nacional del Ecuador — unicameral parliament (137 members). Contact through asambleanacional.gob.ec. Ecuador's rights of nature framework (2008 Constitution) and the 2023 Yasuní referendum are globally significant legal precedents for môi trường governance.

EE.s: Advanced digital nền kinh tế ($43.1B GDP) with unique oil shale dependence (0.96% oil rents from kukersite extraction). Services-dominant (65.7% GDP). EU and NATO member. World leader in e-governance. Oil shale power generation is Estonia's largest source of CO₂ phát thải.

sectors.w: Estonia's oil shale sector is concentrated in Ida-Viru county (Eesti Energia/Enefit). EU ETS carbon costs make oil shale electricity the most expensive fossil option. Khi carbon pricing fully applies, the lợi ích chồng chéo between shale operators and electricity consumers breaks.
bp: Full EU ETS alignment without compensation. Oil shale electricity already costs more than wind in the Baltic. Khi subsidies and free allowances are eliminated, lợi ích chồng chéo trong oil shale generation breaks — renewables are cheaper.
Mandatory theo từng nhà máy lifecycle phát thải and health-impact disclosure for oil shale processing. Estonia's detailed môi trường monitoring makes W computable.
Không thể phá vỡ. Oil shale processing releases CO₂, particulate matter, and phenolic wastewater by physical and chemical process.
a: Report môi trường violations to Keskkonnaamet (Environmental Board)
Document health impacts in Ida-Viru communities
Use Estonian người tố giác law (rikkumisest teavitaja kaitse seadus, 2022)
Eesti Energia/Enefit: Accelerate transition from oil shale to năng lượng tái tạo
Đầu tư vào Ida-Viru economic diversification
Áp dụng binding phát thải reduction targets
Konkurentsiamet: Cải cách electricity tariffs to reflect full môi trường costs
Ministry of Environment: Tăng cường oil shale processing môi trường standards
Thực hiện just transition plan for Ida-Viru county
Liên hệ đại biểu của bạn member of the Riigikogu để yêu cầu a binding oil shale phase-out timeline
Support EU Just Transition Fund allocation for Ida-Viru region
Advocate for Baltic energy market integration to enable năng lượng tái tạo scaling
Thúc đẩy HELCOM enforcement on Baltic Sea pollution from oil shale waste
i: Keskkonnaamet (Environmental Board) — Estonia's môi trường enforcement and permitting authority. Keskkonnaministeerium (Ministry of the Environment) — oversees môi trường policy. Estonia transposed the EU Whistleblower Directive in 2022.

Eesti Energia (Enefit) — the nhà nước energy company and dominant oil shale operator. Enefit operates the Narva power plants (the largest oil shale power plants in the world) and oil shale processing facilities.

Konkurentsiamet (Competition Authority) — also serves as Estonia's cơ quan quản lý năng lượng. Ida-Viru county hosts ~90% of Estonia's oil shale operations and faces significant economic transition challenges.

Riigikogu — Estonia's unicameral parliament (101 members). Contact through riigikogu.ee. Estonia's Climate Ambition target includes significant phát thải reduction from the energy sector. EU Just Transition Fund — Estonia receives JTF funding for Ida-Viru transition.

EG.s: Largest Arab nền kinh tế by population ($389.1B GDP). Oil and gas rents at 5.04%. Major gas producer (Zohr field, Mediterranean). Nông nghiệp ở mức 13.7% GDP. High military expenditure. Hosted COP27. Suez Canal provides strategic global trade leverage.

sectors.w: Egypt's Zohr gas field (discovered 2015) transformed Egypt from gas importer to exporter. COP27 presidency created domestic pressure for phát thải minh bạch. Per-field phát thải disclosure makes W computable.
bp: Redirect gas export revenue to solar energy development. Egypt's solar irradiance is among the world's highest. Khi solar electricity undercuts gas-fired generation domestically, lợi ích chồng chéo trong gas-for-domestic-power suy yếu.

Thực hiện theo từng mỏ phát thải disclosure for Zohr and other major fields. Egypt's COP27 commitments create institutional pressure — making lifecycle phát thải visible per unit of production makes W computable.
Không thể phá vỡ by policy alone. Gas combustion releases CO₂.
a: Report môi trường violations to EEAA (Egyptian Environmental Affairs Agency)
Document phát thải data through international partner channels (Eni, BP)
Report through EGPC internal compliance mechanisms
Eni (Zohr operator): Thực hiện phát thải reduction targets for Egyptian operations
EGPC: Phát triển năng lượng tái tạo investment division
Áp dụng TCFD-aligned climate disclosure
Ministry of Petroleum: Require theo từng mỏ phát thải monitoring and disclosure
NREA: Accelerate năng lượng tái tạo permitting (Egypt targets 42% renewable electricity by 2035)
EEAA: Tăng cường môi trường standards for gas processing
Leverage Egypt's COP27 presidency legacy to strengthen national climate commitments
Vận động qua Arab League for regional phát thải reduction coordination
Support Mediterranean energy transition dialogue through Union for the Mediterranean
Thúc đẩy Suez Canal green shipping corridor initiatives
i: EEAA (Egyptian Environmental Affairs Agency) — Egypt's môi trường regulatory body. EGPC (Egyptian General Petroleum Corporation) — the state oil and gas company. EGAS (Egyptian Natural Gas Holding Company) — manages natural gas operations. Note: Egypt has severe restrictions on xã hội dân sự and press freedom. Whistleblower protections are minimal.
Eni — operates Zohr, the largest gas field in the Mediterranean. BP — major operator in the West Nile Delta. EGPC and EGAS manage state interests in all petroleum operations.

Ministry of Petroleum and Mineral Resources — oversees hydrocarbons policy. NREA (New and Renewable Energy Authority) — responsible for năng lượng tái tạo development. Egypt's Integrated Sustainable Energy Strategy targets 42% renewable electricity by 2035.

Note: Egypt under President el-Sisi is rated 'Not Free' by Freedom House. The House of Representatives (Majlis al-Nuwab, 596 members) does not function as an independent democratic institution. International channels: Arab League, African Union (Egypt hosted AU in 2019), Union for the Mediterranean, COP27 legacy initiatives.

ET.s: Africa's second-most-populous country ($149.7B GDP). Agriculture dominates (34.8% GDP, primarily coffee, teff, livestock). Rapid industrialization drive (industrial parks). Major hydropower (GERD — Grand Ethiopian Renaissance Dam). Post-civil war recovery.

sectors.w: Ethiopia's agricultural expansion is the primary driver of phá rừng (fr=5.6% GDP equivalent in forest rents). Khi per-farm môi trường data (tree cover, soil carbon) is linked to agricultural output, W trở nên có thể tính được.
bp: Scale Ethiopia's Productive Safety Net Program (PSNP) to include môi trường conditionality. Khi agricultural support payments require soil conservation and tree planting, lợi ích chồng chéo trong clearing forest for short-term cultivation suy yếu.

Satellite-based monitoring of forest cover and thoái hóa đất published at woreda level. Ethiopia's Green Legacy Initiative provides political commitment — mandatory monitoring data makes W computable.

Có thể phá vỡ một phần. Subsistence agriculture on degraded land inherently affects soil and water systems. However, Ethiopia's traditional conservation agriculture (terracing, agroforestry) can reduce sự phụ thuộc hệ thống.
a: Report illegal phá rừng to regional môi trường protection authorities
Document land grabbing or forced displacement — report to EHRC (Ethiopian Human Rights Commission)
Report through agricultural development agent (DA) networks at kebele level
Ethiopian Commodity Exchange (ECX): Integrate môi trường certification into coffee and sesame trading
Agricultural investment companies: Áp dụng môi trường impact monitoring
Support Green Legacy Initiative reforestation targets
Ministry of Agriculture: Cải cách the Productive Safety Net Program to include môi trường conditionality
EFCCC: Tăng cường forest protection enforcement
EIA (Ethiopian Investment Authority): Require môi trường impact assessments for agricultural investment licenses
Support African Forest Landscape Restoration Initiative (AFR100) targets for Ethiopia
Vận động qua African Union (headquartered in Addis Ababa) for continental agricultural sustainability standards
Thúc đẩy international climate finance for Ethiopia's agricultural transformation
Support Nile Basin Initiative cooperation on sustainable watershed management
i: Regional môi trường protection authorities — Ethiopia's federal system devolves môi trường management to regional states. EHRC (Ethiopian Human Rights Commission) — the national human rights institution. Phát triểnment Agents (DAs) — government agricultural extension workers deployed at kebele (ward) level throughout rural Ethiopia.

ECX (Ethiopian Commodity Exchange) — the commodities trading platform for coffee, sesame, and other agricultural products. Ethiopia is Africa's largest coffee producer and coffee is the country's largest export. Industrial parks development corporation — manages Ethiopia's growing manufacturing sector.

Ministry of Agriculture — oversees agricultural policy and the PSNP. EFCCC (Environment, Forest and Climate Change Commission) — Ethiopia's cơ quan môi trường. Green Legacy Initiative — the government's flagship reforestation program targeting 20 billion seedlings.

Note: Ethiopia is a federal nghị viện republic but democratic governance has been constrained by civil conflict (Tigray war 2020-2022). The House of Peoples' Representatives (547 members) is the lower house. International channels: African Union (HQ in Addis Ababa), Nile Basin Initiative, IGAD (Intergovernmental Authority on Phát triểnment), AFR100 (Africa's contribution to the Bonn Challenge on forest restoration).

FI.s: Advanced Nordic nền kinh tế ($298.7B GDP) with strong forestry sector. Dịch vụ ở mức 62.2% GDP, manufacturing at 14.2%. High healthcare expenditure (10.47% GDP). Major pulp and paper producers (UPM, Stora Enso, Metsä Group). thành viên EU with robust môi trường regulation.

sectors.w: Finland's forestry-driven monoculture (pine/spruce plantations replacing natural forests) reduces biodiversity and degrades peatland carbon stocks. Khi per-harvest biodiversity and carbon data is published alongside timber revenue, W trở nên có thể tính được.
bp: Cải cách EU CAP and national forestry subsidies to reward biodiversity and carbon storage rather than timber volume. Khi subsidies incentivize continuous-cover forestry over clear-cutting, lợi ích chồng chéo trong plantation monoculture suy yếu.

Mandatory per-harvest môi trường data (biodiversity indicators, soil carbon, water quality). Finland's Metsähallitus (state forest enterprise) already collects extensive data — making it publicly accessible makes W computable.

Có thể phá vỡ một phần. Timber plantation inherently reduces biodiversity compared to natural forest. However, continuous-cover forestry and extended rotation lengths can significantly reduce sự phụ thuộc hệ thống.
a: Report forestry violations to ELY-keskus (Centre for Economic Phát triểnment, Transport and the Environment)
Document biodiversity loss in logged areas — report to SYKE (Finnish Environment Institute)
Use Finnish người tố giác law (ilmoittajansuojelulaki, 2023)
UPM, Stora Enso, Metsä Group: Áp dụng continuous-cover forestry targets
Thực hiện per-harvest biodiversity monitoring
Đầu tư vào high-value wood products to reduce harvest volume dependency
MMM (Ministry of Agriculture and Forestry): Cải cách the National Forest Strategy toward biodiversity targets
SYKE: Publish annual forest biodiversity monitoring data at municipality level
Tăng cường EU Nature Restoration Law implementation in forestry sector
Liên hệ đại biểu của bạn member of the Eduskunta để yêu cầu reform of forestry subsidies toward biodiversity and carbon storage
Support EU Nature Restoration Law implementation
Advocate for HELCOM enforcement on Baltic Sea eutrophication from forestry runoff
Thúc đẩy inclusion of forestry carbon accounting in Finland's climate targets
i: ELY-keskus — regional authorities responsible for môi trường monitoring and enforcement. SYKE (Suomen ympäristökeskus / Finnish Environment Institute) — the national môi trường research and monitoring institute. Ilmoittajansuojelulaki (Whistleblower Protection Act, 2023) — Finnish transposition of EU Whistleblower Directive.

UPM-Kymmene — one of Finland's largest forestry companies. Stora Enso — Finnish-Swedish forestry and paper company. Metsä Group — cooperative of 100,000+ Finnish forest owners. Metsähallitus — state enterprise managing one-third of Finland's land area.

MMM (Maa- ja metsätalousministeriö) — the ministry responsible for agriculture and forestry policy. National Forest Strategy 2025 — Finland's strategic framework for forestry sector development. EU Nature Restoration Law — requires restoration of degraded ecosystems including forests.

Eduskunta (Parliament of Finland) — unicameral legislature with 200 members. Contact through eduskunta.fi. The Maa- ja metsätalousvaliokunta (Agriculture and Forestry Committee) handles forestry legislation. Finland's climate law targets carbon neutrality by 2035.

GA.s: Oil-dependent Central African nền kinh tế ($20.9B GDP) with 15.83% combined oil and gas rents. 88% forest cover — one of the world's most forested countries. Low population (2.4M). Military coup August 2023 ended the Bongo family's 55-year rule.

sectors.w: Gabon's oil production is in terminal decline from mature fields (peaked at ~370,000 bpd in 1997, now ~200,000). As production falls, the lợi ích chồng chéo between operators and government revenue suy yếu. Gabon's forests offer alternative revenue through carbon credits.
bp: Monetize Gabon's forest carbon stocks through REDD+ and voluntary carbon markets. Gabon received $17M from Norway for forest protection in 2021 — scaling this replaces declining oil revenue and breaks lợi ích chồng chéo trong extraction.
Thực hiện theo từng mỏ phát thải disclosure for all operators (TotalEnergies, Perenco, Assala Energy). Making môi trường costs visible makes W computable.
Không thể phá vỡ by policy alone. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂.
a: Report môi trường violations to ANPN (Agence Nationale des Parcs Nationaux)
Document oil spills or contamination — report through operator compliance channels
Báo cáo cho EITI Gabon
TotalEnergies, Perenco, Assala: Thực hiện phát thải reduction plans for Gabonese operations
GOC: Phát triển forest carbon credit revenue streams
Áp dụng biodiversity offset requirements for all operations
Ministry of Hydrocarbons: Tăng cường môi trường licensing requirements
ANPN: Thực thi protected area boundaries against oil exploration
EITI Gabon: Expand reporting to môi trường metrics
Support CAFI (Central African Forest Initiative) for Gabon's forest conservation
Vận động qua OPEC for managed production decline from depleting fields
Thúc đẩy international carbon market standards that properly value Gabon's forest carbon
Support transition governance toward môi trường minh bạch
i: ANPN (Agence Nationale des Parcs Nationaux) — manages Gabon's 13 national parks (covering 11% of territory). GOC (Gabon Oil Company) — the state oil company. EITI Gabon — member since 2004. Note: Gabon is under military transition government since August 2023 coup.
TotalEnergies — the largest oil producer in Gabon. Perenco, Assala Energy — other major operators. GOC (Gabon Oil Company) — the state oil company.
Ministry of Hydrocarbons — oversees oil and gas policy. DGEPN (Direction Générale de l'Environnement et de la Protection de la Nature) — môi trường directorate.

Note: Gabon is under military transition government (Comité pour la Transition et la Restauration des Institutions, CTRI) since August 2023. Democratic institutions are suspended. International channels: CEMAC, CAFI, African Union, OPEC membership. Gabon's 2021 deal with Norway's sovereign wealth fund for forest protection is a model for forest-state climate finance.

GE.s: Small South Caucasus nền kinh tế ($34.2B GDP) with khai thác mỏ sector (1.28% GDP, primarily manganese and copper). Services-dominant (62% GDP). ứng cử viên EU country (2023). Significant hydropower potential. Political tensions between pro-EU and pro-Russia orientations.

sectors.w: Georgia's manganese khai thác mỏ (Chiatura) and copper khai thác mỏ generate significant water pollution. EU accession môi trường alignment will require improved monitoring. Khi water quality data is linked to khai thác mỏ output, W trở nên có thể tính được.
bp: EU accession môi trường alignment. Khi Georgia must meet EU môi trường standards for khai thác mỏ, lợi ích chồng chéo trong low-cost extraction without môi trường controls suy yếu.
Mandatory theo từng mỏ water quality and phát thải disclosure. Georgia's National Environmental Agency collects some data — extending to public disclosure makes W computable.
Có thể phá vỡ một phần. Mining disturbs landscapes, but improved tailings management can reduce sự phụ thuộc hệ thống.
a: Report môi trường violations to the Environmental Information and Education Centre
Document water contamination — report to NEA (National Environmental Agency)
Use Georgia's người tố giác protection mechanisms
Georgian Manganese (Euroasian Resources Group subsidiary): Thực hiện môi trường management systems
Áp dụng international khai thác mỏ standards (ICMM, IRMA)
Đầu tư vào mine site rehabilitation
NAPR (National Agency of Public Registry): Tăng cường khai thác mỏ license môi trường conditions
NEA: Increase môi trường monitoring capacity
Ministry of Economy: Align khai thác mỏ regulation with EU môi trường acquis
Liên hệ đại biểu của bạn member of the Sakartvelos Parlamenti (Parliament of Georgia) để yêu cầu EU-aligned môi trường standards for khai thác mỏ
Support EU accession conditionality on môi trường governance
Advocate for Energy Community Treaty enforcement on môi trường standards
Thúc đẩy EITI membership for Georgia
i: NEA (National Environmental Agency) — responsible for môi trường monitoring, permitting, and enforcement. Ministry of Environmental Protection and Agriculture — oversees môi trường and agricultural policy. Georgia's Law on Freedom of Speech and Expression provides some protections for reporting.

Georgian Manganese — subsidiary of ERG (Eurasian Resources Group), operating the Chiatura manganese mines. RMG Copper — operates copper mines. Georgia's khai thác mỏ sector is primarily controlled by international investors.
National Agency of Mines — responsible for khai thác mỏ licensing and oversight. Georgia's EU Association Agreement (2014) includes provisions for môi trường alignment.

Sakartvelos Parlamenti (Parliament of Georgia) — unicameral legislature with 150 members. Contact through parliament.ge. Georgia is an ứng cử viên EU country (2023) and aspirant to full thành viên EUship. EU Association Agreement — includes Deep and Comprehensive Free Trade Area (DCFTA) with môi trường provisions.

GH.s: West African nền kinh tế ($82.3B GDP) with significant oil (4.06% rents), gold khai thác mỏ (5.17% mineral rents), and cocoa agriculture (20.9% ag share). One of Africa's most stable democracies. Debt crisis (2022 IMF bailout). Illegal artisanal gold khai thác mỏ (galamsey) is a major môi trường crisis.

sectors.w: Ghana's galamsey (illegal artisanal khai thác mỏ) crisis has contaminated water bodies across cocoa-growing regions. Khi theo từng mỏ water quality data is published and linked to gold production, W trở nên có thể tính được. The galamsey problem is so severe that it threatens Ghana's water supply.
bp: Formalize artisanal khai thác mỏ with môi trường standards and alternative livelihood programs. Khi legal small-scale khai thác mỏ provides comparable income with less môi trường damage, lợi ích chồng chéo trong illegal extraction suy yếu.
Satellite-based water quality monitoring linked to khai thác mỏ areas. Ghana's Water Resources Commission already monitors water quality — extending to real-time public data makes W computable.
Có thể phá vỡ một phần. Mining disturbs landscapes. However, formalized artisanal khai thác mỏ with mercury-free processing (e.g., gravity separation) can significantly reduce sự phụ thuộc hệ thống.
a: Report illegal galamsey operations to the Inter-Ministerial Committee on Illegal Mining (IMCIM)
Document water contamination — report to WRC (Water Resources Commission)
Report through the Minerals Commission complaint mechanisms
Gold Fields, Newmont, AngloGold Ashanti: Support formalization of artisanal khai thác mỏ near concessions
Thực hiện community development agreements per Ghana's khai thác mỏ law
Áp dụng mercury-free processing technology transfer programs
Minerals Commission: Accelerate small-scale khai thác mỏ formalization with môi trường standards
EPA (Environmental Protection Agency): Tăng cường enforcement against water pollution from khai thác mỏ
Forestry Commission: Protect forest reserves from galamsey encroachment
Liên hệ đại biểu của bạn Member of Parliament để yêu cầu emergency action on the galamsey water contamination crisis
Support EITI enhanced reporting with môi trường metrics
Vận động qua ECOWAS for regional artisanal khai thác mỏ regulation
Thúc đẩy Minamata Convention enforcement on mercury use in gold khai thác mỏ
i: IMCIM (Inter-Ministerial Committee on Illegal Mining) — established to coordinate government response to the galamsey crisis. WRC (Water Resources Commission) — manages Ghana's water resources and monitors water quality. Minerals Commission — the regulatory body for the khai thác mỏ sector, responsible for licensing and compliance monitoring.

Gold Fields — operates Tarkwa and Damang mines. Newmont — operates Ahafo and Akyem mines. AngloGold Ashanti — major gold khai thác mỏ company with Ghanaian operations. Ghana is Africa's largest gold producer.

EPA (Environmental Protection Agency of Ghana) — responsible for môi trường permitting, monitoring, and enforcement. Forestry Commission — manages Ghana's forest reserves, many of which are threatened by illegal khai thác mỏ. EITI Ghana — Ghana has been EITI compliant since 2010.

Parliament of Ghana — unicameral legislature with 275 members. Contact through parliament.gh. Ghana is a presidential dân chủ with peaceful transfers of power. Minamata Convention on Mercury — Ghana has ratified this treaty requiring phase-down of mercury use in artisanal gold khai thác mỏ.

GN.s: Resource-rich West African nền kinh tế ($25B GDP) with massive bauxite reserves (world's largest — 7.4B tons). Nông nghiệp ở mức 31% GDP. Military junta since 2021 coup. Guinea supplies ~25% of global bauxite (the ore used to produce aluminum).

sectors.w: Guinea's bauxite khai thác mỏ displaces communities and contaminates water sources. As aluminum buyers face ESG pressure (EU CSRD, Apple/Tesla supply chain requirements), making theo từng mỏ môi trường data visible breaks system independence.
bp: International supply chain due diligence (EU CSDDD) requiring môi trường and human rights compliance for bauxite. Khi buyers must verify mine-level conditions, lợi ích chồng chéo trong low-cost, unregulated extraction suy yếu.
Per-mine môi trường and community impact disclosure through EITI and supply chain traceability. Khi downstream manufacturers can see the welfare cost per ton of bauxite, W trở nên có thể tính được.
Có thể phá vỡ một phần. Open-pit bauxite khai thác mỏ inherently disturbs landscapes. However, progressive rehabilitation and dust suppression can reduce sự phụ thuộc hệ thống.
a: Report môi trường violations to international monitoring organizations (Human Rights Watch, Inclusive Phát triểnment International)
Document community displacement — report through international accountability mechanisms
Report through khai thác mỏ company compliance channels (Rio Tinto, Alcoa, Emirates Global Aluminium)
CBG (Compagnie des Bauxites de Guinée), SMB (Société Minière de Boké): Thực hiện community resettlement standards per IFC Performance Standard 5
Áp dụng ASI (Aluminium Stewardship Initiative) certification
Đầu tư vào progressive rehabilitation of mined areas
Ministry of Mines: Thực thi 2011 Mining Code môi trường provisions
CPDM (Centre de Promotion et de Développement Minier): Tăng cường môi trường monitoring capacity
EITI Guinea: Expand reporting to môi trường and community data
Vận động qua ECOWAS for return to democratic governance and strengthened khai thác mỏ regulation
Support EU CSDDD implementation requiring due diligence for bauxite imports from Guinea
Thúc đẩy ASI certification as condition for international bauxite purchases
Support international accountability mechanisms for khai thác mỏ-affected communities
i: Note: Guinea is under military rule (CNRD — Comité National du Rassemblement et du Développement) since September 2021. Independent xã hội dân sự operates under severe constraints. Bureau Guinéen des Études et Évaluations Environnementales (BGEEE) — môi trường assessment authority. International monitoring: Human Rights Watch and Inclusive Phát triểnment International have documented impacts of bauxite khai thác mỏ on Guinean communities.

CBG (Compagnie des Bauxites de Guinée) — JV of Alcoa, Rio Tinto, and Dadco, one of the world's largest bauxite producers. SMB (Société Minière de Boké) — Chinese-backed consortium (includes Winning International, Shandong Weiqiao). GAC (Guinea Alumina Corporation) — Emirates Global Aluminium subsidiary. ASI (Aluminium Stewardship Initiative) — the industry sustainability standard for the aluminum value chain.

Ministère des Mines et de la Géologie — oversees khai thác mỏ policy and licensing. Code Minier (2011, revised 2013) — Guinea's khai thác mỏ code establishing môi trường obligations. EITI Guinea — Guinea has been EITI compliant, publishing reports on khai thác mỏ revenues.

Note: Guinea's democratic institutions are suspended under military rule. The Conseil National de la Transition (CNT) serves as a transitional legislature. International channels: ECOWAS (Guinea suspended), African Union, international khai thác mỏ company home-country oversight (UK, Canada, UAE, China). EU Corporate Sustainability Due Diligence Directive (CSDDD) — will require EU companies to address human rights and môi trường impacts in their supply chains.

GQ.s: Small petrostate ($12.8B GDP) with 21.57% combined oil and gas rents. One of Africa's highest per-capita GDPs but extreme inequality. Authoritarian rule (Obiang family since 1979 — world's longest-serving head of state). Oil production declining from mature fields.

sectors.w: Equatorial Guinea's oil production has declined ~75% from peak. As fields deplete, the lợi ích chồng chéo between operators and government revenue suy yếu. Without new discoveries, the economic case for diversification becomes unavoidable.
bp: Economic diversification as oil depletes. Khi production revenue falls below government operating costs, lợi ích chồng chéo trong continued extraction from depleting fields breaks — alternative revenue sources become necessary.
Per-field phát thải disclosure through international operator reporting (ExxonMobil, Marathon Oil). Making môi trường costs visible makes W computable.
Không thể phá vỡ by policy alone. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂.
a: Report through international operator compliance channels (ExxonMobil, Marathon Oil)
Document môi trường violations to international NGOs
Report corruption to US DOJ (several Obiang family members have faced kleptocracy investigations)
ExxonMobil, Marathon Oil: Apply global môi trường standards to EG operations
Report Scope 1-3 phát thải for EG operations in global ESG disclosures
Thực hiện community development programs
Ministry of Mines and Hydrocarbons: Publish production and revenue data through EITI (EG was suspended from EITI in 2010)
Tăng cường môi trường standards for offshore operations
BEAC: Improve fiscal minh bạch for hydrocarbon revenues
Support international anti-kleptocracy enforcement for misappropriated oil revenues
Vận động qua CEMAC for regional minh bạch standards
Thúc đẩy re-engagement with EITI minh bạch requirements
Support international mechanisms for asset recovery and repatriation of stolen oil revenues
i: Note: Equatorial Guinea is one of the world's most chuyên quyền states. No independent media, xã hội dân sự, or labor organizations exist. EG LNG (Equatorial Guinea LNG Holdings) — operates the LNG processing plant. International engagement: US Department of Justice Kleptocracy Asset Recovery Initiative has investigated Obiang family assets. Transparency International consistently ranks Equatorial Guinea among the most corrupt countries.
ExxonMobil — the largest oil operator in Equatorial Guinea. Marathon Oil — operates in offshore blocks. GEPetrol — the state national oil company.

Ministry of Mines and Hydrocarbons — oversees oil and gas operations. Note: Equatorial Guinea was suspended from EITI in 2010 for insufficient progress on minh bạch. BEAC (central bank of CEMAC zone) provides limited macroeconomic oversight.

Note: Equatorial Guinea under President Obiang (in power since 1979) has no democratic institutions. The Cámara de Representantes del Pueblo and Senate are rubber-stamp bodies. International channels: CEMAC, African Union, UN Human Rights Council. Several countries (US, France, Switzerland) have pursued legal action against Obiang family members for corruption and money laundering.

GR.s: EU nền kinh tế ($256.2B GDP) with dominant services sector (68% GDP, tourism-heavy). Low resource extraction. Post-debt-crisis recovery. Major shipping industry (Greek-owned fleet is the world's largest). Nông nghiệp ở mức 3.8% GDP (olives, wine).

sectors.w: Greece's Mediterranean diet is being displaced by UPF consumption, contributing to rising obesity (Greece has one of Europe's highest childhood obesity rates). Khi diet-related healthcare costs are published per product category through EOPYY health insurance data, W trở nên có thể tính được.
bp: Thực hiện front-of-pack health labelling to make welfare costs visible to consumers. Khi UPF health costs are visible at point of sale, the lợi ích chồng chéo between processors and retailers in high-margin UPF suy yếu.

EOPYY (National Organization for the Provision of Healthcare Services) publication of diet-attributable disease costs per food category. Greece's national health system generates data to make W computable.
Not fully breakable. Ultra-processing alters food matrix. Cải cáchulation mandates can reduce sự phụ thuộc hệ thống.
a: Report misleading health claims to EFET (Hellenic Food Authority)
Document food safety violations
Use Greek người tố giác law (transposition of EU Directive 2019/1937, 2022)
Greek food companies: Đầu tư vào traditional Mediterranean diet products over UPF
Áp dụng voluntary front-of-pack labelling
Commission health-impact assessments
Ministry of Health: Thực hiện mandatory front-of-pack labelling
EFET: Tăng cường enforcement of marketing claims
EOPYY: Publish diet-related health expenditure data
Liên hệ đại biểu của bạn Βουλευτής in the Βουλή των Ελλήνων (Hellenic Parliament) để yêu cầu front-of-pack health labelling
Support EU Farm to Fork Strategy implementation
Advocate for UNESCO Intangible Heritage protection of Mediterranean diet through policy measures
Thúc đẩy WHO-aligned UPF marketing restrictions
i: EFET (ΕΦΕΤ — Ενιαίος Φορέας Ελέγχου Τροφίμων / Hellenic Food Authority) — Greece's food safety authority. Greece transposed the EU Whistleblower Directive in 2022.

SEVT (Σύνδεσμος Ελληνικών Βιομηχανιών Τροφίμων / Federation of Hellenic Food Industries) — the food industry trade association. Greece's traditional food sector (olive oil, dairy, honey) provides a competitive alternative to UPF.

Ministry of Health — oversees health policy. EOPYY (Εθνικός Οργανισμός Παροχής Υπηρεσιών Υγείας / National Organization for the Provision of Healthcare Services) — the national health insurer managing healthcare expenditure data.
Βουλή των Ελλήνων (Hellenic Parliament) — unicameral legislature with 300 members. Contact through hellenicparliament.gr. Greece is a nghị viện dân chủ and thành viên EU.

GT.s: Central American nền kinh tế ($113.2B GDP) with agriculture at 9.8% GDP (coffee, sugar, palm oil). Mining at 1.12% GDP (gold, silver — Marlin mine controversy). High inequality and indigenous population (40%+). Remittances significant (~18% of GDP).

sectors.w: Guatemala's palm oil expansion into Petén and Alta Verapaz drives phá rừng and displaces indigenous communities. Khi per-farm phá rừng data is linked to palm oil exports (EUDR compliance), W trở nên có thể tính được.
bp: EU Deforestation Regulation compliance requiring farm-level traceability. Khi palm oil exports must prove zero-phá rừng origin, lợi ích chồng chéo trong clearing forest for plantations breaks.

Mandatory per-farm môi trường data (tree cover, water use, pesticide application). Guatemala's CONAP (National Council for Protected Areas) can provide monitoring data — linking to agricultural output makes W computable.
Có thể phá vỡ một phần. Palm oil monoculture reduces biodiversity. However, agroforestry integration and RSPO certification can reduce sự phụ thuộc hệ thống.
a: Report illegal phá rừng to CONAP or INAB (National Forest Institute)
