Document indigenous land rights violations — report to PDH (Procuraduría de los Derechos Humanos)
Report pesticide violations to MAGA (Ministry of Agriculture)
Palm oil companies (REPSA, NaturAceites): Áp dụng RSPO certification and zero-phá rừng commitments
International buyers: Require supply chain traceability for Guatemalan palm oil
Đầu tư vào community benefit-sharing agreements
MARN (Ministry of Environment): Tăng cường môi trường impact assessment for agricultural expansion
MAGA: Cải cách agricultural incentives to require môi trường compliance
CONAP: Thực thi protected area boundaries against agricultural encroachment
Liên hệ đại biểu của bạn Diputado in the Congreso de la República để yêu cầu enforcement of môi trường protections for indigenous territories
Support ILO Convention 169 enforcement on indigenous consultation
Advocate for Escazú Agreement ratification
Thúc đẩy EUDR compliance support for small-scale farmers
i: CONAP (Consejo Nacional de Áreas Protegidas) — manages Guatemala's protected areas. INAB (Instituto Nacional de Bosques) — the national forest institute. PDH (Procuraduría de los Derechos Humanos) — the national human rights ombudsman. Guatemala has significant challenges with môi trường defender safety.

REPSA (Reforestadora de Palma del Petén) — major palm oil producer. GREPALMA (Gremial de Palmicultores de Guatemala) — the palm oil producers' association. RSPO (Roundtable on Sustainable Dầu cọ) — the international certification standard.
MARN (Ministerio de Ambiente y Recursos Naturales) — Guatemala's environment ministry. MAGA (Ministerio de Agricultura, Ganadería y Alimentación) — the agriculture ministry.

Congreso de la República de Guatemala — unicameral legislature with 160 members. Guatemala has ratified ILO Convention 169 on indigenous peoples' rights. The Inter-American Court of Human Rights has issued rulings on indigenous land rights in Guatemala.

GY.s: Fastest-growing nền kinh tế globally ($24.7B GDP, up from $5.5B in 2019) due to massive offshore oil discoveries (Stabroek block). Tô dầu mỏ at 22.08%, khai thác mỏ at 9.38% (gold, bauxite). Small population (800K). At risk of 'resource curse' — extraordinary PST exposure from rapid petro-development.

sectors.w: Guyana's 2016 production sharing agreement with ExxonMobil has been widely criticized for giving the government only 2% royalty + 50% profit oil (after cost recovery). Khi the full fiscal terms and môi trường costs are disclosed and understood, W trở nên có thể tính được from production data.
bp: Renegotiate the Stabroek PSA fiscal terms to capture a fair share of petroleum wealth. Khi Guyana's government share approaches international norms (60-80% government take), lợi ích chồng chéo trong an extractive-favorable contract suy yếu.

Mandatory theo từng mỏ phát thải disclosure and môi trường monitoring for all Stabroek block operations. ExxonMobil already reports global phát thải — extending to theo từng mỏ Guyana data makes W computable.
Không thể phá vỡ by policy alone. Offshore oil production and combustion release CO₂.
a: Report môi trường violations to EPA (Environmental Protection Agency of Guyana)
Document compliance gaps in Stabroek operations — report through ExxonMobil compliance channels
Report fiscal irregularities to the Audit Office of Guyana
ExxonMobil, Hess, CNOOC (Stabroek partners): Thực hiện theo từng mỏ phát thải disclosure for Guyana operations
Áp dụng zero-flaring targets
Đầu tư vào oil spill response capacity (current capacity is minimal for deepwater operations)
EPA: Tăng cường môi trường monitoring capacity for offshore operations
Ministry of Natural Resources: Commission independent review of Stabroek PSA terms
Natural Resource Fund Board: Thực hiện transparent investment and withdrawal rules
Liên hệ đại biểu của bạn Member of Parliament in the National Assembly để yêu cầu independent review of Stabroek PSA fiscal terms
Support establishment of a properly resourced Petroleum Commission as independent regulator
Advocate for Natural Resource Fund minh bạch aligned with Santiago Principles for sovereign wealth funds
Thúc đẩy Norwegian-style petroleum governance model with high government take and transparent wealth fund management
i: EPA (Environmental Protection Agency of Guyana) — responsible for môi trường permitting and monitoring of oil and gas operations. Ministry of Natural Resources — oversees petroleum policy. Audit Office of Guyana — conducts financial audits of government revenue management. Note: Guyana's regulatory capacity is severely under-resourced relative to the scale of oil development.

ExxonMobil (45%), Hess (30%), CNOOC (25%) — the Stabroek block partnership. Production began in 2019 and is expected to reach 1.2 million bpd by 2027. The Stabroek Production Sharing Agreement (2016) — governs fiscal terms. The Natural Resource Fund — Guyana's sovereign wealth fund established in 2019 to manage oil revenues.
Natural Resource Fund Act (2021) — governs the sovereign wealth fund. The Petroleum Commission (planned) — intended to serve as the independent petroleum regulator, but not yet fully established.

National Assembly of Guyana — unicameral legislature with 65 members. Guyana is a cooperative republic with Westminster-style nghị viện dân chủ. The Natural Resource Governance Institute (NRGI) provides technical assistance on petroleum governance. CARICOM — provides regional coordination.

HK.s: Global financial center ($406.9B GDP) with 91.8% services. Major banking and securities hub. Under Chinese sovereignty since 1997 with eroding autonomy. Significant financial intermediation — Hong Kong Stock Exchange is 5th-largest globally by market cap.

sectors.w: Hong Kong intermediates massive capital flows including fossil fuel financing. Khi Scope 3 financed phát thải are disclosed per financial institution, W trở nên có thể tính được from financial transaction data.
bp: Mandatory financed phát thải disclosure for all HKEX-listed financial institutions. Khi banks must disclose the phát thải their lending supports, lợi ích chồng chéo trong fossil fuel financing suy yếu — ESG-aware investors reallocate.
HKMA Green and Sustainable Finance Cross-Agency Steering Group implementation. Making climate risk visible in financial products makes W computable.
Có thể phá vỡ một phần. Financial intermediation can relocate. But Hong Kong's infrastructure and China market access create switching costs.
a: Report greenwashing to SFC (Securities and Futures Commission)
Document ESG disclosure violations — report to HKEX listing division
Report through internal bank compliance channels
Áp dụng TCFD-aligned disclosure across all operations
Set financed phát thải reduction targets
Integrate climate risk into lending decisions
HKMA: Mandate climate stress testing for all authorized institutions
SFC: Thực thi enhanced ESG disclosure for listed companies
HKEX: Tăng cường climate-related listing requirements
Vận động qua IOSCO for global securities regulator coordination on climate disclosure
Support ISSB sustainability reporting standards adoption in Hong Kong
Thúc đẩy Network for Greening the Financial System (NGFS) recommendations implementation
Leverage Hong Kong's role as a Belt and Road financing hub to require climate standards
i: SFC (Securities and Futures Commission) — regulates securities, futures markets, and listed companies. HKEX (Hong Kong Exchanges and Clearing) — operates the stock exchange and sets listing rules including ESG disclosure requirements. HKMA (Hong Kong Monetary Authority) — the de facto central bank. Note: Under the National Security Law (2020), civil liberties are constrained.

Major banks in Hong Kong: HSBC, Standard Chartered, Bank of China (Hong Kong), Hang Seng Bank. Green and Sustainable Finance Cross-Agency Steering Group — coordinates climate finance policy across HKMA, SFC, and other regulators.
HKMA — supervises 160+ licensed banks. The HKMA's Climate Risk Management Supervisory Policy Manual (2021) sets expectations for banks' climate risk management.

Note: Hong Kong's Legislative Council (90 members) is not freely elected under the 2021 electoral reform. International engagement operates through financial regulatory cooperation (IOSCO, BIS, NGFS) and Hong Kong's role as an international financial center.

HN.s: Lower-middle-income nền kinh tế ($37.1B GDP) with agriculture at 11.2% GDP (coffee, palm oil, bananas). Sản xuất ở mức 14.9% (maquiladora sector). Climate-vulnerable — Hurricane Mitch (1998) and Eta/Iota (2020). High emigration. Environmental defenders face severe threats.

sectors.w: Honduras's palm oil expansion drives phá rừng in the Aguán Valley and Mosquitia region. EUDR compliance will require farm-level traceability — when phá rừng is linked to specific supply chains, W trở nên có thể tính được.
bp: EUDR compliance requiring zero-phá rừng traceability for palm oil exports. Khi buyers must verify origin, lợi ích chồng chéo trong forest conversion for plantations breaks.
Satellite-based phá rừng monitoring linked to agricultural export data. ICF (Forest Conservation Institute) data makes W computable.
Có thể phá vỡ một phần. Palm oil monoculture inherently reduces biodiversity. RSPO certification and agroforestry can reduce sự phụ thuộc hệ thống.
a: Report illegal phá rừng to ICF (Instituto de Conservación Forestal)
Document land rights violations — report to CONADEH (Comisionado Nacional de los Derechos Humanos)
Report through RSPO complaint mechanisms
Palm oil companies (Dinant, Jaremar): Áp dụng RSPO certification and zero-phá rừng commitments
Thực hiện community benefit-sharing agreements
International buyers: Require traceability
MiAmbiente+: Tăng cường môi trường impact assessment for agricultural expansion
SAG (Secretariat of Agriculture): Cải cách agricultural incentives
ICF: Thực thi protected area boundaries
Liên hệ đại biểu của bạn Diputado in the Congreso Nacional để yêu cầu enforcement of môi trường protections
Support Escazú Agreement ratification for protection of môi trường defenders
Vận động qua SICA for Central American phá rừng governance
Thúc đẩy international accountability for violence against môi trường defenders
i: ICF (Instituto de Conservación Forestal) — responsible for forest management and conservation. CONADEH — the national human rights commissioner. Note: Honduras is one of the most dangerous countries for môi trường defenders — Global Witness documents multiple killings annually.

Corporación Dinant — Honduras's largest palm oil producer (implicated in Aguán Valley land conflicts). Jaremar — another major palm oil company. IFC (International Finance Corporation) — has faced accountability complaints regarding investments in Honduran palm oil.
MiAmbiente+ (Secretaría de Recursos Naturales y Ambiente) — Honduras's environment ministry. SAG (Secretaría de Agricultura y Ganadería) — the agriculture ministry.

Congreso Nacional de Honduras — unicameral legislature with 128 members. Honduras is a presidential dân chủ. SICA (Sistema de la Integración Centroamericana) — the Central American integration system.

HR.s: EU and Eurozone member ($93B GDP) with dominant services sector (60.8% GDP, tourism-heavy). Small oil sector (INA, partially owned by MOL). Nông nghiệp ở mức 2.9% GDP. Joined the euro and Schengen in 2023.

sectors.w: Croatia's EU-integrated health insurance system (HZZO) tracks healthcare costs. Publishing diet-attributable disease costs per product category makes W computable from retail sales data.
bp: Thực hiện EU front-of-pack health labelling. Makes welfare costs visible to consumers.
HZZO publication of diet-attributable healthcare cost data. Croatia's universal health insurance generates data to make W computable.
Not fully breakable. Ultra-processing alters food matrix. Cải cáchulation mandates reduce sự phụ thuộc hệ thống.
a: Báo cáo cho HAH (Croatian Food Agency)
Use EU Whistleblower Directive protections (transposed 2022)
Report misleading claims to AZTN (competition authority)
Croatian food companies: Đầu tư vào minimally processed alternatives
Áp dụng Nutri-Score voluntarily
Commission health-impact assessments
Ministry of Health: Thực hiện mandatory front-of-pack labelling
HAH: Tăng cường marketing claim enforcement
HZZO: Publish diet-related expenditure data
Liên hệ đại biểu của bạn Zastupnik in the Hrvatski sabor để yêu cầu health-impact labelling
Support EU Farm to Fork Strategy
Advocate for WHO-aligned UPF marketing restrictions
i: HAH (Hrvatska agencija za hranu / Croatian Food Agency) — food safety authority. AZTN (Agencija za zaštitu tržišnog natjecanja) — competition authority. Croatia transposed the EU Whistleblower Directive in 2022.
Podravka, Kraš — major Croatian food companies. Agrokor/Fortenova Group — the largest food and retail conglomerate in Southeast Europe.
HZZO (Hrvatski zavod za zdravstveno osiguranje) — Croatia's health insurance fund. Ministry of Health oversees nutrition policy.
Hrvatski sabor (Croatian Parliament) — unicameral, 151 members. Contact through sabor.hr. Croatia is an EU and Eurozone member.

HT.s: Fragile state ($25.2B GDP) — Western Hemisphere's poorest country. Nông nghiệp ở mức 15.9% GDP (coffee, mangoes, cocoa). Extreme phá rừng (2% forest cover remaining). Gang violence and political instability. Sản xuất ở mức 26.2% GDP (garment assembly).

sectors.w: Haiti's near-total phá rừng (98% forest loss) means any remaining agriculture operates on severely degraded land. The sự phụ thuộc hệ thống is already partially broken — Haiti has experienced the endpoint of phá rừng-driven agricultural collapse. Reforestation is the intervention.
bp: Cải cách agricultural support to incentivize tree planting and agroforestry. Khi hillside farmers receive more support for tree crops (coffee, cocoa, fruit) than annual crops on degraded slopes, lợi ích chồng chéo trong continued phá rừng breaks.
Satellite monitoring of remaining forest cover and soil erosion published at commune level. Making degradation visible makes W computable.

Extreme sự phụ thuộc hệ thống — 98% forest loss means agricultural activity on degraded slopes directly causes erosion, flooding, and further land degradation. Reforestation is the only path to reducing sự phụ thuộc hệ thống.
a: Document phá rừng through community organizations
Report illegal charcoal production to MDE (Ministry of Environment)
Engage international development organizations
International agricultural companies: Support sustainable supply chains from Haiti
Đầu tư vào tree crop processing (coffee, cacao, mango)
Charcoal alternatives: Support LPG transition programs
MDE: Thực thi (to extent possible) remaining forest protections
MARNDR (Agriculture Ministry): Prioritize hillside agroforestry programs
ONEV: Support reforestation monitoring
Support international reforestation and land restoration programs for Haiti
Vận động qua CARICOM for regional môi trường support
Thúc đẩy debt-for-nature swaps to finance reforestation
Support Haitian diaspora organizations working on môi trường restoration
i: MDE (Ministère de l'Environnement) — the environment ministry, severely under-resourced. Note: Haiti's state institutions are largely non-functional due to the ongoing security and governance crisis. International organizations (UN, USAID, EU) provide most môi trường programming.
Haiti's private sector is small. The Chambre de Commerce d'Haïti coordinates business activities. International NGOs (Partners in Health, Trees for the Future) implement many development programs.

MARNDR (Ministère de l'Agriculture, des Ressources Naturelles et du Développement Rural) — the agriculture ministry. ONEV (Observatoire National de l'Environnement et de la Vulnérabilité) — môi trường monitoring.

Note: Haiti's democratic institutions are non-functional — no elected parliament since 2023, no elected president. Transitional governance is underway. International channels: UN Integrated Office in Haiti (BINUH), CARICOM, OAS, Haitian diaspora organizations.

HU.s: thành viên EU ($222.7B GDP) with strong manufacturing (15.8% GDP, automotive-focused). Dịch vụ ở mức 59.5% GDP. Small oil and gas sector (MOL Group). Nông nghiệp ở mức 2.7% GDP. Democratic backsliding under Orbán government has strained EU relations.

sectors.w: Hungary has one of Europe's highest obesity rates and introduced a 'chip tax' (NETA — népegészségügyi termékadó) on UPF in 2011. Khi health insurance data (NEAK) links diet to healthcare costs per product category, W trở nên có thể tính được.
bp: Tăng cường the NETA tax and extend to broader UPF categories. Hungary's pioneering public health product tax suy yếu lợi ích chồng chéo trong high-margin UPF by internalizing health costs.
NEAK publication of diet-attributable healthcare expenditure. Hungary's health insurance system generates data to make W computable.
Not fully breakable. Ultra-processing alters food matrix. Cải cáchulation targets can reduce sự phụ thuộc hệ thống.
a: Báo cáo cho NÉBIH (National Food Chain Safety Office)
Document food safety violations
Use Hungarian người tố giác law (transposition of EU Directive)
Hungarian food companies: Cải cáchulate to reduce UPF
Đầu tư vào traditional Hungarian food products
Áp dụng transparent nutritional labelling
Ministry of Human Capacities: Tăng cường NETA tax and expand coverage
NÉBIH: Thực thi marketing claim standards
NEAK: Publish diet-related healthcare cost data
Liên hệ đại biểu của bạn Képviselő in the Országgyűlés để yêu cầu expansion of the NETA health tax
Support EU-wide front-of-pack labelling through Farm to Fork Strategy
Advocate for WHO-aligned UPF marketing restrictions
Thúc đẩy EU cohesion funds for public health nutrition programs
i: NÉBIH (Nemzeti Élelmiszerlánc-biztonsági Hivatal) — Hungary's food chain safety authority. GVH (Gazdasági Versenyhivatal) — competition authority enforcing fair advertising. Hungary transposed the EU Whistleblower Directive.
Major companies: Bonafarm Group, Pick Szeged. International companies operating in Hungary: Nestlé, Coca-Cola, PepsiCo.

NETA (népegészségügyi termékadó) — Hungary's public health product tax, one of the world's first UPF taxes, introduced 2011. NEAK (Nemzeti Egészségbiztosítási Alapkezelő) — national health insurance fund.
Országgyűlés (National Assembly of Hungary) — unicameral parliament, 199 members. Contact through parlament.hu.

ID.s: G20 nền kinh tế ($1,396.3B GDP). World's largest palm oil producer (palm oil=~3.5% GDP). Significant coal (1.22% rents), oil/gas (1.61%), and khai thác mỏ (1.91%). Massive archipelago with extraordinary biodiversity. Palm oil expansion has driven catastrophic phá rừng.

sectors.w: Indonesia produces ~60% of global palm oil. EUDR compliance will require zero-phá rừng traceability to plantation level. Khi theo từng nhà máyation forest loss data is linked to palm oil transactions, W trở nên có thể tính được from commodity prices.
bp: EUDR compliance forcing zero-phá rừng supply chain traceability. Khi international buyers require verified phá rừng-free palm oil, lợi ích chồng chéo trong clearing forest for new plantations breaks — productivity improvement on existing land becomes the viable model.

Mandatory per-concession môi trường data (fire occurrence, peat depth, biodiversity surveys) linked to ISPO certification. Indonesia's KLHK already monitors phá rừng by satellite — publishing per-company data makes W computable.

Có thể phá vỡ một phần. Palm oil monoculture inherently reduces biodiversity. However, smallholder agroforestry and yield improvement on existing plantations can reduce pressure for new forest conversion.
a: Report illegal phá rừng to KLHK (Ministry of Environment and Forestry)
Document land rights violations — report to Komnas HAM (National Human Rights Commission)
Report fire-setting to Satgas Karhutla (forest fire task force)
Wilmar, Golden Agri-Resources, Sinar Mas: Thực hiện full NDPE (No Deforestation, No Peat, No Exploitation) commitments
Áp dụng RSPO certification across all operations
Đầu tư vào yield improvement rather than area expansion
KLHK: Thực thi the permanent moratorium on new primary forest and peatland conversion
Tăng cường ISPO mandatory certification with môi trường performance metrics
BPN (National Land Agency): Resolve overlapping land claims through One Map Policy
Liên hệ đại biểu của bạn member of the DPR (Dewan Perwakilan Rakyat) để yêu cầu enforcement of the forest moratorium and peatland protection
Support EUDR implementation with adequate transition support for smallholders
Vận động qua ASEAN for regional zero-phá rừng commitments
Thúc đẩy international tropical forest conservation finance
i: KLHK (Kementerian Lingkungan Hidup dan Kehutanan) — the environment and forestry ministry, responsible for forest management, môi trường regulation, and fire prevention. Komnas HAM (Komisi Nasional Hak Asasi Manusia) — the national human rights commission. WALHI (Wahana Lingkungan Hidup Indonesia / Friends of the Earth Indonesia) — the largest môi trường NGO.

Wilmar International — the world's largest palm oil trader. Golden Agri-Resources (Sinar Mas Group) — one of the largest palm oil producers. GAPKI (Gabungan Pengusaha Kelapa Sawit Indonesia) — the Indonesian palm oil association. RSPO and ISPO (Indonesian Sustainable Dầu cọ) — certification standards.

One Map Policy (Kebijakan Satu Peta) — Indonesia's initiative to create a single, authoritative map of land use and forest cover to resolve overlapping concessions. BPDPKS (Badan Pengelola Dana Perkebunan Kelapa Sawit) — the palm oil plantation fund managing the CPO export levy.

DPR (Dewan Perwakilan Rakyat / People's Representative Council) — lower house, 580 members. DPD (Dewan Perwakilan Daerah / Regional Representative Council) — upper house, 136 members. Contact through dpr.go.id. Indonesia is a presidential dân chủ and the world's third-largest dân chủ.

IE.s: High-income EU nền kinh tế ($609.2B GDP, inflated by multinational profit booking). Sản xuất ở mức 29.6% GDP (pharma, tech). Major corporate tax hub. Nông nghiệp ở mức 1% GDP but intensive dairy farming with significant methane phát thải. Dịch vụ ở mức 60.6% GDP.

sectors.w: Ireland's dairy herd expansion post-milk-quota-abolition (2015) increased methane phát thải by 20%+. Khi per-farm greenhouse gas data is published alongside output, W trở nên có thể tính được from agricultural production data.
bp: Cải cách CAP subsidies from production-linked to môi trường outcome-linked. Khi dairy expansion no longer receives per-cow support, lợi ích chồng chéo trong herd growth suy yếu.
Mandatory per-farm greenhouse gas balance disclosure. Ireland's Bord Bia Origin Green program collects data — making it publicly verifiable makes W computable.
Có thể phá vỡ một phần. Ruminant digestion produces methane by biological process. Feed additives (e.g., 3-NOP) can reduce but not eliminate enteric methane.
a: Report môi trường violations to EPA Ireland
Document water pollution from dairy — report to local authority water services
Use Irish Protected Disclosures Act 2014 for protected reporting
Kerry Group, Glanbia, Ornua: Set binding methane reduction targets
Đầu tư vào methane-reducing feed technologies
Áp dụng Science Based Targets for Irish dairy operations
DAFM: Cải cách agricultural supports toward phát thải reduction
EPA: Tăng cường agricultural phát thải monitoring
Bord Bia: Make Origin Green data independently verifiable
Liên hệ đại biểu của bạn TD (Teachta Dála) or Senator để yêu cầu binding agricultural phát thải reduction targets
Support stronger EU CAP conditionality on methane
Advocate for inclusion of agricultural methane in EU ETS
Thúc đẩy Ireland's Climate Action Plan sectoral phát thải ceilings to be enforced
i: EPA (Environmental Protection Agency) — Ireland's môi trường regulator. Protected Disclosures Act 2014 (amended 2022) — Ireland's người tố giác protection law, one of the strongest in Europe.

Kerry Group — major food ingredients company. Glanbia — dairy and nutrition company. Ornua (formerly Irish Dairy Board) — manages Kerrygold brand. Teagasc — the agriculture and food development authority providing research and extension.
DAFM (Department of Agriculture, Food and the Marine) — Ireland's agriculture ministry. Bord Bia (Irish Food Board) — the food marketing agency running the Origin Green sustainability program.

Oireachtas (Parliament of Ireland) — bicameral: Dáil Éireann (160 TDs) and Seanad Éireann (60 Senators). Contact through oireachtas.ie. Ireland's Climate Action and Low Carbon Phát triểnment Act (2021) sets legally binding phát thải budgets.

IL.s: High-tech nền kinh tế ($540.4B GDP) with dominant services (72.5% GDP). High military expenditure (8.78% GDP). Gas production from Leviathan and Tamar fields (0.43% gas rents). Major tech sector — 'Startup Nation.' Water management leader (desalination, drip irrigation).

sectors.w: Israel's Mediterranean gas fields (Leviathan, Tamar) were discovered in 2009-2010. Per-field phát thải disclosure through ISA (Israel Securities Authority) listed company requirements makes W computable from production data.
bp: Export gas to replace coal in Egypt and Jordan — net phát thải benefit if displacing higher-carbon sources. But this locks in gas infrastructure. Khi renewable alternatives become cheaper for regional electricity, the lợi ích chồng chéo suy yếu.
Mandatory theo từng mỏ phát thải disclosure for Leviathan and Tamar operators. ISA reporting requirements provide the mechanism to make W computable.
Không thể phá vỡ by policy alone. Gas combustion releases CO₂.
a: Report môi trường violations to the Ministry of Environmental Protection
Document offshore phát thải — report through Delek/Chevron compliance channels
Báo cáo cho ISA if ESG disclosures are misleading
NewMed Energy (formerly Delek Drilling), Chevron: Set phát thải reduction targets for Leviathan and Tamar
Đầu tư vào regional năng lượng tái tạo integration
Áp dụng TCFD-aligned disclosure
Petroleum Commissioner: Require theo từng mỏ phát thải monitoring
Electricity Authority: Accelerate năng lượng tái tạo targets (Israel aims for 30% renewable by 2030)
Ministry of Environmental Protection: Tăng cường offshore môi trường standards
Liên hệ đại biểu của bạn member of the Knesset để yêu cầu binding năng lượng tái tạo targets and gas phát thải disclosure
Support regional energy cooperation through the Eastern Mediterranean Gas Forum (EMGF)
Advocate for Abraham Accords normalization to include năng lượng tái tạo cooperation with Gulf states
Thúc đẩy OECD môi trường performance review recommendations implementation
i: Ministry of Environmental Protection — Israel's cơ quan môi trường. ISA (Israel Securities Authority) — regulates disclosure for listed companies including Delek Group. Israel has người tố giác protections under the Protection of Workers (Exposure of Offenses) Law, 1997.
NewMed Energy — operates Leviathan field. Chevron — acquired Noble Energy's interest in Tamar. Israel Natural Gas Lines (INGL) — the nhà nước gas transmission company.

Petroleum Commissioner — within the Ministry of Energy, oversees oil and gas licensing. Electricity Authority — the independent electricity regulator. Israel's Electricity Market Cải cách aims to increase competition and renewable penetration.

Knesset (כנסת) — Israel's unicameral parliament, 120 members. Contact through knesset.gov.il. Israel is an OECD member. EMGF (Eastern Mediterranean Gas Forum) — regional organization for gas market coordination.

IQ.s: Oil-dependent nền kinh tế ($279.6B GDP) with 43.45% combined oil and gas rents — one of the world's highest. OPEC member producing ~4.5M bpd. Massive gas flaring (Iraq flares more gas than almost any other country). Post-conflict reconstruction ongoing.

sectors.w: Iraq flares $2.5B+ worth of associated gas annually. Capturing and monetizing flared gas makes W computable — the flared gas represents pure waste visible from satellite (World Bank GGFR data).
bp: Gas capture and monetization. Iraq wastes $2.5B/year in flared gas. Khi gas capture infrastructure is built, lợi ích chồng chéo trong flaring (which is cheaper short-term than processing) breaks as captured gas generates revenue.
Satellite-based flare monitoring (VIIRS nightfire data) already makes gas flaring volumes visible globally. Linking theo từng mỏ flaring data to production revenue makes W computable.
Không thể phá vỡ. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂.
a: Report môi trường violations through international operator compliance channels (BP, TotalEnergies, ExxonMobil)
Document gas flaring volumes — satellite data from World Bank GGFR provides independent verification
Report through Iraq EITI channels
BP (Rumaila), TotalEnergies (Halfaya), ExxonMobil (West Qurna): Đầu tư vào associated gas capture infrastructure
Thực hiện flare reduction targets
SOMO (State Organization for Marketing of Oil): Áp dụng phát thải disclosure standards
Ministry of Oil: Thực thi gas flaring reduction targets in Technical Service Contracts
Ministry of Environment: Tăng cường air quality enforcement near oil fields
EITI Iraq: Expand reporting to include flaring and phát thải data
Support World Bank GGFR zero routine flaring by 2030 initiative for Iraq
Vận động qua OPEC for managed transition and gas monetization investment
Thúc đẩy international climate finance for gas capture infrastructure
Support UN Iraq partnership on môi trường governance capacity building
i: Note: Iraq's institutional capacity for môi trường regulation is limited. The Ministry of Oil oversees petroleum operations. EITI Iraq — Iraq has been EITI compliant since 2012. World Bank Global Gas Flaring Reduction Partnership (GGFR) — monitors and reports on global gas flaring using satellite data.

BP operates Rumaila (Iraq's largest field). TotalEnergies has the $27B Gas Growth Integrated Project (GGIP) to capture associated gas. ExxonMobil, Lukoil, PetroChina — other major operators. Basra Oil Company — manages southern oil fields.

Ministry of Oil — oversees all petroleum operations and manages Technical Service Contracts (TSCs) with international operators. Ministry of Environment — responsible for môi trường policy but severely under-resourced.

Note: Iraq is a nghị viện dân chủ but governance is fragmented among sectarian and ethnic power blocs. Council of Representatives (Majlis al-Nuwab, 329 members). International channels: OPEC membership, World Bank, UNAMI (UN Assistance Mission for Iraq), GGFR.

IR.s: Major oil and gas producer ($475.3B GDP) with 27.08% combined rents. World's second-largest natural gas reserves (after Russia). Under comprehensive international trừng phạt. Sản xuất ở mức 20.6% GDP. Theocratic governance limits civic channels.

sectors.w: International trừng phạt have already weakened the lợi ích chồng chéo by restricting Iran's ability to monetize oil exports at market price. Khi trừng phạt enforcement eliminates the discount market, Iran's economic model requires diversification.
bp: Sanctions enforcement. Khi Iran cannot sell oil at market prices, the economic case for năng lượng tái tạo investment (Iran has excellent solar potential) strengthens. The lợi ích chồng chéo in oil dependence breaks when export revenues are structurally constrained.
Per-field môi trường data is largely unavailable due to trừng phạt-related opacity. International satellite monitoring (methane detection) provides external data to estimate W.
Không thể phá vỡ. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂.
a: Report môi trường violations to DoE (Department of Environment)
Document air pollution and health impacts — Iran's cities rank among the world's most polluted
Report through international academic and research channels
NIOC: Reduce gas flaring and venting at production facilities
Đầu tư vào domestic solar and wind energy development
Thực hiện phát thải monitoring for major fields
Ministry of Petroleum: Thực hiện flaring reduction programs
DoE: Tăng cường air quality enforcement in Tehran and major cities
Ministry of Energy: Accelerate năng lượng tái tạo development
Support international climate cooperation mechanisms that include Iran
Vận động qua OPEC for managed transition planning
Thúc đẩy môi trường conditionality in any future trừng phạt relief negotiations
Support Iranian diaspora môi trường advocacy organizations
i: DoE (سازمان حفاظت محیط زیست / Department of Environment) — Iran's cơ quan môi trường, which has limited enforcement power. NIOC (National Iranian Oil Company) — the state oil company. Note: Iran has no effective người tố giác protection. Civil society is severely constrained.

NIOC — controls all upstream oil and gas operations. NIGC (National Iranian Gas Company) — manages gas production and distribution. Pars Oil and Gas Company — manages South Pars/North Dome gas field operations.

Ministry of Petroleum — oversees oil and gas policy. Iran's Renewable Energy and Energy Efficiency Organization (SATBA) — responsible for năng lượng tái tạo development. Iran has installed some solar and wind capacity but it remains a tiny fraction of energy supply.

Note: Iran is a theocratic republic. The Islamic Consultative Assembly (Majles, 290 members) has limited power relative to the Supreme Leader and Guardian Council. International channels: OPEC, UNFCCC (Iran signed but did not ratify Paris Agreement), UN Environment Programme.

IS.s: Small advanced nền kinh tế ($33.3B GDP) with 100% renewable electricity (geothermal and hydro). Thủy sản are 5% of GDP and the largest PST exposure — Iceland's fisheries management is globally studied but faces sustainability challenges from ocean warming.

sectors.w: Iceland's ITQ (Individual Transferable Quota) system generates detailed per-vessel catch data. Khi ecosystem health metrics (stock assessments, bycatch, seabed impact) are published alongside fishing revenue, W trở nên có thể tính được.
bp: Cải cách ITQ allocations to include ecosystem impact costs. Khi quota holders pay for bycatch and seabed damage, lợi ích chồng chéo trong maximum extraction suy yếu.
Publish per-vessel ecosystem impact data alongside catch revenue. Iceland's Marine and Freshwater Research Institute already conducts stock assessments — linking to economic data makes W computable.
Có thể phá vỡ một phần. Fishing inherently removes biomass from marine ecosystems. However, science-based quota management can keep extraction within sustainable yield limits.
a: Report quota violations to Fiskistofa (Directorate of Thủy sản)
Document bycatch or illegal discarding
Use Iceland's người tố giác protections
Samherji, Íslandsbanki: Áp dụng sustainability-linked targets for fishing operations
Thực hiện per-vessel bycatch reduction technology
Support ecosystem-based fisheries management
Ministry of Food, Agriculture and Thủy sản: Cải cách ITQ system to include ecosystem impact costs
Marine Research Institute: Publish ecosystem health indicators alongside quota recommendations
Fiskistofa: Tăng cường monitoring and enforcement
Liên hệ đại biểu của bạn member of the Alþingi để yêu cầu ecosystem-based fisheries management reform
Support NEAFC (North-East Atlantic Thủy sản Commission) sustainable management measures
Advocate for Arctic Council fisheries governance coordination
Thúc đẩy inclusion of ecosystem health metrics in national accounts
i: Fiskistofa (Directorate of Thủy sản) — responsible for fisheries management, quota enforcement, and monitoring. Hafrannsóknastofnun (Marine and Freshwater Research Institute) — conducts stock assessments and marine research.

Samherji — Iceland's largest fishing company. Brim, HB Grandi — other major fishing companies. SFS (Samtök fyrirtækja í sjávarútvegi / Federation of Icelandic Fishing Vessel Owners) — the industry association.

Ministry of Food, Agriculture and Thủy sản — oversees fisheries policy. The ITQ (Individual Transferable Quota) system — Iceland's fisheries management system, one of the world's most studied, allocating catch shares that can be traded.

Alþingi (Althing) — Iceland's unicameral parliament, 63 members, one of the world's oldest legislatures (established 930 CE). Contact through althingi.is. NEAFC — the regional fisheries management organization for the Northeast Atlantic.

JG.s: British Crown Dependencies ($12.5B GDP) — Jersey and Guernsey. Major offshore financial centers (91.2% services). Financial services dominate with significant fund administration and trust structures. Not part of the UK or EU but closely aligned with UK regulatory standards.

sectors.w: Channel Islands' financial services facilitate global capital flows with lower minh bạch than UK mainland. Khi beneficial ownership data and tax minh bạch information are published, W trở nên có thể tính được from financial intermediation data.
bp: Full beneficial ownership minh bạch aligned with UK Economic Crime Act requirements. Khi financial secrecy is eliminated, the lợi ích chồng chéo between service providers and opacity-seeking clients suy yếu.
Mandatory CRS (Common Reporting Standard) enhanced reporting. Publishing aggregate capital flow data makes W computable.
Có thể phá vỡ một phần. Financial intermediation can relocate but the Channel Islands' proximity to London and established legal infrastructure create switching costs.
a: Report suspicious transactions to JFIU (Joint Financial Intelligence Unit) in Jersey or FIS (Financial Intelligence Service) in Guernsey
Document regulatory violations — report to JFSC or GFSC
Report through internal bank compliance channels
Thực hiện enhanced beneficial ownership due diligence
Áp dụng ESG integration across fund and trust structures
Align with UK minh bạch standards ahead of regulatory mandates
JFSC/GFSC: Tăng cường beneficial ownership verification
Thực hiện UK Economic Crime Act-aligned minh bạch
Thực thi enhanced AML due diligence requirements
Engage through UK Parliament channels — the Crown Dependencies' constitutional relationship means the UK Parliament has ultimate legislative authority
Support OECD Global Forum on Transparency standards
Advocate for Moneyval enhanced evaluation compliance
Thúc đẩy alignment with EU AMLD standards
i: JFSC (Jersey Dịch vụ Tài chính Commission) — Jersey's financial regulator. GFSC (Guernsey Dịch vụ Tài chính Commission) — Guernsey's financial regulator. JFIU / FIS — financial intelligence units.
Channel Islands host operations of major international banks and fund administrators. Jersey Finance and Guernsey Finance promote the financial services sectors.
JFSC — Jersey's integrated financial regulator. GFSC — Guernsey's equivalent. Both crown dependencies have their own regulatory frameworks but coordinate closely with UK authorities.

States of Jersey (49 members) and States of Guernsey (38 members) — the insular legislatures. Constitutional relationship with UK means UK Parliament can legislate for the Crown Dependencies on international obligations.

JM.s: Caribbean island nền kinh tế ($22B GDP) with tourism and services dominant (60% GDP). Nông nghiệp ở mức 8% GDP. Bauxite/alumina industry historically significant but declining. Climate-vulnerable. High debt burden (IMF structural adjustment).

sectors.w: Jamaica's agricultural sector is dominated by sugar and banana monoculture on degraded soils. Khi soil health and watershed degradation data is published alongside agricultural output, W trở nên có thể tính được.
bp: Cải cách agricultural subsidies toward crop diversification and agroforestry. Khi farmers receive support for diverse crops rather than monoculture sugar, the lợi ích chồng chéo breaks.
Publish watershed health and soil erosion data linked to agricultural practices. NEPA collects môi trường data — linking to farming output makes W computable.
Có thể phá vỡ một phần. Tropical monoculture inherently degrades soil. Jamaica's Blue Mountain coffee model shows premium diversification is viable.
a: Report môi trường violations to NEPA (National Environment and Planning Agency)
Document agricultural chemical misuse — report to RADA (Rural Agricultural Phát triểnment Authority)
Report through industry self-regulation channels
Sugar Company of Jamaica Holdings: Diversify beyond sugar monoculture
Đầu tư vào specialty crop development (Blue Mountain coffee, cocoa)
Áp dụng soil health monitoring
Ministry of Agriculture: Cải cách subsidy structure toward diversification
NEPA: Tăng cường watershed protection enforcement
SIA (Sugar Industry Authority): Support sugar industry transition
Liên hệ đại biểu của bạn Member of Parliament in the House of Representatives or Senator để yêu cầu agricultural diversification support
Support CARICOM agricultural resilience initiatives
Advocate for climate adaptation finance for Caribbean agriculture
Thúc đẩy debt-for-nature swaps
i: NEPA (National Environment and Planning Agency) — Jamaica's cơ quan môi trường. RADA — provides agricultural extension services.
Sugar Industry Authority — regulates Jamaica's sugar sector. Jamaica Producers Group — diversified agricultural company.
Ministry of Agriculture and Thủy sản — oversees agricultural policy. SIA — regulates the sugar industry.
Parliament of Jamaica — bicameral: House of Representatives (63 members) and Senate (21 appointed). Jamaica is a Westminster-style nghị viện dân chủ.

JO.s: Water-scarce Middle Eastern nền kinh tế ($53.4B GDP) with limited natural resources. Dịch vụ ở mức 60.4% GDP. High military expenditure (4.8% GDP). Sản xuất ở mức 17.7% (phosphate, potash, pharmaceuticals). Among the world's most water-stressed countries.

sectors.w: Jordan's phosphate and potash khai thác mỏ (Arab Potash Company, Jordan Phosphate Mines Company) depletes Dead Sea water levels and contaminates groundwater. Khi môi trường cost data is published alongside khai thác mỏ revenue, W trở nên có thể tính được.
bp: Internalize môi trường costs (Dead Sea decline, water depletion) into khai thác mỏ operations through môi trường levies. Khi miners pay for water extraction in one of Earth's most water-stressed countries, lợi ích chồng chéo trong water-intensive extraction suy yếu.
Publish theo từng mỏ water consumption and Dead Sea level impact data. Jordan's water authority collects data — linking to khai thác mỏ output makes W computable.
Có thể phá vỡ một phần. Mining inherently uses water. However, water recycling and dry processing can reduce per-ton water consumption.
a: Report môi trường violations to the Ministry of Environment
Document water extraction impacts — report to WAJ (Water Authority of Jordan)
Report through JPMC or APC compliance channels
JPMC (Jordan Phosphate Mines Company): Thực hiện water recycling targets
APC (Arab Potash Company): Áp dụng Dead Sea impact mitigation measures
Both: Áp dụng per-unit môi trường impact reporting
Ministry of Energy: Integrate môi trường costs into khai thác mỏ royalty calculations
WAJ: Thực thi water extraction limits for khai thác mỏ operations
ASEZA (Aqaba Special Economic Zone): Apply môi trường standards to industrial activities
Liên hệ đại biểu của bạn member of the Majlis al-Nuwab (House of Representatives) để yêu cầu water conservation requirements for khai thác mỏ
Support Red Sea-Dead Sea Canal alternatives for Dead Sea stabilization
Vận động qua World Bank for môi trường governance of Dead Sea
Thúc đẩy OECD water governance recommendations implementation
i: Ministry of Environment — Jordan's cơ quan môi trường. WAJ (Water Authority of Jordan) — manages the country's severely limited water resources. Jordan has approximately 60 cubic meters of renewable water per capita — far below the 500 m³ threshold for absolute water scarcity.
JPMC — one of the world's largest phosphate producers. APC (Arab Potash Company) — extracts potash from the Dead Sea.
Ministry of Energy and Mineral Resources — oversees khai thác mỏ policy. NRA (Natural Resources Authority) — the khai thác mỏ regulatory body.

Majlis al-Umma (Parliament of Jordan) — bicameral: Majlis al-Nuwab (House of Representatives, 130 members, elected) and Majlis al-Ayan (Senate, 65 appointed). Jordan is a quân chủ lập hiến with limited democratic space.

KE.s: East Africa's largest nền kinh tế ($120.3B GDP) with agriculture at 22.5% GDP (tea, coffee, horticulture). Dịch vụ ở mức 55.3%. 90%+ renewable electricity (geothermal, hydro). Vibrant tech sector (M-Pesa). Wildlife tourism. Climate-vulnerable (drought cycles).

sectors.w: Kenya's tea and horticulture sectors use intensive farming on shrinking arable land. Khi per-farm water and pesticide data is published alongside export revenue, W trở nên có thể tính được. Kenya's M-Pesa infrastructure enables farm-level data collection.
bp: Cải cách agricultural export incentives to require môi trường certification. Khi tea and flower exports must demonstrate sustainable water and pesticide use, lợi ích chồng chéo trong intensive monoculture suy yếu.
Farm-level môi trường data collection using mobile technology (Kenya's digital infrastructure is advanced). Making water and chemical use visible per farm makes W computable.
Có thể phá vỡ một phần. Intensive horticulture inherently affects water and soil systems. However, Kenya's organic agriculture sector is growing and agroforestry can reduce sự phụ thuộc hệ thống.
a: Report môi trường violations to NEMA (National Environment Management Authority)
Document water pollution from flower farms — report to WRA (Water Resources Authority)
Report pesticide violations to PCPB (Pest Control Products Board)
KTDA (Kenya Tea Phát triểnment Agency): Áp dụng Rainforest Alliance certification across all smallholder operations
KFC (Kenya Flower Council): Tăng cường môi trường standards for cut flower production
Đầu tư vào water-efficient irrigation technology
Ministry of Agriculture: Cải cách agricultural incentives toward climate-resilient farming
NEMA: Tăng cường môi trường monitoring in intensive horticulture zones
AFA (Agriculture and Food Authority): Integrate môi trường standards into crop certification
Liên hệ đại biểu của bạn Member of Parliament in the National Assembly or Senator để yêu cầu môi trường certification for agricultural exports
Support African Union Comprehensive Africa Agriculture Phát triểnment Programme (CAADP) sustainability targets
Advocate for EU Green Deal recognition of Kenyan sustainability certifications
Thúc đẩy climate adaptation finance for Kenyan smallholder agriculture
i: NEMA (National Environment Management Authority) — Kenya's môi trường regulator, responsible for môi trường impact assessments, pollution control, and enforcement. WRA (Water Resources Authority) — manages water resources allocation and monitoring. PCPB (Pest Control Products Board) — regulates pesticide registration and use.

KTDA — manages tea production for ~600,000 smallholder farmers. KFC (Kenya Flower Council) — the self-regulatory body for the cut flower industry. Unilever (Lipton/Ekaterra) — major buyer of Kenyan tea.
Ministry of Agriculture, Livestock, Thủy sản and Cooperatives — oversees agricultural policy. AFA — regulates agricultural commodities including tea, coffee, and horticultural products.

Parliament of Kenya — bicameral: National Assembly (349 members) and Senate (67 members). Contact through parliament.go.ke. Kenya's 2010 Constitution includes strong môi trường protection provisions (Article 42 — right to a clean and healthy environment).

KG.s: Small mountainous nền kinh tế ($17.5B GDP) dominated by gold khai thác mỏ (Kumtor mine = 10%+ of GDP, min=11.15%). Nông nghiệp ở mức 8.6% GDP. Remittances from Russia significant. Parliamentary dân chủ (rare in Central Asia).

sectors.w: Kumtor gold mine (Centerra Gold, now nationalized) operates near glaciers — tailings and cyanide contamination affect water systems. Khi môi trường monitoring data is published, W trở nên có thể tính được.
bp: Environmental bonds and community benefit agreements for all khai thác mỏ. Khi remediation costs are internalized, marginal mines become unprofitable.
Per-mine water quality and glacier impact monitoring published openly. Making môi trường costs visible makes W computable.
Có thể phá vỡ một phần. Mining at high altitude inherently affects glacial systems. Improved tailings management can reduce impact.
a: Báo cáo cho SAEPF (State Agency on Environmental Protection and Forestry)
Document water contamination near Kumtor
Report through Kyrgyzaltyn channels
Kyrgyzaltyn: Thực hiện international tailings management standards at Kumtor
Áp dụng EITI enhanced reporting
Đầu tư vào mine rehabilitation
State Committee for Industry: Tăng cường môi trường licensing
SAEPF: Increase monitoring capacity
EITI: Expand to môi trường data
Liên hệ đại biểu của bạn deputy in the Jogorku Kenesh để yêu cầu môi trường standards for khai thác mỏ
Support EITI enhanced reporting
Advocate for Central Asian regional water governance coordination
i: SAEPF — môi trường agency. Kyrgyzaltyn — state gold company that took over Kumtor in 2022.
Kyrgyzaltyn — manages state khai thác mỏ interests. EITI Kyrgyz Republic — member since 2004.
State Committee for Industry, Energy and Subsoil Use — khai thác mỏ regulator.
Jogorku Kenesh (Supreme Council) — unicameral parliament, 90 members. Kyrgyzstan is Central Asia's most democratic country.

KH.s: Lower-middle-income nền kinh tế ($46.4B GDP) with garment manufacturing (27.8% GDP) and agriculture (16.6%). Mekong Delta phá rừng ongoing. Authoritarian governance under Hun Manet (succeeded Hun Sen in 2023).

sectors.w: Cambodia lost 25%+ of tree cover since 2000 — economic land concessions for rubber and sugar monoculture are primary drivers. Satellite monitoring makes phá rừng computable.
bp: Cải cách economic land concession system to require môi trường compliance. Khi concession holders face revocation for phá rừng, the lợi ích chồng chéo suy yếu.
Satellite-based forest monitoring (Global Forest Watch already tracks Cambodia extensively) linked to concession data makes W computable.
Có thể phá vỡ một phần. Monoculture inherently reduces biodiversity. Community-managed forests demonstrate alternative models.
a: Report illegal logging to international monitoring organizations (Global Witness, LICADHO)
Document land grabbing — report through international accountability mechanisms
Báo cáo cho FAO and development partner channels
Concession holders: Thực hiện zero-phá rừng commitments
International buyers: Require supply chain traceability for Cambodian rubber and sugar
Áp dụng RSPO/equivalent certification
Ministry of Agriculture: Cải cách economic land concession môi trường conditions
Ministry of Environment: Thực thi protected area boundaries
Forestry Administration: Tăng cường community forestry programs
Vận động qua ASEAN for regional phá rừng governance
Support EU EBA (Everything But Arms) trade preference conditionality on human rights and môi trường standards
Thúc đẩy Mekong River Commission môi trường standards enforcement
Support international accountability mechanisms for land concession abuses
i: Note: Cambodia under CPP governance severely restricts xã hội dân sự. LICADHO (Cambodian League for the Promotion and Defence of Human Rights) — one of the few remaining domestic human rights organizations. Global Witness has documented illegal logging and land concession abuses.

Major economic land concessions are held by politically connected companies and foreign investors (Chinese, Vietnamese, Thai companies). The garment sector (H&M, Gap supply chains) has môi trường certification requirements.

Ministry of Agriculture, Forestry and Thủy sản — oversees agricultural and forestry policy. Ministry of Environment — manages protected areas. Sub-Decree 146 on Economic Land Concessions governs the ELC system.

Note: Cambodia's National Assembly (125 members) is dominated by the CPP. The Senate (62 members) is similarly controlled. International channels: ASEAN, Mekong River Commission, EU EBA trade preferences (EU has partially withdrawn preferences citing human rights concerns).

KW.s: Wealthy petrostate ($160.2B GDP) with 29.28% combined oil and gas rents. Kuwait Petroleum Corporation (KPC) manages all oil operations. Kuwait Investment Authority (KIA) is one of the world's oldest sovereign wealth funds. Constitutional monarchy with elected parliament.

sectors.w: Kuwait's Burgan oil field (world's second-largest) is mature. As production costs rise, the lợi ích chồng chéo suy yếu. KIA sovereign wealth provides a diversification mechanism.
bp: KIA investment diversification away from fossil fuels. Khi the sovereign wealth fund's returns from non-oil investments exceed declining oil returns, lợi ích chồng chéo trong oil dependence breaks.
Per-field phát thải disclosure for KPC operations. Making môi trường costs visible makes W computable.
Không thể phá vỡ. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂.
a: Report môi trường violations to EPA Kuwait
Report through KPC internal channels
Báo cáo cho State Audit Bureau
KPC: Phát triển năng lượng tái tạo division
KIA: Áp dụng ESG investment criteria
Thực hiện phát thải reduction targets
Supreme Petroleum Council: Require phát thải disclosure
EPA: Tăng cường môi trường standards
CBK: Integrate climate risk into financial supervision
Liên hệ đại biểu của bạn member of the Majlis al-Umma (National Assembly, 50 elected members) để yêu cầu sovereign wealth diversification and phát thải minh bạch
Vận động qua GCC for regional energy transition coordination
Support OPEC+ managed transition planning
Thúc đẩy IRENA recommendations on Gulf state energy transition
i: EPA Kuwait (Environment Public Authority) — the môi trường regulator. KPC (Kuwait Petroleum Corporation) — the state oil company managing all upstream and downstream operations. State Audit Bureau — conducts financial oversight.
KPC — manages Kuwait's entire petroleum value chain. KIA (Kuwait Investment Authority) — sovereign wealth fund, one of the world's largest.
Supreme Petroleum Council — the supreme decision-making body for oil policy. CBK (Central Bank of Kuwait) — the financial regulator.
Majlis al-Umma (National Assembly) — 50 elected members, one of the most active parliaments in the Gulf. Kuwait is a quân chủ lập hiến with genuine (if limited) nghị viện debate on oil policy.

KZ.s: Central Asia's largest nền kinh tế ($291.5B GDP) with massive oil (14.84%) and gas (2.04%) rents. Tengiz, Kashagan, and Karachaganak are mega-fields. Mining at 9.1% (uranium — world's largest producer, copper, gold). Coal at 0.85%. Authoritarian governance.

sectors.w: Kazakhstan's Kashagan field has suffered repeated delays and môi trường incidents (H₂S — hydrogen sulfide). Environmental monitoring of H₂S phát thải and Caspian Sea impact makes W computable from production data.
bp: Redirect National Fund (sovereign wealth) investment toward economic diversification. Khi non-oil sectors grow faster than depleting oil revenue, lợi ích chồng chéo trong continued extraction breaks.
Per-field phát thải and môi trường monitoring disclosure (particularly H₂S at Kashagan). Making môi trường and health costs visible makes W computable.
Không thể phá vỡ. Hydrocarbon extraction and combustion release CO₂ and H₂S.
a: Báo cáo cho Ministry of Ecology and Natural Resources
Report through Chevron/Shell/ExxonMobil compliance channels (major Tengiz/Kashagan partners)
Báo cáo cho EITI Kazakhstan
KazMunayGas: Phát triển transition plan with renewable targets
NCOC (Kashagan), TCO (Tengiz): Thực hiện H₂S management and phát thải reduction
Áp dụng TCFD reporting
Ministry of Energy: Tăng cường môi trường conditions in production sharing agreements
EITI Kazakhstan: Expand reporting to môi trường data
Samruk-Kazyna (sovereign wealth fund): Áp dụng ESG investment criteria
Vận động qua Tehran Convention for Caspian Sea môi trường protection
Support EITI enhanced reporting
Thúc đẩy Central Asian regional energy transition coordination
Leverage Kazakhstan's OSCE chairmanship legacy for môi trường governance
i: Ministry of Ecology and Natural Resources — cơ quan môi trường. KazMunayGas — the national oil company. EITI Kazakhstan — member since 2007. Note: Civil society space is severely constrained.

NCOC (North Caspian Operating Company) — manages Kashagan (Shell, TotalEnergies, Eni, ExxonMobil, KMG, CNPC, Inpex). TCO (Tengizchevroil) — manages Tengiz (Chevron 50%, ExxonMobil 25%, KMG 20%, Lukoil 5%).

Ministry of Energy — oversees oil, gas, and energy policy. Samruk-Kazyna — the national wealth fund holding state shares in KazMunayGas and other state enterprises. National Fund of the Republic of Kazakhstan — the sovereign wealth fund (managed by the National Bank) with $55B+ in assets.

Note: Kazakhstan under President Tokayev is rated 'Not Free.' The Mazhilis (lower house, 107 members) and Senate (50 members) do not function independently. International channels: EITI, Tehran Convention (Caspian môi trường cooperation), SCO (Shanghai Cooperation Organisation), OSCE.

LA.s: Landlocked Southeast Asian nền kinh tế ($16.5B GDP) with agriculture at 16.8% GDP and khai thác mỏ at 3.89%. Major hydropower producer (dam exports to Thailand). One-party state. Severe debt crisis ($13B+ external debt, primarily to China).

sectors.w: Laos's khai thác mỏ sector (gold, copper, potash) generates water contamination and community displacement. Khi môi trường monitoring data is published alongside khai thác mỏ revenue, W trở nên có thể tính được.
bp: Environmental bonds for khai thác mỏ licenses. Khi remediation costs are pre-funded, marginal operations become uneconomic.
Per-mine môi trường data disclosure through international operator reporting. Making môi trường costs visible makes W computable.
Có thể phá vỡ một phần. Mining disturbs landscapes but improved management can reduce impact.
a: Report through international khai thác mỏ company compliance channels
Document môi trường impacts through international monitoring organizations
Báo cáo cho MONRE (Ministry of Natural Resources and Environment)
MMG (Sepon mine), PanAust (Phu Kham): Thực hiện international môi trường standards
Áp dụng EITI reporting
Đầu tư vào mine rehabilitation
Ministry of Energy and Mines: Tăng cường môi trường licensing
MONRE: Increase monitoring capacity
Support EITI candidacy
Vận động qua ASEAN for regional khai thác mỏ môi trường standards
Support Mekong River Commission môi trường governance
Thúc đẩy international khai thác mỏ company home-country oversight
Advocate for debt minh bạch and môi trường conditionality in Chinese lending
i: MONRE — Laos's environment ministry. Note: Laos is a nhà nước một đảng (LPRP). No independent xã hội dân sự or media.
Major operators include MMG (China Minmetals subsidiary), PanAust. Lao government holds equity in major mines.
Ministry of Energy and Mines — oversees khai thác mỏ and energy policy. Laos is not yet an EITI member.
Note: National Assembly (164 members) is controlled by LPRP. International channels: ASEAN, Mekong River Commission, Asian Phát triểnment Bank, World Bank.

LB.s: Collapsed nền kinh tế ($20.1B GDP, down from $55B in 2018). Banking sector crisis wiped out savings. Services historically dominated. Political system based on sectarian power-sharing (confessionalism). Multiple concurrent crises — economic, political, refugee.

sectors.w: Lebanon's banking sector collapse (2019-present) represents a PST endgame — the lợi ích chồng chéo has already partially broken through crisis. The remaining PST is in the lack of accountability for banking sector losses.
bp: Banking sector restructuring with full forensic audit of capital outflows. Khi accountability is established for the $72B+ in depositor losses, the lợi ích chồng chéo between banks, politicians, and central bank in opacity breaks.
Publication of forensic audit results (Alvarez & Marsal was contracted but access was blocked). Making the flow of funds visible makes W computable.
Có thể phá vỡ một phần — the crisis has already revealed sự phụ thuộc hệ thống. But without institutional reform, the same dynamics can rebuild.
a: Support the Alvarez & Marsal forensic audit by providing internal bank records
Report capital flight data to the Special Investigation Commission
Ghi nhận qua investigative journalism channels (Lebanon has relatively free press)
Banks: Cooperate fully with forensic audit
Disclose beneficial ownership of related-party lending
Accept bail-in restructuring rather than socializing losses
BDL: Complete the forensic audit of central bank operations
Banking Control Commission: Thực thi capital controls equitably
Ministry of Finance: Thực hiện IMF reform conditions
Vận động qua international mechanisms for completion of the forensic audit
Support IMF program conditionality on banking sector minh bạch
Thúc đẩy international asset recovery of illicitly transferred funds
Support Lebanese xã hội dân sự accountability initiatives
i: SIC (Special Investigation Commission) — Lebanon's financial intelligence unit. BDL (Banque du Liban / Central Bank) — the central bank whose financial engineering scheme is at the center of the crisis. Note: Lebanon has some of the region's strongest press freedom.
ABL (Association of Banks in Lebanon) — represents 60+ banks. BDL — the central bank. Lebanon's banking sector losses are estimated at $72B+.
Banking Control Commission — the banking supervisor. IMF — Lebanon reached a staff-level agreement in 2022 but reforms remain unimplemented.

Note: Lebanon's parliament (128 members, elected on confessional basis) is functional but deeply divided. The political system is paralyzed by sectarian power-sharing. International channels: IMF, World Bank, CEDRE conference donors, French-led international support group.

LK.s: Island nền kinh tế ($99B GDP) recovering from 2022 economic crisis. Nông nghiệp ở mức 8.3% GDP (tea, rubber, coconut). Sản xuất ở mức 17.6% (garments). Tourism significant. Post-crisis IMF program. Historically one of Asia's highest human development indicators.

sectors.w: Sri Lanka's 2021 overnight organic farming mandate (banning chemical fertilizers) demonstrated how agricultural sự phụ thuộc hệ thống works — it caused immediate crop failure. The lesson: gradual transition with data makes W computable.
bp: Gradual agricultural transition with per-farm soil health monitoring (learning from the 2021 failure). Khi transition is evidence-based rather than ideological, lợi ích chồng chéo trong chemical-dependent monoculture suy yếu sustainably.
Per-estate môi trường data for tea, rubber, and coconut published alongside export revenue. Sri Lanka's Tea Research Institute collects data — making it public makes W computable.

Có thể phá vỡ một phần. Sri Lanka's 2021 experiment showed both the reality of sự phụ thuộc hệ thống (sudden decoupling fails) and its reducibility (gradual transition with soil biology rebuilding works).
a: Report pesticide violations to Registrar of Pesticides
Document môi trường degradation — report to CEA (Central Environmental Authority)
Report through Plantation Human Phát triểnment Trust channels
Plantation companies: Đầu tư vào gradual organic transition with soil biology rebuilding
Áp dụng Rainforest Alliance certification
Thực hiện precision agriculture to reduce chemical input dependency

Sri Lanka Tea Board: Integrate sustainability certification into export standards
CEA: Tăng cường watershed monitoring in plantation areas
Liên hệ đại biểu của bạn member of Parliament (Sri Lanka Pārlimēntuva) để yêu cầu evidence-based agricultural transition funding
Support IMF program môi trường conditionality
Advocate for international climate adaptation finance for tea sector transition
Thúc đẩy EU GSP+ trade preference môi trường standards compliance
i: CEA (Central Environmental Authority) — Sri Lanka's môi trường regulator. Registrar of Pesticides — under the Department of Agriculture, regulates pesticide use. Tea Research Institute — conducts research on sustainable tea production.
Major plantation companies: Kelani Valley Plantations, Bogawantalawa Tea Estates. Sri Lanka Tea Board — regulates the tea industry.
Ministry of Agriculture — oversees agricultural policy. Sri Lanka Tea Board — manages quality standards and exports.

Parliament of Sri Lanka (225 members). Contact through parliament.lk. Sri Lanka is a semi-presidential republic. EU GSP+ — Sri Lanka benefits from preferential trade access contingent on human rights and môi trường governance.

LT.s: Baltic EU and Eurozone member ($84.9B GDP). Dịch vụ ở mức 63.6% GDP. Sản xuất ở mức 14% GDP. Achieved energy independence from Russian gas (Klaipėda LNG terminal). Nông nghiệp ở mức 2.6% GDP.

sectors.w: Lithuania's health insurance system (VLK) tracks healthcare costs. Publishing diet-attributable disease costs makes W computable.
bp: EU front-of-pack health labelling implementation.
VLK publication of diet-related healthcare data.
Not fully breakable. Cải cáchulation can reduce sự phụ thuộc hệ thống.
a: Báo cáo cho VMVT (State Food and Veterinary Service)
Use Lithuanian người tố giác law (2018, updated with EU Directive)
Lithuanian food companies: Cải cáchulate UPF products
Áp dụng voluntary front-of-pack labelling
Ministry of Health: Thực hiện mandatory labelling
VMVT: Thực thi marketing standards

Support EU Farm to Fork Strategy
i: VMVT (Valstybinė maisto ir veterinarijos tarnyba) — food and veterinary authority. Lithuania has người tố giác protection since 2018.
Major companies: Vilniaus Pienine, Rokiškio Sūris (dairy).
VLK (Valstybinė ligonių kasa / National Health Insurance Fund) — manages health insurance data.
Seimas (Parliament of Lithuania) — unicameral, 141 members. Contact through lrs.lt.

LU.s: Major EU financial center ($93.3B GDP, highest GDP per capita globally). Dịch vụ ở mức 81.2% GDP. World's second-largest investment fund domicile (after US). EU institutions host. Steel industry legacy (ArcelorMittal).

sectors.w: Luxembourg's investment fund industry manages €5T+ in assets. Khi financed phát thải and beneficial ownership are disclosed, W trở nên có thể tính được from financial intermediation data.
bp: Full EU SFDR and AMLD implementation. Khi fund-level financed phát thải and beneficial ownership are transparent, lợi ích chồng chéo trong opaque financial intermediation suy yếu.
CSSF mandatory ESG disclosure for all Luxembourg-domiciled funds. Making climate impact visible per fund makes W computable.
Có thể phá vỡ một phần. Fund domiciliation can relocate, but Luxembourg's legal infrastructure and EU access create switching costs.
a: Báo cáo cho CSSF (Commission de Surveillance du Secteur Financier)
Báo cáo cho CRF (Financial Intelligence Unit)
Use Luxembourg người tố giác law (2023)
Fund managers: Áp dụng SFDR Article 9 classification where applicable
Thực hiện financed phát thải reporting
Áp dụng Science Based Targets for investment portfolios
CSSF: Tăng cường ESG disclosure enforcement
BCL (Central Bank): Integrate climate risk into financial stability monitoring
Thực hiện EU Green Taxonomy alignment requirements

Support EU-wide beneficial ownership registry interconnection
Advocate for OECD BEPS enforcement
Thúc đẩy Luxembourg Green Bond Framework expansion
i: CSSF — Luxembourg's financial regulator, supervising banks, investment funds, and other financial entities. CRF (Cellule de Renseignement Financier) — financial intelligence unit.
Luxembourg hosts 3,600+ investment funds. ALFI (Association of the Luxembourg Fund Industry) — the industry association.
CSSF — conducts supervision of the fund industry. BCL (Banque centrale du Luxembourg) — participates in ECB monetary policy and macroprudential supervision.
Chambre des Députés — unicameral parliament, 60 members. Contact through chd.lu. Luxembourg was instrumental in establishing the EU Green Bond Standard and hosts the Luxembourg Green Exchange.

LV.s: Baltic EU and Eurozone member ($43.7B GDP). Dịch vụ ở mức 64.6% GDP. Forestry significant. Nông nghiệp ở mức 4% GDP. Post-Soviet economic transformation. NATO member.

sectors.w: Latvia's NVD health insurance tracks costs. Publishing diet-related data makes W computable.
bp: EU front-of-pack labelling.
NVD diet-related healthcare cost publication.
Cải cáchulation mandates reduce sự phụ thuộc hệ thống.
a: Báo cáo cho PVD (Food and Veterinary Service)
Use Latvian người tố giác law (2022)
Latvian food companies: Cải cáchulate products
Áp dụng voluntary labelling
Ministry of Health: Thực hiện labelling
PVD: Thực thi standards
NVD: Publish health data

Support EU Farm to Fork
i: PVD (Pārtikas un veterinārais dienests) — food and veterinary authority. Latvia transposed EU Whistleblower Directive in 2022.
Major companies: Rīgas Piena kombināts, Latvijas Balzams.
NVD (Nacionālais veselības dienests / National Health Service) — manages health insurance.
Saeima — unicameral parliament, 100 members. Contact through saeima.lv.

LY.s: Oil-dependent fragile state ($48.5B GDP) with 60.96% combined oil and gas rents — one of the world's highest. NOC (National Oil Corporation) manages production (~1.2M bpd when not disrupted). Divided governance (Tripoli vs. eastern-based authorities). Ongoing instability since 2011.

sectors.w: Libya's oil production is repeatedly disrupted by factional conflict (fields and export terminals seized as bargaining chips). The lợi ích chồng chéo is already partially broken by instability — production is not reliably monetizable.
bp: Governance reform that depoliticizes oil revenue distribution. Khi oil revenue is managed through transparent, rules-based mechanisms (rather than factional control), lợi ích chồng chéo trong capturing oil infrastructure suy yếu.
NOC theo từng mỏ production and revenue data disclosure. The Libyan Audit Bureau provides some oversight — extending to môi trường data makes W computable.
Không thể phá vỡ. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂.
a: Report through NOC internal channels
Provide data to international monitoring (UN Panel of Experts on Libya)
Báo cáo cho Libyan Audit Bureau
NOC: Maintain operational independence from factional politics
International partners (Eni, TotalEnergies, Repsol): Apply global ESG standards to Libyan operations
Thực hiện phát thải monitoring
NOC: Thực hiện transparent revenue management
CBL (Central Bank of Libya): Unify financial management of oil revenues
Audit Bureau: Expand môi trường auditing
Support UN-facilitated governance dialogue including oil revenue-sharing framework
Vận động qua African Union for stabilization with môi trường governance
Thúc đẩy international monitoring of Libyan oil revenue flows
Support EITI candidacy for Libya as part of governance reform
i: NOC (National Oil Corporation) — manages Libya's oil sector. Libyan Audit Bureau — provides financial oversight. UN Panel of Experts on Libya — monitors trừng phạt compliance and resource governance.
NOC — the national oil company operating most production. Eni, TotalEnergies, Repsol, ConocoPhillips — major international operators.
CBL (Central Bank of Libya) — manages oil revenue. The division of the CBL between Tripoli and eastern-based institutions has complicated revenue management.

Note: Libya has no functioning unified government or elected legislature. The House of Representatives (Tobruk) and High Council of State (Tripoli) are rival bodies. International channels: UN Support Mission in Libya (UNSMIL), African Union, Arab League.

MA.s: North African nền kinh tế ($160.6B GDP) with agriculture at 10.6% GDP and growing năng lượng tái tạo sector (Noor-Ouarzazate solar complex). Major phosphate producer (OCP Group — world's largest). Sản xuất ở mức 15.3% GDP.

sectors.w: Morocco controls 70%+ of global phosphate reserves (OCP Group). Phosphate khai thác mỏ generates cadmium-contaminated waste and depletes water in arid regions. Khi theo từng mỏ môi trường data is published alongside production revenue, W trở nên có thể tính được.
bp: Internalize water and cadmium remediation costs into phosphate pricing. Khi OCP pays for water depletion in already water-stressed regions, lợi ích chồng chéo trong low-cost extraction suy yếu.

Mandatory theo từng mỏ môi trường disclosure (water use, cadmium levels, waste volumes). OCP already publishes sustainability reports — extending to independently verifiable theo từng mỏ data makes W computable.
Có thể phá vỡ một phần. Phosphate rock inherently contains cadmium. However, cadmium removal technologies exist and can reduce sự phụ thuộc hệ thống.
a: Báo cáo cho the Secrétariat d'État chargé du Développement Durable
Document water impacts — report to ABH (Agence du Bassin Hydraulique)
Report through OCP compliance channels
OCP: Expand water recycling and desalination for khai thác mỏ operations
Đầu tư vào cadmium removal technology
Áp dụng theo từng mỏ môi trường impact reporting
Ministry of Energy and Mines: Tăng cường môi trường licensing for phosphate operations
ONEE (Office National de l'Électricité et de l'Eau Potable): Monitor water impacts
Department of Environment: Thực thi cadmium disposal standards
Liên hệ đại biểu của bạn member of the Chambre des Représentants để yêu cầu water-neutral khai thác mỏ requirements
Support African Fertilizer and Soil Health Summit commitments on sustainable phosphate use
Vận động qua Union for the Mediterranean for môi trường standards
Thúc đẩy international cadmium limits in fertilizer trade (Codex Alimentarius)
i: Secrétariat d'État chargé du Développement Durable — oversees môi trường policy. ABH — river basin agencies managing water resources. OCP Group — the nhà nước phosphate company, one of Morocco's largest employers.

OCP Group (Office Chérifien des Phosphates) — nhà nước, controls ~30% of global phosphate trade. OCP has invested heavily in sustainability initiatives including the Mohammed VI Polytechnic University.
Ministry of Energy, Mines and Environment — oversees khai thác mỏ and môi trường policy. ONEE — manages water supply infrastructure.
Parlement du Maroc — bicameral: Chambre des Représentants (395 members) and Chambre des Conseillers (120 members). Morocco is a quân chủ lập hiến with an elected parliament.

MC.s: City-state ($11.1B GDP) with 87.2% services. Major financial center and tourism hub. No income tax for individuals. World's highest GDP per capita and population density. Limited PST exposure except through financial intermediation.

sectors.w: Monaco's financial services facilitate wealth management with favorable tax treatment. Khi beneficial ownership and tax minh bạch data are published, W trở nên có thể tính được.
bp: Full compliance with OECD Global Forum minh bạch standards and CRS information exchange. Khi opacity is eliminated, the lợi ích chồng chéo suy yếu.
Publication of aggregate beneficial ownership and capital flow data. Làm cho W có thể tính được.
Có thể phá vỡ một phần. Financial services can relocate but Monaco's brand and geographic advantages create switching costs.
a: Báo cáo cho SICCFIN (Service d'Information et de Contrôle sur les Circuits Financiers)
Báo cáo cho CCAF (Commission de Contrôle des Activités Financières)
Use internal compliance channels
Banks: Thực hiện enhanced CRS compliance
Áp dụng full beneficial ownership minh bạch
Integrate ESG into wealth management
CCAF: Tăng cường AML enforcement
SICCFIN: Enhance suspicious transaction monitoring
Government: Align with EU minh bạch standards
Engage through the Conseil National (24 members) on financial minh bạch legislation
Support OECD Global Forum recommendations
Align with EU AMLD standards through bilateral agreements
Support Moneyval evaluations
i: SICCFIN — Monaco's financial intelligence unit. CCAF — the financial activities supervisory commission.
Monaco hosts branches of major international banks. Association Monégasque des Activités Financières (AMAF) — the financial industry association.
CCAF — Monaco's financial regulator. Monaco is not an thành viên EU but has a customs union with France and cooperates on financial regulation.
Conseil National — Monaco's unicameral parliament, 24 members. Monaco is a quân chủ lập hiến (Prince Albert II). Moneyval (Council of Europe) evaluates Monaco's AML framework.

MD.s: Small Eastern European nền kinh tế ($18.2B GDP). Nông nghiệp ở mức 7.1% GDP (wine, agriculture). Dịch vụ ở mức 62.3%. ứng cử viên EU country (2022). Significant remittance dependence. Energy dependent on Russian gas (via Transnistria).

sectors.w: Moldova's agricultural sector is dominated by grain monoculture on degraded chernozem soils. Khi soil health data is linked to agricultural output, W trở nên có thể tính được.
bp: EU accession agricultural alignment — CAP-style môi trường conditionality. Khi subsidies reward soil health, lợi ích chồng chéo trong exhaustive monoculture suy yếu.
Mandatory soil health monitoring per farm. Moldova's fertile chernozem soils are degrading — making this visible makes W computable.
Có thể phá vỡ một phần. Grain monoculture degrades soil. Crop rotation and cover cropping can reduce sự phụ thuộc hệ thống.
a: Báo cáo cho Environmental Agency
Document thoái hóa đất — report through ACSA (Agency for Intervention and Payments in Agriculture)
Agricultural companies: Áp dụng crop rotation and cover cropping
Đầu tư vào soil health measurement
Target EU market standards ahead of accession
Ministry of Agriculture: Cải cách subsidies toward môi trường conditionality
Environmental Agency: Tăng cường soil monitoring
Thực hiện EU CAP-alignment measures
Liên hệ đại biểu của bạn deputy in the Parlamentul Republicii Moldova (101 members) để yêu cầu soil health legislation
Support EU accession môi trường alignment
Advocate for agricultural transition support through EU pre-accession assistance
i: Environmental Agency — môi trường monitoring. ACSA — manages agricultural payments.
Moldova's agricultural sector is fragmented among smallholders and medium enterprises.
Ministry of Agriculture and Food Industry — oversees agricultural policy.
Parlamentul Republicii Moldova — unicameral, 101 members. Contact through parlament.md. Moldova is an ứng cử viên EU country.

MG.s: Biodiversity hotspot nền kinh tế ($17.4B GDP). Nông nghiệp ở mức 22.5% GDP. One of Earth's most biodiverse countries (90%+ species endemic). Devastating phá rừng (fr=5.45% forest rents). Mining growing (ilmenite, nickel). Extreme poverty.

sectors.w: Madagascar's slash-and-burn agriculture (tavy) has destroyed 90%+ of original forest. Khi phá rừng data is linked to agricultural output, W trở nên có thể tính được.
bp: Alternative livelihood programs replacing tavy with agroforestry. Khi tree-crop income exceeds slash-and-burn yields, lợi ích chồng chéo trong forest clearing breaks.
Satellite phá rừng monitoring linked to commune-level agricultural data. Làm cho W có thể tính được.
Extreme sự phụ thuộc hệ thống. Tavy on degraded laterite soils causes erosion and desertification. Madagascar's red soil runoff is visible from space.
a: Report illegal phá rừng to Madagascar National Parks (MNP)
Ghi nhận qua international conservation organizations (WWF, Conservation International)
Report rosewood trafficking to CITES authorities
Mining companies (Rio Tinto/QMM, Ambatovy): Thực hiện biodiversity offsets
Vanilla and clove exporters: Áp dụng sustainable sourcing certification

Ministry of Environment: Thực thi protected area boundaries
Ministry of Agriculture: Support agroforestry transition
ONE (Office National pour l'Environnement): Tăng cường môi trường impact assessment

Support REDD+ climate finance for Madagascar's forests
Advocate for CITES enforcement on rosewood trafficking
Thúc đẩy international biodiversity finance through GEF and Green Climate Fund
i: MNP (Madagascar National Parks) — manages protected areas. WWF, Conservation International, WCS — major international conservation organizations with Madagascar programs.
QMM (QIT Madagascar Minerals, Rio Tinto subsidiary) — ilmenite khai thác mỏ. Ambatovy — nickel and cobalt mine (Sumitomo). Madagascar is the world's largest vanilla producer.
