ONE (Office National pour l'Environnement) — the môi trường assessment authority. MEEF (Ministère de l'Environnement et de l'Écologie et des Forêts) — environment ministry.
Assemblée nationale de Madagascar — 151 members. Sénat — 18 members. Madagascar is a semi-presidential republic.

MK.s: Small Western Balkan nền kinh tế ($17B GDP). Sản xuất ở mức 14.3% GDP. Dịch vụ ở mức 56.2%. ứng cử viên EU country. Coal-dependent energy. Nông nghiệp ở mức 6.1% GDP.

sectors.w: North Macedonia's lignite dependence (Bitola power plant) faces EU accession conditionality. EU ETS alignment will make coal uncompetitive.
bp: EU accession requiring ETS alignment. Coal becomes uncompetitive at EU carbon prices.
Per-plant phát thải and health cost disclosure. Làm cho W có thể tính được.
Không thể phá vỡ. Coal combustion releases pollutants.
a: Báo cáo cho Ministry of Environment and Physical Planning
Document air pollution health impacts
ESM (Elektrani na Severna Makedonija): Phát triển coal phase-out plan
Đầu tư vào solar energy (excellent potential)
ERC: Cải cách tariffs to reflect môi trường costs
Energy Community Secretariat: Thực thi môi trường compliance
Liên hệ đại biểu của bạn Пратеник in the Sobranie (120 members) để yêu cầu coal phase-out timeline
Support EU Just Transition Fund pre-accession assistance
Vận động qua Energy Community for transition support
i: Ministry of Environment and Physical Planning — cơ quan môi trường. North Macedonia is an Energy Community member.
ESM — state electricity company operating the Bitola lignite plant.
ERC (Energy Regulatory Commission) — cơ quan quản lý năng lượng. Energy Community Treaty membership requires EU energy acquis alignment.
Sobranie (Assembly of North Macedonia) — unicameral, 120 members. ứng cử viên EU country.

ML.s: Sahelian nền kinh tế ($26.8B GDP) with gold khai thác mỏ (16.18% GDP) and agriculture (33.3% GDP). Military junta since 2020-2021 coups. Security crisis (jihadist insurgency). Third-largest gold producer in Africa.

sectors.w: Mali's gold khai thác mỏ generates mercury contamination (artisanal) and cyanide risks (industrial). Khi môi trường data is published alongside production, W trở nên có thể tính được.
bp: International supply chain due diligence requiring mine-level môi trường compliance. Khi buyers verify conditions, lợi ích chồng chéo trong unregulated extraction suy yếu.
Per-mine môi trường monitoring published through EITI. Mali's EITI membership provides the framework.
Có thể phá vỡ một phần. Mining disturbs landscapes. Mercury-free processing can reduce artisanal khai thác mỏ sự phụ thuộc hệ thống.
a: Report through international khai thác mỏ company channels (Barrick Gold, B2Gold)
Báo cáo cho DNGM (Direction Nationale de la Géologie et des Mines)
Ghi nhận qua international monitoring organizations
Barrick Gold (Loulo-Gounkoto), B2Gold (Fekola): Thực hiện international môi trường standards
Support artisanal khai thác mỏ formalization
Áp dụng EITI enhanced reporting
Ministry of Mines: Thực thi Mining Code môi trường provisions
DNGM: Improve artisanal khai thác mỏ oversight
EITI Mali: Expand to môi trường data
Vận động qua African Union for return to democratic governance with khai thác mỏ minh bạch
Support ECOWAS engagement on governance and môi trường standards
Thúc đẩy Minamata Convention enforcement on mercury in artisanal khai thác mỏ
Support international khai thác mỏ company home-country oversight
i: DNGM — national geological and khai thác mỏ directorate. Note: Mali is under military rule (CNSP). Civil society space is restricted.
Barrick Gold — operates Loulo-Gounkoto complex. B2Gold — operates Fekola mine. Resolute Mining — operates Syama mine. EITI Mali — member since 2006.
Ministry of Mines, Energy and Water — oversees khai thác mỏ policy. Mali's 2019 Mining Code establishes môi trường obligations.
Note: Military transition government. National Transitional Council replaces elected legislature. International channels: ECOWAS (Mali suspended), African Union, EITI Board.

MM.s: Resource-rich nền kinh tế ($74.1B GDP) under military junta since 2021 coup. Tô khí đốt 4.4%. Jade and gem khai thác mỏ (est. $31B/year — more than formal GDP). Nông nghiệp ở mức 20.8% GDP. Civil war affecting multiple regions.

sectors.w: Myanmar's jade industry is largely opaque — estimated at $31B/year but mostly unrecorded. Khi jade revenue flows are made visible (Global Witness has documented significant flows to military), W trở nên có thể tính được.
bp: International trừng phạt targeting jade and gem revenues flowing to the military junta. Khi revenue is blocked, the lợi ích chồng chéo between the military and jade khai thác mỏ suy yếu.
Supply chain minh bạch for jade and gems using blockchain traceability. Global Witness and others have documented the flows — formalizing this breaks system independence.
Có thể phá vỡ một phần. Mining inherently disturbs landscapes. Myanmar's jade mines in Kachin State have caused catastrophic landslides.
a: Report through international monitoring organizations (Global Witness, Justice for Myanmar)
Document military revenue flows from jade and gems
Provide data to international trừng phạt authorities
International gem buyers: Require provenance verification excluding military-linked mines
Jewelers (Tiffany, Cartier): Áp dụng Myanmar jade sourcing policies aligned with OECD Due Diligence Guidance
Apply conflict mineral frameworks to jade and gems
International trừng phạt authorities: Expand targeted trừng phạt on military khai thác mỏ revenues
OECD: Include jade in conflict mineral due diligence guidance
Responsible Jewellery Council: Tăng cường Myanmar sourcing standards
Support targeted international trừng phạt on Myanmar military khai thác mỏ revenues
Vận động qua ASEAN for governance reform
Thúc đẩy UN Security Council action on Myanmar military's resource exploitation
Support National Unity Government (NUG) môi trường governance framework
i: Note: Myanmar under the military junta (State Administration Council) has no functioning xã hội dân sự space. Global Witness has published extensive reports on Myanmar's jade industry. Justice for Myanmar — international advocacy organization documenting military business interests.
Myanmar Gems Enterprise — military-controlled entity managing gem auctions. International buyers increasingly apply conflict mineral frameworks to Myanmar sourcing.
International engagement only — domestic regulation under junta is not independent.

Note: Myanmar's elected parliament (Pyidaungsu Hluttaw) was dissolved by the military coup. The National Unity Government (NUG) — the democratic opposition government in exile — has proposed alternative governance frameworks. International channels: ASEAN (Special Envoy process), UN Human Rights Council, targeted trừng phạt by US, EU, UK.

MN.s: Resource-dependent landlocked nền kinh tế ($23.8B GDP). Mining at 26.57% GDP (copper, coal, gold). Coal at 4.89% GDP. Oyu Tolgoi copper-gold mine (Rio Tinto/Turquoise Hill). Parliamentary dân chủ — rare in the region.

sectors.w: Mongolia's khai thác mỏ sector (particularly coal and copper) generates dust pollution and depletes water in the Gobi. Khi theo từng mỏ môi trường data is linked to production revenue, W trở nên có thể tính được.
bp: Environmental bonds and water-use fees reflecting true scarcity. Khi khai thác mỏ companies pay for water in arid steppe, lợi ích chồng chéo trong water-intensive extraction suy yếu.
Per-mine môi trường monitoring data published through EITI Mongolia. Làm cho W có thể tính được.
Có thể phá vỡ một phần. Mining in arid environments inherently affects limited water resources. However, dry processing and water recycling can reduce dependence.
a: Báo cáo cho MNET (Ministry of Nature, Environment and Tourism)
Ghi nhận qua herder community organizations
Report through Rio Tinto/Oyu Tolgoi compliance channels
Oyu Tolgoi (Rio Tinto): Thực hiện water recycling and môi trường monitoring
Erdenes Mongol (state khai thác mỏ company): Áp dụng ESG standards
Coal miners (Energy Resources, Aspire Mining): Phát triển transition plans
MRAM (Mineral Resources and Petroleum Authority): Tăng cường môi trường licensing
MNET: Thực thi water extraction limits
EITI Mongolia: Expand to môi trường data
Liên hệ đại biểu của bạn member of the State Great Khural (76 members) để yêu cầu môi trường bonds for all khai thác mỏ licenses
Support EITI enhanced reporting
Advocate for Mongolia's Third Neighbour Policy to include môi trường governance standards
Thúc đẩy herder community consultation rights in khai thác mỏ decisions
i: MNET — cơ quan môi trường. EITI Mongolia — member since 2007. Mongolia has relatively active xã hội dân sự for the region.
Oyu Tolgoi — the giant copper-gold mine (Rio Tinto 66%, Government 34%). Erdenes Mongol — state khai thác mỏ holding company. Tavan Tolgoi — massive coal deposit.
MRAM — the khai thác mỏ regulator. Mongolia's 2006 Minerals Law governs khai thác mỏ licensing.
State Great Khural (Улсын Их Хурал) — unicameral parliament, 76 members. Contact through parliament.mn. Mongolia is a nghị viện dân chủ with competitive elections since 1990.

MO.s: Casino and tourism nền kinh tế ($49.5B GDP). Dịch vụ ở mức 83.8% GDP. World's largest gambling market (pre-COVID revenue $36B/year). Under Chinese sovereignty. Highly concentrated gambling concession system.

sectors.w: Macao's gambling industry generates significant social costs (problem gambling, money laundering) that are not captured in concession revenues. Khi social cost data is published alongside gross gaming revenue, W trở nên có thể tính được.
bp: Mandatory gambling harm data disclosure per concession. Khi social costs are visible alongside revenues, lợi ích chồng chéo trong revenue maximization without harm mitigation suy yếu.
DICJ publication of problem gambling prevalence, social cost estimates, and AML compliance data per concessionaire. Làm cho W có thể tính được.
Có thể phá vỡ một phần. Gambling inherently creates addiction risk. However, harm reduction measures (exclusion programs, betting limits) can reduce sự phụ thuộc hệ thống.
a: Report AML violations to DICJ (Gaming Inspection and Coordination Bureau)
Document problem gambling through internal channels
Báo cáo cho GIF (Financial Intelligence Office)
Concessionaires (Sands China, Galaxy, Wynn, MGM, SJM, Melco): Thực hiện responsible gambling programs
Áp dụng independent problem gambling impact assessments
Tăng cường AML controls
DICJ: Tăng cường responsible gambling requirements in concession terms
IAS (Social Welfare Bureau): Expand problem gambling treatment and prevention
Tăng cường AML enforcement
Engage through the Macao Legislative Assembly (33 members, partially elected) on gambling harm reduction legislation
Support international responsible gambling standards adoption
Advocate for FATF recommendations implementation on casino AML
Thúc đẩy independent gambling harm research funding
i: DICJ (Direcção de Inspecção e Coordenação de Jogos) — Macao's gaming regulator. GIF (Gabinete de Informação Financeira) — financial intelligence unit.
Six gaming concessionaires hold licenses renewed in 2023. Sands China (Las Vegas Sands subsidiary), Galaxy Entertainment, Wynn Macau, MGM China, SJM Holdings, Melco Resorts — operate 40+ casinos.
DICJ — the gaming regulator overseeing all casino operations. 2023 concession renewal included enhanced responsible gambling requirements.
Assembleia Legislativa de Macau — 33 members (14 directly elected, 12 indirectly elected, 7 appointed). Macao is a Special Administrative Region of China with limited autonomy.

MR.s: Sahelian nền kinh tế ($10.9B GDP) with khai thác mỏ (iron ore, 9.59% GDP) and agriculture (19.3% GDP). Thủy sản significant. New hydrogen and gas projects (GTA — Greater Tortue Ahmeyim). Coal at 0.67%.

sectors.w: SNIM iron ore khai thác mỏ in Zouérat generates dust and water issues. Khi môi trường monitoring is published, W trở nên có thể tính được.
bp: Environmental bond requirements for khai thác mỏ. Khi remediation is pre-funded, lợi ích chồng chéo in unaccountable extraction suy yếu.
Per-mine môi trường data disclosure. Làm cho W có thể tính được.
Có thể phá vỡ một phần. Mining disturbs landscapes but rehabilitation can reduce impact.
a: Báo cáo cho Ministry of Environment
Ghi nhận qua international channels
SNIM: Thực hiện môi trường management systems
Kinross (Tasiast gold mine): Apply international standards
BP/Kosmos (GTA gas project): Áp dụng theo từng mỏ phát thải reporting
Ministry of Mines: Tăng cường môi trường licensing
EITI Mauritania: Expand reporting
Environmental agency: Increase monitoring
Liên hệ đại biểu của bạn member of the Assemblée nationale (176 members) để yêu cầu khai thác mỏ môi trường standards
Support EITI enhanced reporting
Advocate for African Mining Vision implementation
i: Ministry of Environment and Sustainable Phát triểnment. SNIM (Société Nationale Industrielle et Minière) — state iron ore company.
SNIM — state iron company. Kinross Gold — operates Tasiast mine. BP and Kosmos Energy — developing the GTA gas field.
EITI Mauritania — member since 2005.
Assemblée nationale de Mauritanie — 176 members. Mauritania is a presidential republic with limited democratic space.

MT.s: Small EU island nền kinh tế ($25B GDP). Dịch vụ ở mức 81.8% (financial services, gaming, tourism). thành viên EU. Major online gambling hub. No significant natural resources.

sectors.w: Malta licenses ~300 online gambling companies (MGA). Khi problem gambling and AML data is published per licensee, W trở nên có thể tính được.
bp: Enhanced MGA licensing requirements with harm data disclosure. Makes lợi ích chồng chéo trong revenue without accountability weaker.
Per-licensee problem gambling and AML compliance data publication. Làm cho W có thể tính được.
Có thể phá vỡ một phần. Online gambling creates addiction risk. Harm reduction measures can reduce sự phụ thuộc hệ thống.
a: Báo cáo cho MGA (Malta Gaming Authority)
Report AML violations to FIAU (Financial Intelligence Analysis Unit)
Use EU Whistleblower Directive protections
Online gambling operators: Thực hiện responsible gambling programs
Áp dụng independent harm assessments
Tăng cường AML compliance
MGA: Tăng cường responsible gambling requirements
FIAU: Enhance AML supervision
MFSA: Coordinate financial and gambling regulation
Liên hệ đại biểu của bạn member of the Kamra tad-Deputati (65 members) để yêu cầu enhanced gambling harm disclosure
Support EU-wide online gambling regulation coordination
Advocate for FATF recommendations implementation
i: MGA (Malta Gaming Authority) — licenses and regulates online gambling. FIAU — financial intelligence unit. Malta transposed EU Whistleblower Directive.
Malta hosts ~300 licensed gambling companies including Betsson, Kindred, LeoVegas.
MGA — the gambling regulator. MFSA (Malta Dịch vụ Tài chính Authority) — the financial regulator.
Kamra tad-Deputati (House of Representatives) — unicameral, 65+ members. Malta is an EU nghị viện dân chủ.

MU.s: Upper-middle-income island nền kinh tế ($14.9B GDP). Dịch vụ ở mức 64.4% (financial services, tourism). Sản xuất ở mức 11.1% (textiles). Successful economic diversification from sugar to services. Strong institutions.

sectors.w: Mauritius is a major offshore financial center, particularly for India-bound investment (India-Mauritius tax treaty). Khi beneficial ownership and tax data is transparent, W trở nên có thể tính được.
bp: Full CRS and FATF compliance. Khi financial opacity is eliminated, the lợi ích chồng chéo suy yếu.
Publication of beneficial ownership data. Làm cho W có thể tính được.
Có thể phá vỡ một phần. Financial services can relocate but Mauritius's India tax treaty and infrastructure create switching costs.
a: Báo cáo cho FSC (Dịch vụ Tài chính Commission)
Báo cáo cho FIU Mauritius
Use Mauritian người tố giác protection (Financial Intelligence and AML Act)
Banks and management companies: Thực hiện enhanced due diligence
Áp dụng ESG criteria in Global Business operations
Comply with FATF recommendations ahead of mandates
FSC: Tăng cường Global Business licensing
Bank of Mauritius: Enhance AML supervision
EDB (Economic Phát triểnment Board): Promote substance requirements
Liên hệ đại biểu của bạn member of the National Assembly (70 members) để yêu cầu enhanced financial minh bạch
Support OECD BEPS Inclusive Framework
Maintain FATF compliance
Advocate for African financial minh bạch standards
i: FSC — the integrated financial services regulator. FIU — financial intelligence unit.
Mauritius hosts ~900 Global Business companies (Category 1 and 2). Major banks: SBM Holdings, MCB Group.
FSC — regulates the Global Business sector. Bank of Mauritius — the central bank. Mauritius was on the FATF grey list (2020-2021) and implemented reforms.
National Assembly of Mauritius — 70 members. Mauritius is a nghị viện dân chủ with strong democratic traditions since independence (1968).

MW.s: Low-income nền kinh tế ($11.3B GDP). Nông nghiệp ở mức 31.8% GDP — tobacco is the largest export (50%+ of export revenue). One of the world's poorest countries. High climate vulnerability.

sectors.w: Malawi's tobacco dependence is an economic PST — tobacco demand is declining globally while the crop depletes soil. As WHO FCTC reduces demand, the lợi ích chồng chéo between tobacco growers and buyers suy yếu.
bp: Crop diversification as global tobacco demand declines. Khi alternative crops (legumes, macadamia, soy) provide comparable income, lợi ích chồng chéo trong tobacco monoculture breaks.
Publication of thoái hóa đất and health cost data alongside tobacco revenue. Làm cho W có thể tính được.
Tobacco cultivation depletes soil nutrients and requires heavy pesticide use. Crop rotation can reduce sự phụ thuộc hệ thống.
a: Báo cáo cho EAD (Environmental Affairs Department)
Document child labor — report to Ministry of Labour
Report through tobacco buyer compliance channels (BAT, JTI)
Limbe Leaf (Alliance One), JTI: Support farmer diversification programs
Đầu tư vào alternative crop development
Áp dụng Sustainable Tobacco Programme standards
Tobacco Commission: Support diversification transition
Ministry of Agriculture: Scale alternative crop programs
TCC (Tobacco Control Commission): Thực hiện WHO FCTC provisions
Liên hệ đại biểu của bạn Member of Parliament in the National Assembly (193 members) để yêu cầu crop diversification investment
Support WHO FCTC alternative livelihood provisions for tobacco-growing countries
Advocate for international climate finance for agricultural transition
Thúc đẩy fair trade tobacco pricing during transition period
i: EAD (Environmental Affairs Department) — cơ quan môi trường. Ministry of Labour — enforces child labor laws.
Limbe Leaf (Alliance One International subsidiary) — the largest tobacco buyer. JTI, BAT — international tobacco companies sourcing from Malawi.
Tobacco Commission (now TCC — Tobacco Control Commission) — regulates the tobacco sector. Ministry of Agriculture, Irrigation and Water Phát triểnment.
National Assembly of Malawi — 193 members. Malawi is a presidential dân chủ. WHO FCTC Articles 17-18 require support for economically viable alternatives to tobacco growing.

MY.s: Upper-middle-income nền kinh tế ($422.2B GDP). World's second-largest palm oil producer. Oil and gas at 5.2% rents (Petronas). Sản xuất ở mức 22.5% GDP (electronics, automotive). Dịch vụ ở mức 53.7%.

sectors.w: Malaysia produces ~25% of global palm oil. EUDR and MSPO certification create traceability frameworks. Khi theo từng nhà máyation môi trường data is linked to trade, W trở nên có thể tính được.
bp: EUDR compliance requiring zero-phá rừng traceability. Khi buyers verify origin, lợi ích chồng chéo trong forest conversion for plantations breaks.
Mandatory MSPO (Malaysian Sustainable Dầu cọ) certification with independently verifiable môi trường data per estate. Làm cho W có thể tính được.
Có thể phá vỡ một phần. Palm oil monoculture reduces biodiversity. But yield improvement on existing plantations can reduce expansion pressure.
a: Báo cáo cho DOE (Department of Environment)
Document labor violations — report to HR Ministry
Report through RSPO complaint mechanisms
Sime Darby, IOI, FGV: Achieve 100% RSPO certification
Áp dụng zero-phá rừng and no-peat commitments
Thực hiện full supply chain traceability
MPOB: Tăng cường MSPO certification môi trường criteria
DOE: Thực thi peatland drainage regulations
MPIC (Ministry of Plantation Industries): Mandate full traceability
Liên hệ đại biểu của bạn Ahli Parlimen in the Dewan Rakyat (222 members) để yêu cầu peatland protection enforcement
Support EUDR implementation with transition assistance for smallholders
Vận động qua ASEAN for regional zero-phá rừng commitments
Thúc đẩy RSPO-MSPO mutual recognition with enhanced môi trường standards
i: DOE (Jabatan Alam Sekitar / Department of Environment) — cơ quan môi trường. SUHAKAM (Human Rights Commission of Malaysia) — investigates rights complaints including in palm oil sector. RSPO — Malaysia co-hosts the RSPO Secretariat.

Sime Darby Plantation — world's largest palm oil company by planted area. IOI Corporation, FGV (Felda Global Ventures) — major plantation companies. MPOB (Malaysian Dầu cọ Board) — the government agency overseeing the palm oil industry.
MPOB — oversees palm oil industry regulation and research. MSPO (Malaysian Sustainable Dầu cọ) — the national mandatory certification scheme.
Parliament of Malaysia — bicameral: Dewan Rakyat (222 members) and Dewan Negara (70 members). Contact through parlimen.gov.my. Malaysia is a federal quân chủ lập hiến and nghị viện dân chủ.

MZ.s: Resource-rich developing nền kinh tế ($22.7B GDP). Major gas discoveries (Rovuma Basin — among world's largest LNG projects). Coal at 3.78%, gas at 3.57%. Nông nghiệp ở mức 25.2% GDP. Insurgency in Cabo Delgado province near gas projects.

sectors.w: Mozambique's Rovuma Basin LNG projects (TotalEnergies, ExxonMobil, Eni) are among the world's largest but face force majeure due to insurgency. Khi per-project môi trường and social cost data is published, W trở nên có thể tính được.
bp: Conditional development — LNG projects proceed only with binding community benefit and môi trường standards. Khi development is linked to social outcomes, lợi ích chồng chéo trong extraction without accountability suy yếu.
Per-project môi trường disclosure for all Rovuma Basin operations. Làm cho W có thể tính được.
Không thể phá vỡ. LNG production and combustion release CO₂ and methane.
a: Báo cáo cho MITADER (Ministry of Land, Environment and Rural Phát triểnment)
Document community displacement — report to international accountability mechanisms
Report through TotalEnergies/ExxonMobil/Eni compliance channels
TotalEnergies (Mozambique LNG), ExxonMobil (Rovuma LNG), Eni (Coral FLNG): Thực hiện community development and môi trường standards
Áp dụng TCFD reporting
Address security and human rights risks per UN Voluntary Principles
INP: Tăng cường môi trường licensing for LNG projects
MIREME (Ministry of Mineral Resources and Energy): Ensure sovereign wealth fund for gas revenues
Bank of Mozambique: Prepare for resource revenue macroeconomic management
Liên hệ đại biểu của bạn Deputado in the Assembleia da República (250 members) để yêu cầu transparent management of gas revenues
Support EITI enhanced reporting for Mozambique's gas sector
Advocate for Cabo Delgado stabilization with môi trường governance
Thúc đẩy sovereign wealth fund establishment before major LNG revenues flow
i: MITADER — environment ministry. INP (Instituto Nacional de Petróleo) — the petroleum regulator. Note: Mozambique has limited người tố giác protections. The Cabo Delgado insurgency complicates xã hội dân sự operations in the gas-rich north.

TotalEnergies — leads the $20B Mozambique LNG project (currently under force majeure). ExxonMobil — leads Rovuma LNG. Eni — operates Coral South FLNG. ENH (Empresa Nacional de Hidrocarbonetos) — the national hydrocarbons company.
INP — the petroleum regulator. MIREME — oversees energy and khai thác mỏ policy. EITI Mozambique — member since 2012.
Assembleia da República de Moçambique — 250 members. Mozambique is a presidential republic. EITI membership since 2012.

NA.s: Upper-middle-income nền kinh tế ($13.4B GDP) with khai thác mỏ at 3.17% (uranium, diamonds). Nông nghiệp ở mức 7.3% GDP. One of Africa's most stable democracies. Major new oil discoveries offshore (TotalEnergies, Shell). Green hydrogen ambitions.

sectors.w: Namibia's uranium khai thác mỏ (Rössing, Husab — two of world's largest) generates radioactive waste and water issues in the Namib Desert. Khi theo từng mỏ môi trường monitoring is published, W trở nên có thể tính được.
bp: Environmental bonds and water-use fees for uranium khai thác mỏ. Khi miners pay for water in one of Earth's driest environments, lợi ích chồng chéo trong water-intensive extraction suy yếu.
Per-mine môi trường monitoring disclosure. Làm cho W có thể tính được.
Có thể phá vỡ một phần. Uranium khai thác mỏ generates radioactive tailings. Improved containment can reduce but not eliminate sự phụ thuộc hệ thống.
a: Báo cáo cho MEFT (Ministry of Environment, Forestry and Tourism)
Báo cáo cho NRPA (National Radiation Protection Authority)
Report through Rössing (Rio Tinto)/Husab (CGN) compliance channels
Rössing Uranium (Rio Tinto), Husab (China General Nuclear): Thực hiện international radiation safety and môi trường standards
Áp dụng theo từng mỏ môi trường reporting
Đầu tư vào site rehabilitation planning
MME (Ministry of Mines and Energy): Tăng cường môi trường conditions in khai thác mỏ licenses
NRPA: Thực thi radiation protection standards
Chamber of Mines of Namibia: Promote industry môi trường standards
Liên hệ đại biểu của bạn member of the National Assembly (104 members) để yêu cầu môi trường bonds for uranium khai thác mỏ
Support IAEA môi trường standards for uranium producing countries
Advocate for African Mining Vision implementation
Thúc đẩy Namibia's green hydrogen strategy to include khai thác mỏ sector transition
i: MEFT — environment ministry. NRPA — radiation protection authority. Namibia has relatively strong xã hội dân sự for the region.
Rössing Uranium — one of world's largest (Rio Tinto). Husab mine — CNNC/CGN (Chinese nhà nước). Namibia also has significant diamond khai thác mỏ (Namdeb — De Beers/government JV).
MME — oversees khai thác mỏ policy. Chamber of Mines of Namibia — the industry association.

Parliament of Namibia — bicameral: National Assembly (104 members) and National Council (42 members). Contact through parliament.na. Namibia is a presidential dân chủ with strong democratic credentials since independence (1990).

NE.s: Sahelian nền kinh tế ($19.9B GDP). Nông nghiệp ở mức 34.5% GDP. Uranium khai thác mỏ (Arlit — supplies ~5% of world production, Orano/formerly Areva). Oil production growing. Military junta since July 2023 coup.

sectors.w: Niger's uranium khai thác mỏ (Orano operations at Arlit) generates radioactive tailings in water-scarce Sahel. Environmental monitoring data makes W computable.
bp: Environmental bonds for uranium operations. Khi remediation costs are pre-funded, lợi ích chồng chéo in extraction without accountability suy yếu.
Per-mine môi trường monitoring. Làm cho W có thể tính được.
Có thể phá vỡ một phần. Uranium khai thác mỏ generates long-lived radioactive waste. Containment reduces but doesn't eliminate sự phụ thuộc hệ thống.
a: Report through Orano compliance channels
Ghi nhận qua international monitoring (Greenpeace, CRIIRAD have conducted independent monitoring at Arlit)
Báo cáo cho EITI Niger
Orano (formerly Areva): Thực hiện international radiation and môi trường standards at Arlit
Address legacy contamination
CNNPC (China): Apply standards to new uranium operations
Ministry of Mines: Tăng cường uranium khai thác mỏ môi trường requirements
EITI Niger: Include môi trường data
IAEA: Support radiation safety standards
Vận động qua African Union for democratic governance restoration with khai thác mỏ minh bạch
Support IAEA môi trường and safety standards enforcement
Thúc đẩy Orano legacy contamination remediation at Arlit
Support EITI enhanced reporting
i: BNEE (Bureau National d'Évaluation Environnementale) — môi trường assessment authority. Note: Military rule since July 2023.
Orano — operates SOMAÏR and COMINAK uranium mines at Arlit (COMINAK closed 2021). Chinese companies (CNNPC) have expanding uranium interests.
Ministry of Mines — oversees khai thác mỏ policy. EITI Niger — member since 2005.
Note: Military junta since July 2023. CNSP (Conseil National pour la Sauvegarde de la Patrie). ECOWAS suspended Niger. International channels: African Union, IAEA, EITI Board.

NI.s: Small Central American nền kinh tế ($19.7B GDP). Nông nghiệp ở mức 14.4% GDP. Mining at 2.68% (gold). Authoritarian governance under Ortega. Dịch vụ ở mức 46.8%.

sectors.w: Nicaragua's gold khai thác mỏ generates mercury and cyanide contamination. Khi môi trường data is published, W trở nên có thể tính được.
bp: Supply chain due diligence for gold sourced from Nicaragua.
Environmental monitoring per mine makes W computable.
Có thể phá vỡ một phần. Mercury-free processing can reduce impact.
a: Report through international khai thác mỏ company channels (Calibre Mining, B2Gold)
Document môi trường impacts through diaspora channels
Calibre Mining, B2Gold: Apply international môi trường standards
Áp dụng EITI-style reporting
Support artisanal khai thác mỏ formalization
Ministry of Energy and Mines: Environmental licensing
MARENA: Monitoring
Support international human rights monitoring for Nicaragua
Vận động qua OAS for governance reform
Thúc đẩy khai thác mỏ company home-country oversight
i: MARENA (Ministry of Environment) — cơ quan môi trường. Note: Nicaragua under Ortega is highly chuyên quyền. Civil society is repressed.
Calibre Mining — operates gold mines in Nicaragua. B2Gold — formerly operated La Libertad mine.
Ministry of Energy and Mines — khai thác mỏ regulator.
Note: Asamblea Nacional (92 members) is controlled by FSLN. International channels: OAS (though Nicaragua withdrew), UN Human Rights Council, IACHR.

NP.s: Mountainous South Asian nền kinh tế ($42.9B GDP). Nông nghiệp ở mức 21.9% GDP. Massive hydropower potential (~83 GW technically feasible, only ~2.3 GW developed). Remittances ~25% of GDP. Climate-vulnerable (glacial lake outburst floods).

sectors.w: Nepal's agriculture on steep hillsides causes erosion and landslides. Khi per-district soil loss and water quality data is linked to agricultural output, W trở nên có thể tính được.
bp: Cải cách agricultural support toward terracing and agroforestry on hillsides. Khi hillside farmers are incentivized to conserve soil, lợi ích chồng chéo trong unsustainable cultivation suy yếu.
Per-district soil erosion and water quality monitoring. Làm cho W có thể tính được.
Có thể phá vỡ một phần. Agriculture on steep slopes inherently risks erosion. Traditional terracing can reduce sự phụ thuộc hệ thống.
a: Báo cáo cho DoE (Department of Environment)
Report through local government channels (municipality/rural municipality)
Agricultural companies: Support terracing and agroforestry programs
Hydropower companies: Đầu tư vào watershed protection upstream of reservoirs
MoALD (Ministry of Agriculture): Cải cách subsidy structure toward soil conservation
MOFE: Tăng cường watershed management
DSCWM (Dept of Soil Conservation and Watershed Management): Scale programs
Liên hệ đại biểu của bạn member of the Pratinidhi Sabha (House of Representatives, 275 members) để yêu cầu hillside agriculture conservation programs
Support climate adaptation finance for Nepal's agricultural sector
Vận động qua SAARC for regional watershed management
Thúc đẩy GLOF (glacial lake outburst flood) early warning and prevention investment
i: DoE — cơ quan môi trường under MOFE (Ministry of Forests and Environment). Nepal's 2015 Constitution devolves significant authority to local governments.
Nepal's agricultural sector is predominantly smallholder. Hydropower companies (NEA, private developers) have interests in watershed health.
MoALD (Ministry of Agriculture and Livestock Phát triểnment). DSCWM — responsible for soil conservation programs.
Federal Parliament — bicameral: Pratinidhi Sabha (275 members) and Rashtriya Sabha (59 members). Nepal is a federal democratic republic since 2008.

NZ.s: Advanced nền kinh tế ($260.2B GDP) with intensive dairy farming driving agricultural exports. Nông nghiệp ở mức 4.4% GDP but outsized môi trường footprint (dairy is largest export sector). Dịch vụ ở mức 64.6%. Strong democratic institutions. Ambitious climate targets.

sectors.w: New Zealand's dairy intensification (6.3M dairy cows) has degraded waterways (nitrogen and E. coli contamination). Khi per-farm nutrient discharge data is published alongside farm revenue, W trở nên có thể tính được.
bp: Thực hiện the NPS-FM (National Policy Statement for Freshwater Management 2020) requiring bottom lines for water quality. Khi farmers face enforceable nutrient caps, lợi ích chồng chéo trong herd expansion suy yếu.
Farm Environment Plans with mandatory public nutrient discharge data. NZ's 'He Waka Eke Noa' partnership generates farm-level data — public disclosure makes W computable.
Có thể phá vỡ một phần. Ruminant digestion produces methane biologically. Feed additives can reduce but not eliminate enteric methane. Riparian planting reduces but doesn't eliminate nutrient runoff.
a: Báo cáo cho regional councils (Canterbury, Waikato — primary water quality enforcers)
Document water quality violations — report to MfE (Ministry for the Environment)
Use NZ Protected Disclosures Act 2022
Fonterra: Áp dụng binding waterway protection targets across all supplier farms
Thực hiện methane reduction technology (Kowbucha, Zelp)
Diversify cooperative revenue beyond dairy commodity
MfE: Thực thi NPS-FM bottom lines for nitrogen and E. coli in waterways
MPI (Ministry for Primary Industries): Cải cách farm support toward môi trường outcomes
EPA: Tăng cường agricultural chemical regulation
Liên hệ đại biểu của bạn Member of Parliament in the House of Representatives (120 members) để yêu cầu enforcement of freshwater bottom lines
Support NZ Emissions Trading Scheme inclusion of agricultural phát thải (planned by 2025, now uncertain)
Advocate for Comprehensive and Progressive Agreement for Trans-Pacific Partnership (CPTPP) môi trường provisions
Thúc đẩy inclusion of biological methane in national phát thải reduction targets
i: Regional councils — the primary môi trường regulators under the Resource Management Act (RMA). MfE (Ministry for the Environment) — sets national môi trường policy. NZ Protected Disclosures (Protection of Whistleblowers) Act 2022 — strong người tố giác protection.
Fonterra Co-operative Group — the world's largest dairy exporter, processing ~80% of NZ milk. Fonterra's procurement standards directly influence ~10,000 dairy farms.
NPS-FM (National Policy Statement for Freshwater Management 2020) — requires regional councils to set limits on resource use to achieve môi trường bottom lines. MPI — oversees primary sector policy.

New Zealand Parliament (House of Representatives, 120 members, MMP electoral system). Contact through parliament.nz. NZ Climate Change Response (Zero Carbon) Amendment Act 2019 sets separate targets for biogenic methane.

OM.s: Oil-dependent Gulf nền kinh tế ($107.1B GDP) with 29.21% combined oil and gas rents. PDO (Petroleum Phát triểnment Oman, 60% government, 34% Shell) is the main operator. Diversifying through Oman Vision 2040. Hydrogen ambitions.

sectors.w: Oman's oil production uses enhanced oil recovery (EOR) including solar-powered steam injection. As EOR costs rise on mature fields, diversification to green hydrogen becomes economically rational.
bp: Green hydrogen investment as alternative export commodity. Oman has committed $30B+ to green hydrogen projects. Khi hydrogen revenue streams are established, lợi ích chồng chéo trong oil dependence suy yếu.
Per-field phát thải disclosure for all PDO and other operator operations. Làm cho W có thể tính được.
Không thể phá vỡ. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂.
a: Báo cáo cho Environment Authority
Report through PDO/Shell compliance channels
PDO: Accelerate năng lượng tái tạo integration in operations
OQ (state energy company): Phát triển green hydrogen export capacity
Thực hiện TCFD reporting
Ministry of Energy and Minerals: Balance oil production with hydrogen transition
EA: Tăng cường môi trường standards
CBO (Central Bank of Oman): Climate risk in financial supervision
Engage through the Majlis al-Shura (advisory, 86 elected members) on energy transition policy
Vận động qua GCC for regional energy transition coordination
Support IRENA recommendations on Gulf state transition
Thúc đẩy Oman Vision 2040 môi trường targets enforcement
i: Environment Authority (EA) — Oman's môi trường regulator. PDO (Petroleum Phát triểnment Oman) — Shell manages PDO operations.
PDO — produces ~70% of Oman's oil. OQ (formerly Oman Oil Company) — the state energy holding company. Hydrom — the government entity driving Oman's green hydrogen ambitions.
Ministry of Energy and Minerals — oversees energy policy. Hydrom — manages green hydrogen project tenders.
Majlis Oman — bicameral: Majlis al-Shura (86 elected) and Majlis al-Dawla (86 appointed). Oman is a sultanate with limited but growing nghị viện activity.

PA.s: Services-dominant nền kinh tế ($86.5B GDP) with the Panama Canal generating significant revenue. Financial services hub. Mining at 3.58% (Cobre Panamá copper mine — First Quantum, closed by Supreme Court ruling 2023). Dịch vụ ở mức 69.3%.

sectors.w: Panama's Supreme Court ruled the Cobre Panamá khai thác mỏ contract unconstitutional in November 2023, following massive public protests. The lợi ích chồng chéo between the khai thác mỏ company and government has been broken by democratic action.
bp: The Cobre Panamá precedent — democratic rejection of khai thác mỏ contracts that do not serve the public interest. This is a direct break of the lợi ích chồng chéo through civic action and judicial review.
Environmental monitoring of mine closure and remediation. Making closure costs visible makes W computable.
Có thể phá vỡ một phần. The mine exists — remediation is needed regardless. Closure reduces ongoing sự phụ thuộc hệ thống.
a: Report môi trường violations during mine closure to MiAmbiente (Ministry of Environment)
Document water quality downstream of Cobre Panamá
Report through First Quantum compliance channels
First Quantum: Cooperate with orderly mine closure and môi trường remediation
Ensure worker transition support
Comply with Supreme Court ruling
MiAmbiente: Ensure comprehensive môi trường remediation
Ministry of Commerce: Support economic transition for affected communities
Comptroller General: Audit khai thác mỏ revenue management
Liên hệ đại biểu của bạn Diputado in the Asamblea Nacional (71 members) để yêu cầu comprehensive mine closure and remediation legislation
Support the Cobre Panamá precedent as a model for democratic resource governance
Advocate for investment treaty reform to protect sovereign môi trường decisions
Thúc đẩy ICSID (World Bank arbitration) reform on môi trường sovereignty
i: MiAmbiente — the environment ministry. ANAM (Autoridad Nacional del Ambiente) — cơ quan môi trường. Panama's Supreme Court (Corte Suprema de Justicia) — ruled the khai thác mỏ contract unconstitutional.
First Quantum Minerals — operated Cobre Panamá, one of the world's largest copper mines ($10B investment). The mine is in preservation and safe management mode following the court ruling.
Ministerio de Comercio e Industrias — oversees khai thác mỏ concessions. Contraloría General de la República — the national audit office.

Asamblea Nacional de Panamá — unicameral, 71 members. Panama's Cobre Panamá case is a globally significant precedent for democratic control over extractive industries. First Quantum has filed an ICSID arbitration claim.

PE.s: Resource-rich nền kinh tế ($289.2B GDP) with khai thác mỏ at 12.1% GDP (world's second-largest copper producer, major silver and gold). Nông nghiệp ở mức 7.3%. Dịch vụ ở mức 51.3%. Social conflicts around khai thác mỏ are frequent.

sectors.w: Peru's khai thác mỏ sector generates over 200 active social conflicts (Defensoría del Pueblo tracks monthly). Khi môi trường monitoring data is publicly linked to mine production revenue, W trở nên có thể tính được.
bp: Prior consultation (consulta previa) enforcement per ILO Convention 169. Khi indigenous communities can effectively negotiate môi trường conditions, lợi ích chồng chéo trong extraction without consent suy yếu.
Mandatory theo từng mỏ môi trường monitoring data published in real-time (OEFA already collects this). Public disclosure makes W computable.
Có thể phá vỡ một phần. Mining disturbs landscapes. But Peru's khai thác mỏ môi trường standards have improved significantly — enforcement is the gap.
a: Báo cáo cho OEFA (Organismo de Evaluación y Fiscalización Ambiental)
Document community impacts — report to Defensoría del Pueblo
Report through khai thác mỏ company compliance channels
Antamina, Cerro Verde, Las Bambas operators: Thực hiện community development agreements
Áp dụng international tailings standards (GISTM)
Publish theo từng mỏ môi trường data
OEFA: Increase môi trường monitoring and enforcement
MINEM: Tăng cường môi trường conditions in khai thác mỏ concessions
ANA (Autoridad Nacional del Agua): Thực thi water quality standards downstream of mines
Liên hệ đại biểu của bạn Congresista in the Congreso de la República (130 members) để yêu cầu enforcement of consulta previa and môi trường monitoring
Support ILO Convention 169 enforcement on indigenous consultation
Advocate for Escazú Agreement ratification
Thúc đẩy EITI enhanced reporting with môi trường data
i: OEFA — Peru's môi trường enforcement agency for the khai thác mỏ sector, conducting inspections and imposing trừng phạt. Defensoría del Pueblo — the national ombudsman, publishes monthly social conflict reports. SENACE (Servicio Nacional de Certificación Ambiental) — conducts môi trường impact assessments.
Major mines: Antamina (BHP/Glencore), Cerro Verde (Freeport-McMoRan), Las Bambas (MMG/China Minmetals). SNMPE (Sociedad Nacional de Minería, Petróleo y Energía) — the industry association.
MINEM (Ministerio de Energía y Minas) — the energy and khai thác mỏ ministry. ANA — the national water authority. EITI Peru — member since 2012.
Congreso de la República del Perú — unicameral, 130 members. Contact through congreso.gob.pe. Peru has ratified ILO Convention 169. Peru has not ratified the Escazú Agreement.

PG.s: Resource-rich Pacific island nền kinh tế ($31.8B GDP). Mining at 14.41% GDP, gas at 9.14% (PNG LNG). Nông nghiệp ở mức 16.4%. Extraordinary biodiversity (7% of world's species on 1% of land). Customary land ownership covers 97% of territory.

sectors.w: PNG's khai thác mỏ sector (Ok Tedi, Porgera, Lihir) has a history of catastrophic môi trường damage. Ok Tedi mine discharged tailings directly into the Fly River system for decades. Environmental monitoring makes W computable.
bp: Mandatory môi trường bonds per IFC Performance Standards. Khi remediation is pre-funded, lợi ích chồng chéo in low-cost disposal suy yếu.
Per-mine môi trường monitoring published alongside production revenue. PNG's EITI membership provides the framework. Làm cho W có thể tính được.
Có thể phá vỡ một phần. Mining in tropical environments disturbs highly biodiverse ecosystems. But modern tailings management (not riverine disposal) can reduce sự phụ thuộc hệ thống.
a: Báo cáo cho CEPA (Conservation and Environment Protection Authority)
Document community impacts through local NGOs and customary landowner groups
Report through Barrick Gold/Newcrest compliance channels
Barrick Gold (Porgera), Newmont (Lihir), Ok Tedi Mining: Thực hiện international môi trường standards
Address legacy contamination
Áp dụng EITI enhanced reporting
MRA (Mineral Resources Authority): Tăng cường môi trường conditions in khai thác mỏ leases
CEPA: Thực thi môi trường standards
EITI PNG: Expand to môi trường data
Liên hệ đại biểu của bạn member of the National Parliament (111 members) để yêu cầu môi trường bonds for all khai thác mỏ operations
Support customary landowner rights in khai thác mỏ negotiations
Vận động qua Pacific Islands Forum for regional môi trường standards
Thúc đẩy international accountability for khai thác mỏ legacy contamination (Ok Tedi)
i: CEPA — PNG's cơ quan môi trường. Department of Mineral Policy and Geohazards Management — khai thác mỏ regulator. Note: PNG's governance capacity is limited outside major urban centers.
Ok Tedi Mining Limited — operates Ok Tedi copper-gold mine (now community-owned). Barrick Gold — Porgera gold mine. Newmont (formerly Newcrest) — Lihir gold mine. ExxonMobil — operates PNG LNG.
MRA — the khai thác mỏ regulator. EITI PNG — member since 2014.
National Parliament of Papua New Guinea — unicameral, 111 members. PNG is a quân chủ lập hiến (King Charles III as head of state) with Westminster-style nghị viện dân chủ.

PH.s: Major Southeast Asian nền kinh tế ($461.6B GDP). Dịch vụ ở mức 63.2% GDP. Nông nghiệp ở mức 9.1%. Mining at 1.52% (nickel — world's second-largest producer). Sản xuất ở mức 15.7% (electronics). Extreme climate vulnerability — typhoons.

sectors.w: Philippines' nickel khai thác mỏ (for EV batteries) generates significant môi trường damage on small islands. Khi theo từng mỏ môi trường data is linked to nickel exports, W trở nên có thể tính được.
bp: Environmental compliance as condition for khai thác mỏ permits. President Duterte's 2017 khai thác mỏ audit closed 28 mines. Sustained enforcement breaks lợi ích chồng chéo trong non-compliant extraction.
Per-mine môi trường monitoring and community impact data. DENR already collects data — public disclosure makes W computable.
Có thể phá vỡ một phần. Mining on small islands with fragile ecosystems inherently causes significant damage. But modern methods can reduce impact.
a: Báo cáo cho DENR (Department of Environment and Natural Resources)
Document community impacts through xã hội dân sự organizations
Báo cáo cho Mines and Geosciences Bureau
Nickel Asia, Global Ferronickel: Thực hiện international môi trường standards
Áp dụng responsible khai thác mỏ certification
Support community development agreements
DENR: Tăng cường môi trường monitoring and enforcement
MGB: Require môi trường bonds
EMB (Environmental Management Bureau): Thực thi pollution standards
Liên hệ đại biểu của bạn Representative in the House of Representatives (316 members) or Senator để yêu cầu enforcement of khai thác mỏ môi trường standards
Support Alternative Mining Bill with enhanced môi trường protections
Vận động qua ASEAN for regional khai thác mỏ standards
Thúc đẩy EU Battery Regulation traceability for Philippine nickel
i: DENR — the environment and natural resources department. MGB (Mines and Geosciences Bureau) — manages khai thác mỏ regulation. Philippines has relatively active xã hội dân sự and press freedom.
Nickel Asia Corporation — the country's largest nickel producer. Global Ferronickel Holdings. Philippines is the world's second-largest nickel producer.
EMB (Environmental Management Bureau) — under DENR, responsible for pollution control. Philippine Mining Act of 1995 — governs khai thác mỏ operations.
Congress of the Philippines — bicameral: House of Representatives (316 members) and Senate (24 members). Contact through congress.gov.ph. Philippines is a presidential dân chủ.

PK.s: Large nền kinh tế ($371.6B GDP) with agriculture at 23.7% GDP (cotton, wheat, rice, sugarcane). Sản xuất ở mức 13.2%. Dịch vụ ở mức 50.7%. Severe climate vulnerability (2022 floods caused $30B+ damage). Water stress. Coal at 0.12%, gas at 0.74%.

sectors.w: Pakistan's cotton-wheat-rice monoculture cycle depletes groundwater and degrades soil. Khi per-district water table and soil health data is published alongside agricultural output, W trở nên có thể tính được.
bp: Cải cách agricultural subsidies from input-based to outcome-based. Khi farmers are rewarded for water efficiency rather than maximum extraction, lợi ích chồng chéo trong water-intensive monoculture suy yếu.
Per-district groundwater monitoring and soil health data. WAPDA already monitors water — linking to agricultural output makes W computable.
Có thể phá vỡ một phần. Irrigated agriculture in semi-arid conditions inherently depletes water. But drip irrigation and crop diversification can reduce sự phụ thuộc hệ thống.
a: Báo cáo cho Pakistan EPA (Environment Protection Agency)
Document water contamination — report to WAPDA (Water and Power Phát triểnment Authority)
Report through provincial agricultural extension services
Agricultural input companies: Phát triển water-efficient farming solutions
Textile companies (reliant on Pakistani cotton): Support sustainable cotton initiatives
Đầu tư vào drip irrigation technology
Ministry of National Food Security: Cải cách water pricing for agriculture
IRSA (Indus River System Authority): Thực thi provincial water allocations
Provincial agriculture departments: Support crop diversification
Liên hệ đại biểu của bạn MNA (Member of National Assembly, 342 members) or Senator để yêu cầu agricultural water pricing reform
Leverage Pakistan's Climate Vulnerable Forum membership to advocate for agricultural adaptation finance
Support Indus Waters Treaty modernization for climate adaptation
Thúc đẩy international climate loss and damage finance (Pakistan's 2022 floods were a catalyzing case)
i: Pakistan EPA — federal cơ quan môi trường. WAPDA — manages water resources and irrigation. Provincial EPAs — each province has its own môi trường agency.
Pakistan's agricultural sector is fragmented among smallholders. Major cotton buyers include Pakistani textile mills and international brands sourcing from Pakistan.

Ministry of National Food Security and Research — federal agricultural policy. IRSA — manages Indus water distribution among provinces. Pakistan Council of Research in Water Resources (PCRWR) — monitors groundwater.
Parliament of Pakistan — bicameral: National Assembly (342 members) and Senate (100 members). Contact through na.gov.pk. Pakistan is a federal nghị viện dân chủ.

PL.s: Major EU nền kinh tế ($917.8B GDP) with significant coal sector (0.25% rents but coal provides ~70% of electricity). Sản xuất ở mức 16.1% GDP. Dịch vụ ở mức 59.1%. Coal transition is Poland's central climate challenge — 80,000+ miners.

sectors.w: Poland's coal sector is sustained by state subsidies and employment guarantees. EU ETS carbon pricing makes Polish coal uncompetitive. Khi full carbon costs are internalized, the lợi ích chồng chéo between miners and state employment programs breaks.
bp: EU ETS alignment without free allowances. At €90/ton carbon, Polish coal electricity costs 2-3x renewable alternatives. The lợi ích chồng chéo breaks when coal plants cannot compete.
Per-plant phát thải and health-impact disclosure. Poland's coal plants cause 4,000+ premature deaths/year. Making health costs visible per MWh makes W computable.
Không thể phá vỡ. Coal combustion releases CO₂ and air pollutants.
a: Báo cáo cho GIOŚ (Chief Inspectorate of Environmental Protection)
Document health impacts in khai thác mỏ regions — report to GIS (Chief Sanitary Inspectorate)
Use Polish người tố giác law (2024 transposition of EU Directive)
PGE, Tauron, Enea, PGG: Phát triển coal phase-out plans with worker transition
Đầu tư vào offshore wind (Baltic Sea — major potential)
Áp dụng per-unit phát thải reporting
URE (Energy Regulatory Office): Cải cách tariffs to reflect carbon costs
Ministry of Climate: Thực hiện National Energy Policy 2040
NFEP (National Fund for Environmental Protection): Finance mine closure and remediation
Liên hệ đại biểu của bạn Poseł or Senator in the Sejm/Senat để yêu cầu accelerated coal phase-out with just transition measures
Support EU Just Transition Fund maximization for Silesia and other coal regions
Advocate for EU Green Deal implementation with adequate transition support
Thúc đẩy territorial just transition plans with concrete retraining programs
i: GIOŚ (Główny Inspektorat Ochrony Środowiska) — the chief môi trường inspectorate. GIS (Główny Inspektorat Sanitarny) — the chief sanitary inspectorate monitoring public health. Poland transposed the EU Whistleblower Directive in 2024.

PGE (Polska Grupa Energetyczna) — Poland's largest energy company. Tauron, Enea — other major energy companies. PGG (Polska Grupa Górnicza) — Poland's largest coal khai thác mỏ company (nhà nước, ~40,000 employees).

URE (Urząd Regulacji Energetyki) — the cơ quan quản lý năng lượng. NFEP (Narodowy Fundusz Ochrony Środowiska) — the môi trường fund financing green transition. Poland's coal phase-out agreement with khai thác mỏ unions targets 2049.

Sejm (460 members) and Senat (100 members). Contact through sejm.gov.pl and senat.gov.pl. EU Just Transition Fund — Poland is the largest recipient of JTF funding. Poland's 2020 coal phase-out agreement targets closure of all coal mines by 2049.

PR.s: US unincorporated territory ($126B GDP) with pharmaceutical manufacturing (44.1% of GDP — among world's highest pharma concentration). Dịch vụ ở mức 51.8%. Post-Hurricane Maria (2017) infrastructure challenges. LUMA Energy electricity crisis.

sectors.w: Puerto Rico has one of the highest obesity rates in the US. Imported UPF dominates the food supply (85%+ of food is imported). Khi diet-related healthcare costs (Medicaid/Medicare data) are linked to product categories, W trở nên có thể tính được.
bp: Cải cách food import tax structure to incentivize fresh food over UPF. Khi imported UPF faces higher tariffs than fresh food, lợi ích chồng chéo trong high-margin processed imports suy yếu.
CMS (Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services) data on Puerto Rico diet-related healthcare costs per product category. Làm cho W có thể tính được.
Not fully breakable. Ultra-processing alters food matrix. But Puerto Rico's tropical climate allows significant local food production to reduce import dependence.
a: Báo cáo cho FDA (applies to Puerto Rico as US territory)
Document food safety violations to Puerto Rico Department of Health
Use US federal người tố giác protections
Food importers: Diversify toward fresh and minimally processed products
Support local food production development
Áp dụng voluntary front-of-pack labelling
PR Department of Agriculture: Expand local food production programs
Department of Health: Thực hiện nutrition education and labelling requirements
FDA: Apply US food labelling regulations
Contact Puerto Rico's Resident Commissioner in the US House of Representatives to advocate for food access and local agriculture funding
Support the Farm Bill provisions for Puerto Rico food sovereignty
Advocate for SNAP block grant reform to incentivize fresh food
Thúc đẩy local food production investment through USDA programs
i: FDA — the US Food and Drug Administration has jurisdiction in Puerto Rico. Puerto Rico Department of Health — oversees local food safety. US federal người tố giác protections apply.
Major food retailers in Puerto Rico: Walmart, Econo. Empresas Fonalledas — local retail conglomerate.
PR Department of Agriculture — supports local agricultural development. Puerto Rico imports ~85% of food consumed.

Puerto Rico has a Resident Commissioner in the US House of Representatives (non-voting). Legislatura de Puerto Rico — bicameral: Cámara de Representantes (51 members) and Senado (27 members). As a US territory, many policy decisions are made at the federal level.

PS.s: Occupied territory ($13.7B GDP, severely constrained by occupation). Nông nghiệp ở mức 7.4% GDP. Dịch vụ ở mức 76.2%. Economy dependent on Israeli work permits and international aid. Water access severely restricted. Active conflict zone.

sectors.w: Palestinian agriculture operates under severe water restrictions (Oslo II Accords limit Palestinian water extraction). Khi water allocation data is published alongside agricultural output, the systemic welfare impact of occupation on agriculture becomes computable.
bp: International pressure for equitable water allocation per Oslo II renegotiation. Khi Palestinian farmers access fair water shares, lợi ích chồng chéo trong restricting agricultural development suy yếu.
Publication of per-community water allocation and agricultural productivity data. International monitoring (OCHA, World Bank) already collects data — systematic disclosure makes W computable.
Extreme sự phụ thuộc hệ thống. The occupation structurally constrains agricultural development through water restrictions, land access, and movement controls.
a: Document water access restrictions through Palestinian Water Authority channels
Báo cáo cho international monitoring organizations (OCHA, B'Tselem)
Provide data to academic researchers studying occupation impacts on agriculture
International agricultural companies: Support Palestinian agricultural development programs
Fair trade organizations: Expand Palestinian olive oil and agricultural product sourcing
Đầu tư vào water-efficient agriculture technology appropriate for restricted water access
EQA: Document môi trường impacts of occupation on agriculture
PWA: Advocate for equitable water allocation
PMA (Palestine Monetary Authority): Support agricultural lending
Support international humanitarian law enforcement on resource access in occupied territories
Vận động qua UN for equitable water allocation
Thúc đẩy World Bank monitoring of economic impact of water restrictions on Palestinian agriculture
Support Palestinian sovereignty over natural resources as enshrined in UNGA resolutions
i: PWA (Palestinian Water Authority) — manages water resources under severe constraints. EQA (Environment Quality Authority) — the Palestinian cơ quan môi trường. B'Tselem — Israeli human rights organization documenting occupation impacts.
Palestinian agricultural sector is predominantly smallholder. Olive oil is the most significant agricultural export. International NGOs and development agencies support agricultural development.

PWA — the key institution managing water allocation under occupation constraints. Joint Water Committee (JWC) — the Oslo-established mechanism for water cooperation between Israel and Palestine, widely criticized as inequitable.

Palestinian Legislative Council (PLC, 132 members) — non-functional since 2007. The Palestinian Authority operates through the executive. International channels: UNGA, UNHRC, ICJ Advisory Opinion on the Wall (2004), UN OCHA, UNRWA.

PT.s: EU nền kinh tế ($313.3B GDP). Dịch vụ ở mức 66.3% GDP. Nông nghiệp ở mức 2% (cork, wine, olive oil). Sản xuất ở mức 11.8%. Renewable energy leader (70%+ of electricity from renewables). Successfully phased out coal (2021).

sectors.w: Portugal's SNS (Serviço Nacional de Saúde) tracks healthcare costs. Publishing diet-related costs per product category makes W computable.
bp: Thực hiện EU front-of-pack health labelling.
SNS diet-related healthcare cost data publication. Làm cho W có thể tính được.
Not fully breakable. Cải cáchulation mandates reduce sự phụ thuộc hệ thống.
a: Báo cáo cho ASAE (Authority for Food and Economic Safety)
Use Portuguese người tố giác law (Lei 93/2021)
Portuguese food companies: Cải cáchulate products
Áp dụng front-of-pack labelling
DGS (Directorate-General of Health): Thực hiện labelling
ASAE: Thực thi marketing standards
SNS: Publish health expenditure data
Liên hệ đại biểu của bạn Deputado in the Assembleia da República (230 members) để yêu cầu health labelling
Support EU Farm to Fork Strategy
i: ASAE (Autoridade de Segurança Alimentar e Económica) — food safety and economic inspection. Lei 93/2021 — Portugal's người tố giác protection law.
Jerónimo Martins (Pingo Doce) — major Portuguese retailer. FIPA (Federação das Indústrias Portuguesas Agro-Alimentares) — food industry federation.
DGS (Direção-Geral da Saúde) — public health authority. SNS — the national health service.
Assembleia da República — unicameral, 230 members. Contact through parlamento.pt. Portugal is a nghị viện dân chủ.

PY.s: Landlocked South American nền kinh tế ($44.5B GDP). Nông nghiệp ở mức 10.7% GDP (massive soy production — 4th largest exporter globally). Sản xuất ở mức 19% GDP. Dịch vụ ở mức 48.7%. Itaipú Dam provides 90%+ renewable electricity. Severe phá rừng from soy expansion.

sectors.w: Paraguay's soy monoculture has destroyed 90%+ of Atlantic Forest and drives ongoing Chaco phá rừng. Khi per-farm phá rừng and thoái hóa đất data is linked to soy exports, W trở nên có thể tính được.
bp: EUDR compliance requiring zero-phá rừng soy. Khi EU buyers require verified phá rừng-free origin, lợi ích chồng chéo trong Chaco clearing for soy breaks.
Satellite-based phá rừng monitoring linked to soy export data. Global Forest Watch already tracks Paraguay extensively — linking to farm-level data makes W computable.
Có thể phá vỡ một phần. Soy monoculture inherently reduces biodiversity. But no-till farming and cover cropping can reduce thoái hóa đất.
a: Report illegal phá rừng to SEAM (Secretaría del Ambiente)
Document indigenous land rights violations — report to INDI (Instituto Paraguayo del Indígena)
Report through commodity trader compliance channels (Cargill, Bunge, ADM)
Commodity traders (Cargill, Bunge, ADM, Louis Dreyfus): Thực hiện zero-phá rừng soy sourcing for Paraguay
Áp dụng Soy Moratorium-style commitments for the Chaco
Đầu tư vào yield improvement on existing farmland
MADES: Thực thi the Zero Deforestation Law in the Eastern Region and extend to the Chaco
SENAVE (Servicio Nacional de Calidad y Sanidad Vegetal): Integrate môi trường standards into soy export certification
INFONA: Tăng cường forest monitoring and enforcement
Liên hệ đại biểu của bạn Diputado or Senador in the Congreso Nacional để yêu cầu extension of the Zero Deforestation Law to the Chaco
Support EUDR implementation with transition support for Paraguayan farmers
Advocate for Mercosur môi trường provisions enforcement
Thúc đẩy indigenous land rights recognition in soy expansion zones
i: SEAM (Secretaría del Ambiente) — now MADES (Ministerio del Ambiente y Desarrollo Sostenible). INFONA (Instituto Forestal Nacional) — the forest management authority. INDI — the indigenous affairs institute.
Major soy traders operating in Paraguay: Cargill, Bunge, ADM, Louis Dreyfus. CAPPRO (Cámara Paraguaya de Procesadores de Oleaginosas y Cereales) — the oilseed processors' association.
MADES — environment ministry. Zero Deforestation Law (Ley 2524/2004) — prohibits conversion of forest to agriculture in the Eastern Region (but not the Chaco, where phá rừng continues).
Congreso Nacional del Paraguay — bicameral: Cámara de Diputados (80 members) and Cámara de Senadores (45 members). Paraguay is a presidential republic.

QA.s: Hydrocarbon-dominated nền kinh tế ($219.2B GDP). Công nghiệp ở mức 58.2% GDP. Tô dầu mỏ 15.28% GDP, gas rents 12.01% GDP — world's largest LNG exporter. Dịch vụ ở mức 46.1%. Highest per-capita CO₂ phát thải globally. Absolute monarchy.

sectors.w: Qatar's LNG dominance faces demand erosion as importing nations (Japan, South Korea, EU) diversify toward renewables and hydrogen. Khi importers reduce LNG dependence, the lợi ích chồng chéo suy yếu.
bp: Importer diversification away from Qatari LNG. As Japan, Korea, and Europe invest in renewables and green hydrogen, lợi ích chồng chéo trong fossil gas dependence suy yếu.
Per-field phát thải and flaring data disclosure. Qatar Energy already publishes aggregate sustainability data — extending to field-level reporting makes W computable.
Không thể phá vỡ. LNG combustion releases CO₂. Carbon capture on LNG (pre-combustion at liquefaction) captures only a fraction of lifecycle phát thải.
a: Báo cáo cho QatarEnergy HSE division
Ghi nhận qua international joint venture partner channels (ExxonMobil, Shell, TotalEnergies)
Báo cáo cho Ministry of Environment and Climate Change
QatarEnergy: Accelerate carbon capture at Ras Laffan
Đầu tư vào blue and green hydrogen
Reduce routine flaring to zero
Ministry of Environment and Climate Change: Thực thi air quality standards around Ras Laffan
KAHRAMAA (Qatar General Electricity & Water Corporation): Mandate energy efficiency
Qatar National Vision 2030: Integrate phát thải reduction targets
Vận động qua GCC (Gulf Cooperation Council) for regional phát thải standards
Support Global Methane Pledge commitments
Thúc đẩy LNG buyer nations to condition contracts on phát thải intensity
Engage through OPEC for managed fossil fuel transition
i: QatarEnergy (formerly Qatar Petroleum) — the state hydrocarbon company controlling all oil and gas operations. International partners operate under production-sharing agreements.
QatarEnergy — nhà nước, operates the world's largest LNG facility at Ras Laffan Industrial City. North Field — the world's largest non-associated gas field.
Ministry of Environment and Climate Change — môi trường regulator. KAHRAMAA — electricity and water utility. Qatar National Vision 2030 — the national strategic framework.

Qatar is an absolute monarchy — the Emir governs by decree. Advisory Shura Council (45 members, 30 elected since 2021) has limited legislative power. International channels: GCC, OPEC (Qatar withdrew 2019 but re-engaged), COP process.

RO.s: thành viên EU nền kinh tế ($382.6B GDP). Sản xuất ở mức 13.2% GDP. Tô khí đốt 0.53%, oil 0.38%. Dịch vụ ở mức 62.6%. Significant forestry issues — illegal logging in old-growth Carpathian forests despite thành viên EUship.

sectors.w: Romania's large-scale agricultural land consolidation has created monoculture on former smallholdings. Khi soil health data is linked to EU CAP payments, W trở nên có thể tính được.
bp: EU CAP eco-scheme conditionality. Khi subsidy payments depend on crop rotation and soil health metrics, lợi ích chồng chéo trong exhaustive monoculture suy yếu.
Per-farm soil health monitoring through APIA (Agency for Payments and Intervention in Agriculture). Làm cho W có thể tính được.
Có thể phá vỡ một phần. Grain monoculture degrades Romania's fertile black-earth soils. Cover cropping and crop rotation reduce sự phụ thuộc hệ thống.
a: Report illegal logging to Inspectoratul de Stat pentru Controlul în Silvicultură
Báo cáo cho Garda Forestieră (Forest Guard)
Ghi nhận qua Agent Green or EuroNatur
Large agricultural companies: Thực hiện EU eco-schemes
Holzindustrie Schweighofer (now HS Timber): Áp dụng certified sustainable sourcing
Agricultural associations: Áp dụng soil health targets
APIA: Condition CAP payments on eco-scheme compliance
Ministry of Environment: Tăng cường Forest Code enforcement
ANPM (National Environmental Protection Agency): Expand monitoring
Liên hệ đại biểu của bạn Deputat in the Camera Deputaților (330 members) or Senator in the Senat (136 members) để yêu cầu Forest Code enforcement
Submit EU Pilot complaints on illegal logging through European Commission
Support ECA (European Court of Auditors) reviews of CAP implementation
Vận động qua European Parliament for Carpathian old-growth forest protection
i: Garda Forestieră — Romania's forest guard, responsible for enforcing the Forest Code. Inspectoratul de Stat pentru Controlul în Silvicultură — state forestry inspectorate. Agent Green — Romanian môi trường NGO documenting illegal logging.
Romania has significant foreign-owned agricultural land. HS Timber (formerly Holzindustrie Schweighofer) — major timber processor, previously linked to illegal logging controversies.
APIA (Agenția de Plăți și Intervenție pentru Agricultură) — manages EU CAP payments. ANPM — môi trường protection agency. Ministry of Environment, Waters and Forests.
Parlamentul României — bicameral: Camera Deputaților (330 members) and Senat (136 members). thành viên EU since 2007. Contact through cdep.ro and senat.ro.

RS.s: Western Balkan nền kinh tế ($90.1B GDP). Sản xuất ở mức 12.7%. Tô than đá 0.24% GDP — but coal supplies ~70% of electricity. ứng cử viên EU country. Mining sector growing (Rio Tinto lithium project controversy).

sectors.w: Serbia's lignite dependence (Nikola Tesla power plants — among Europe's worst SO₂ emitters) faces EU accession conditionality. EU ETS alignment will make lignite uncompetitive.
bp: EU accession requiring LCPD/IED compliance. Retrofitting Nikola Tesla A and B to meet EU emission limits costs more than replacement with renewables.
Per-plant phát thải and health cost data. HEAL (Health and Environment Alliance) has documented thousands of premature deaths. Làm cho W có thể tính được.
Không thể phá vỡ. Lignite combustion releases SO₂, PM2.5, and mercury.
a: Báo cáo cho Ministry of Environmental Protection
Ghi nhận qua CEKOR (Center for Ecology and Sustainable Phát triểnment)
Report through EPS (Elektroprivreda Srbije) channels
EPS (Elektroprivreda Srbije): Phát triển lignite phase-out roadmap
Đầu tư vào solar and wind capacity
Plan just transition for Kolubara khai thác mỏ basin communities
AERS (Energy Agency): Cải cách tariffs to reflect môi trường costs
Ministry of Mining and Energy: Áp dụng Energy Community Decarbonization Roadmap
Energy Community Secretariat: Thực thi compliance
Liên hệ đại biểu của bạn Narodni poslanik in the Narodna skupština (250 members) để yêu cầu a coal phase-out timeline
Support EU accession môi trường chapter benchmarks
Vận động qua Energy Community for binding decarbonization targets
Thúc đẩy EU Just Transition Fund pre-accession support
i: Ministry of Environmental Protection — cơ quan môi trường. CEKOR — Serbian môi trường NGO. RES Foundation — năng lượng tái tạo advocacy.
EPS (Elektroprivreda Srbije) — state electricity utility operating Nikola Tesla A (1650 MW) and B (1240 MW) lignite plants. Kolubara khai thác mỏ basin — supplies lignite to these plants.
AERS (Agencija za energetiku Republike Srbije) — cơ quan quản lý năng lượng. Serbia is an Energy Community Treaty member, requiring alignment with EU energy acquis.
Narodna skupština (National Assembly) — unicameral, 250 members. ứng cử viên EU country since 2012. Energy Community Treaty member.

RU.s: Major hydrocarbon nền kinh tế ($2,173.8B GDP). Tô dầu mỏ 9.67%, gas rents 5.86%, coal 0.61%, khai thác mỏ 2.05% GDP. World's largest gas exporter, second-largest oil exporter. Chi tiêu quân sự 7.05% GDP. Authoritarian governance under international trừng phạt since 2022.

sectors.w: Russia's oil and gas revenues have been severely constrained by Western trừng phạt and price caps since 2022. Buyer diversification (EU pivot away from Russian gas) is actively breaking the lợi ích chồng chéo.
bp: Buyer diversification already underway. EU reduced Russian gas imports from ~40% to ~15% of supply. Khi importers eliminate dependence, lợi ích chồng chéo trong Russian fossil fuels breaks.
Sanctions-enforced minh bạch — G7 price cap mechanism requires attestation of pricing. This partially makes W computable, though enforcement gaps remain.
Không thể phá vỡ. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂ regardless of source.
a: Report through international channels (Bellona Foundation, Global Witness)
Provide data to trừng phạt enforcement authorities
Ghi nhận qua investigative journalism networks (iStories, Novaya Gazeta Europe)
International oil companies that exited Russia: Maintain divestment
Shipping companies: Comply with price cap attestation requirements
Insurance companies: Thực thi trừng phạt compliance on Russian oil cargoes
G7 price cap coalition: Tăng cường enforcement against evasion
EU: Close trừng phạt loopholes on refined products
IMO (International Maritime Organization): Address dark fleet safety risks
Support and strengthen international trừng phạt on Russian fossil fuel revenues
Advocate for G7 price cap enforcement strengthening
Thúc đẩy addressing Russia's shadow fleet môi trường risks in Arctic and Baltic
Support EU energy diversification to permanently reduce Russian gas dependence
i: Note: Russia's domestic xã hội dân sự is severely repressed. Bellona Foundation (Norway-based) — documents Russian môi trường issues. iStories, Novaya Gazeta Europe — independent Russian media operating from exile.
Gazprom — state gas monopoly. Rosneft — state oil company. Most Western majors (Shell, BP, ExxonMobil) have exited Russian operations since 2022.
G7 Russian Oil Price Cap Coalition — enforces $60/barrel cap through insurance and shipping services. EU trừng phạt packages (14+ rounds). OFAC (US), OFSI (UK) — trừng phạt enforcement.

Note: Russia's Federal Assembly (Federalnoye Sobraniye — State Duma 450 members, Federation Council 170 members) does not function as an independent legislature. International channels: G7/G20 (Russia suspended from G8), UN General Assembly, international trừng phạt coalitions.

RW.s: Small East African nền kinh tế ($14.3B GDP). Nông nghiệp ở mức 24.6% GDP. Tô lâm nghiệp 3.97%. Dịch vụ ở mức 47.6%. Remarkable post-genocide development but chuyên quyền governance. Strong môi trường policy (plastic bag ban pioneer).

sectors.w: Rwanda's hillside agriculture on steep terrain causes erosion and thoái hóa đất. Khi soil erosion data is linked to agricultural output per district, W trở nên có thể tính được.
bp: Terracing and agroforestry expansion. Rwanda already has extensive terracing programs — extending to all cultivated hillsides with measurable soil retention targets breaks the lợi ích chồng chéo.
Per-district soil erosion monitoring linked to agricultural productivity data. Rwanda's strong data infrastructure supports this. Làm cho W có thể tính được.
Có thể phá vỡ một phần. Hillside cultivation on steep slopes inherently risks erosion. Terracing and contour farming reduce but cannot eliminate sự phụ thuộc hệ thống.
a: Báo cáo cho REMA (Rwanda Environment Management Authority)
Ghi nhận qua RAB (Rwanda Agriculture and Animal Resources Phát triểnment Board)
Report through district agronomist offices
Agricultural cooperatives: Áp dụng terracing and cover cropping standards
Coffee and tea exporters: Require sustainable hillside cultivation practices
NAEB (National Agricultural Export Phát triểnment Board): Integrate soil health into export quality standards
MINAGRI (Ministry of Agriculture): Expand terracing programs to all cultivated slopes
REMA: Thực thi hillside protection zones
RLMUA (Rwanda Land Management and Use Authority): Integrate erosion data into land management
Engage through available nghị viện channels — note that Rwanda's legislature has limited independence from the executive
Support Great Lakes môi trường cooperation through ICGLR (International Conference on the Great Lakes Region)
Advocate for climate adaptation funding for hillside agriculture through Green Climate Fund
Support African Union môi trường governance frameworks
i: REMA — the môi trường management authority. RAB — agricultural research and extension. Rwanda has strong institutional capacity relative to income level.
NAEB — manages agricultural export promotion (coffee, tea, pyrethrum). Rwanda's agricultural sector is organized through cooperatives and imihigo (performance contracts).
MINAGRI — agriculture ministry. RLMUA — land use authority. Rwanda's Vision 2050 includes môi trường sustainability targets.

Inteko Ishinga Amategeko (Parliament) — bicameral: Chamber of Deputies (80 members) and Senate (26 members). Note: Rwanda is effectively a one-party dominant state under RPF (Rwandan Patriotic Front). International channels: EAC (East African Community), AU, ICGLR.

SD.s: Conflict-affected nền kinh tế ($49.7B GDP). Nông nghiệp ở mức 22.2% GDP. Mining 6.63% (gold). Tô dầu mỏ 3.3% (reduced after South Sudan's independence). Civil war since April 2023 between SAF and RSF. Humanitarian catastrophe.

sectors.w: Sudan's artisanal gold khai thác mỏ uses mercury extensively and generates revenue streams funding armed groups. Khi gold revenue flows are traced, W trở nên có thể tính được.
bp: International supply chain due diligence blocking conflict gold. Khi refiners verify provenance, the lợi ích chồng chéo between armed groups and gold revenues suy yếu.
Tracing gold flows from artisanal mines to international markets. LBMA (London Bullion Market Association) responsible sourcing standards provide the framework. Làm cho W có thể tính được.
Có thể phá vỡ một phần. Artisanal khai thác mỏ uses mercury (Minamata Convention violation). Mercury-free processing methods exist but require investment.
a: Report through international monitoring organizations (UN Panel of Experts on Sudan)
Ghi nhận qua INGO networks (Global Witness, IPIS)
Provide data to LBMA on gold provenance
International gold refiners: Thực hiện enhanced due diligence on Sudanese gold
UAE gold traders: Apply LBMA responsible sourcing for Sudan-origin gold
Insurance and logistics companies: Screen for conflict-linked gold shipments
LBMA: Add Sudan to high-risk origin list
UAE authorities: Enhance customs screening for Sudanese gold
International trừng phạt bodies: Target RSF gold revenue streams
Support UN Security Council trừng phạt on conflict gold flows
Advocate for enhanced LBMA responsible sourcing enforcement
Thúc đẩy UAE cooperation on gold trade minh bạch
Support Minamata Convention enforcement on mercury in artisanal khai thác mỏ
i: Note: Sudan is in active civil war. No functioning domestic oversight exists. UN Panel of Experts — monitors trừng phạt and conflict dynamics. IPIS (International Peace Information Service) — tracks artisanal khai thác mỏ and conflict resources.
Sudan's gold primarily flows through UAE (Dubai) trading hubs. LBMA — sets responsible sourcing standards for gold refiners worldwide.
LBMA — London Bullion Market Association, responsible sourcing standard-setter. FATF (Financial Action Task Force) — can designate jurisdictions for gold laundering risks.

Note: Sudan's transitional government collapsed with the April 2023 war. No functioning legislature. International channels: UN Security Council, AU (African Union Peace and Security Council), IGAD (Intergovernmental Authority on Phát triểnment).

SE.s: Advanced Nordic nền kinh tế ($603.7B GDP). Sản xuất ở mức 13% GDP. Mining 1% GDP (iron ore — LKAB is Europe's largest). Dịch vụ ở mức 66.4%. Strong môi trường regulations. thành viên EU. Leading in green steel transition (HYBRIT).

sectors.w: Sweden's iron ore khai thác mỏ (LKAB) in northern Sweden affects Sami reindeer herding land and generates tailings. Khi theo từng mỏ môi trường and indigenous impact data is published alongside production, W trở nên có thể tính được.
bp: Full internalization of indigenous land-use costs and môi trường remediation. Khi LKAB pays for herding disruption and tailings management, lợi ích chồng chéo trong low-cost extraction suy yếu.
Per-mine môi trường disclosure including impacts on Sami land use. LKAB publishes sustainability reports — extending to independently verified indigenous impact assessments makes W computable.

Có thể phá vỡ một phần. HYBRIT (Hydrogen Breakthrough Ironmaking Technology) — SSAB/LKAB/Vattenfall joint venture — is producing fossil-free steel, demonstrating that khai thác mỏ's downstream sự phụ thuộc hệ thống on carbon-intensive processing can be broken.
a: Báo cáo cho Naturvårdsverket (Swedish Environmental Protection Agency)
Báo cáo cho Bergsstaten (Mining Inspectorate of Sweden)
Ghi nhận qua Sametinget (Sami Parliament) channels
LKAB: Accelerate HYBRIT fossil-free iron and steel
SSAB: Scale fossil-free steel production
Boliden: Thực hiện enhanced tailings management and water recycling
Bergsstaten: Tăng cường môi trường conditions in khai thác mỏ permits
Mark- och miljödomstolarna (Land and Environment Courts): Apply rigorous môi trường review
SGU: Integrate indigenous land-use data into khai thác mỏ assessments
