Liên hệ đại biểu của bạn Riksdagsledamot in the Riksdag (349 members) để yêu cầu indigenous consent requirements in khai thác mỏ permits
Vận động qua EU Critical Raw Materials Act for môi trường and indigenous rights safeguards
Support Nordic Council cooperation on Sami rights across borders
Thúc đẩy EU taxonomy alignment of khai thác mỏ môi trường standards
i: Naturvårdsverket — môi trường protection agency. Bergsstaten — the khai thác mỏ inspectorate, part of SGU (Sveriges geologiska undersökning — Geological Survey of Sweden). Sametinget — the Sami Parliament, representing indigenous Sami rights.

LKAB — nhà nước iron ore company, Europe's largest. SSAB — steel producer, partner in HYBRIT. Boliden — base metals khai thác mỏ and smelting company. HYBRIT — world's first fossil-free steel initiative.
Mark- och miljödomstolarna — specialized môi trường courts. Sweden's Minerals Act (Minerallagen) governs khai thác mỏ permits.
Riksdag — unicameral parliament, 349 members. Contact through riksdagen.se. Sweden is a quân chủ lập hiến and thành viên EU.

SG.s: Advanced city-state nền kinh tế ($547.4B GDP). Dịch vụ ở mức 73% GDP. Sản xuất ở mức 16.3% (electronics, petrochemicals). No natural resources. Major petrochemical refining hub and global financial center. World's busiest transshipment port.

sectors.w: Singapore is a major petrochemical refining and trading hub — the 'Houston of Asia.' Khi refinery phát thải and fossil fuel trading flows are disclosed per facility, W trở nên có thể tính được.
bp: Carbon tax escalation (Singapore's thuế carbon rises to S$25/tCO₂ in 2024, S$45 in 2026, S$50-80 by 2030). Khi refining margins incorporate carbon costs, lợi ích chồng chéo trong unpriced phát thải suy yếu.
Per-refinery phát thải and trade-flow disclosure. MAS (Monetary Authority of Singapore) climate disclosure requirements extend to financial flows. Làm cho W có thể tính được.
Có thể phá vỡ một phần. Petrochemical refining inherently emits. However, Singapore's investment in sustainable aviation fuel and green hydrogen can reduce sự phụ thuộc hệ thống over time.
a: Báo cáo cho NEA (National Environment Agency)
Report through MAS người tố giác channels for financial misconduct
Ghi nhận qua SGX (Singapore Exchange) disclosure requirements
Shell, ExxonMobil (Jurong Island): Thực hiện carbon capture at refineries
Banks (DBS, OCBC, UOB): Apply coal financing phase-out policies
Petrochemical companies: Đầu tư vào green hydrogen and sustainable feedstocks
NEA: Accelerate thuế carbon escalation timeline
MAS: Tăng cường climate-related financial disclosure (TCFD alignment)
EMA (Energy Market Authority): Mandate năng lượng tái tạo targets
Engage through available nghị viện channels — Members of Parliament (93 elected, up to 12 non-constituency/nominated)
Support ASEAN môi trường cooperation frameworks
Vận động qua Singapore's Green Finance Action Plan for regional decarbonization
Thúc đẩy IMO shipping phát thải standards (Singapore is world's largest bunkering port)
i: NEA (National Environment Agency) — môi trường regulator. MAS (Monetary Authority of Singapore) — financial regulator with expanding climate disclosure mandate. SGX — Singapore Exchange, requires climate reporting.
Jurong Island — Singapore's petrochemical hub hosting Shell, ExxonMobil, and other major refineries. DBS, OCBC, UOB — Singapore's three major banks with significant fossil fuel financing exposure.
EMA (Energy Market Authority) — cơ quan quản lý năng lượng. Singapore Green Plan 2030 — national sustainability framework. Carbon tax administered by NEA under Carbon Pricing Act.

Parliament of Singapore — unicameral. Singapore is a nghị viện republic with dominant-party governance (PAP — People's Action Party). Note: limited political pluralism in practice. International channels: ASEAN (founding member), IMO, UNFCCC.

SI.s: Small thành viên EU nền kinh tế ($73B GDP). Sản xuất ở mức 19.4% GDP. Dịch vụ ở mức 57.9%. Significant forest cover (60%+ of territory). thành viên EU since 2004. Former Yugoslav republic with strong môi trường awareness.

sectors.w: Slovenia's intensive agriculture in lowland areas (Pomurje, Podravje) relies on monoculture grain and livestock. Khi soil and water quality data is linked to CAP payments, W trở nên có thể tính được.
bp: EU CAP eco-scheme implementation. Khi subsidy payments require biodiversity and soil health measures, lợi ích chồng chéo trong exhaustive monoculture suy yếu.
Per-farm soil and water quality monitoring through ARSKTRP (Agency for Agricultural Markets and Rural Phát triểnment). Làm cho W có thể tính được.

Có thể phá vỡ một phần. Grain monoculture and intensive livestock farming degrade soil and pollute groundwater. Organic farming and crop rotation reduce dependence — Slovenia already has 11%+ organic farming share.
a: Báo cáo cho ARSO (Agencija Republike Slovenije za okolje — Environment Agency)
Báo cáo cho Inšpektorat za kmetijstvo (Agricultural Inspectorate)
Ghi nhận qua Slovenian môi trường organizations (Focus, Umanotera)
Agricultural cooperatives: Áp dụng organic and integrated farming practices
Dairy industry: Thực hiện manure management standards
Food processors: Source from diversified farming operations
Ministry of Agriculture: Tăng cường CAP eco-scheme implementation
ARSO: Thực thi nitrate directive compliance
ARSKTRP: Condition payments on biodiversity measures
Liên hệ đại biểu của bạn Poslanec in the Državni zbor (90 members) để yêu cầu stronger CAP eco-scheme implementation
Support EU Farm to Fork Strategy implementation
Vận động qua Alpine Convention for sustainable mountain agriculture
i: ARSO — the Environment Agency of Slovenia. Umanotera — Slovenian Foundation for Sustainable Phát triểnment. Focus — môi trường NGO.
Slovenia's agricultural sector is dominated by small family farms (average 7 hectares). Kmetijsko gozdarska zbornica (Chamber of Agriculture and Forestry) — industry association.
ARSKTRP (Agencija za kmetijske trge in razvoj podeželja) — manages CAP payments. Ministry of Agriculture, Forestry and Food — policy ministry.
Državni zbor (National Assembly) — 90 members. Državni svet (National Council) — 40 members, advisory role. thành viên EU since 2004. Alpine Convention member. Contact through dz-rs.si.

SK.s: Central European thành viên EU ($140.9B GDP). Sản xuất ở mức 16.3% GDP — heavily auto-dependent (Volkswagen, Kia, Stellantis). Dịch vụ ở mức 60%. thành viên EU since 2004. World's largest per-capita car producer.

sectors.w: Slovakia's food processing industry produces significant ultra-processed food for regional markets. Khi per-product health impact data (obesity, diabetes correlations) is disclosed alongside marketing spend, W trở nên có thể tính được.
bp: EU front-of-pack labeling (Nutri-Score or equivalent). Khi consumers can identify ultra-processing, lợi ích chồng chéo trong opaque ingredient lists suy yếu.
Mandatory per-product health impact disclosure. Slovakia has rising obesity rates (20%+). Linking UPF consumption data to health outcomes makes W computable.
Không thể phá vỡ. Ultra-processing by definition strips nutritional value and adds synthetic additives.
a: Báo cáo cho ŠVPS (Štátna veterinárna a potravinová správa — State Veterinary and Food Administration)
Báo cáo cho ÚVZ SR (Úrad verejného zdravotníctva — Public Health Authority)
Ghi nhận qua consumer protection organizations
Food processors: Cải cáchulate to reduce ultra-processing
Retailers (Lidl, Kaufland, Tesco): Áp dụng front-of-pack labeling
Advertisers: Restrict UPF marketing to children
Ministry of Health: Thực hiện front-of-pack nutrition labeling
ŠVPS: Tăng cường food composition standards
Ministry of Agriculture: Support local food production incentives
Liên hệ đại biểu của bạn Poslanec in the Národná rada (150 members) để yêu cầu mandatory front-of-pack labeling
Support EU Farm to Fork Strategy UPF reduction targets
Vận động qua WHO Europe for ultra-processed food regulation
i: ŠVPS — the food safety authority. ÚVZ SR — public health authority monitoring dietary health outcomes.
Slovakia's food retail is dominated by international chains (Lidl, Kaufland, Tesco, Billa). Slovenská poľnohospodárska a potravinárska komora — food industry chamber.
Ministry of Health — oversees dietary health policy. Ministry of Agriculture and Rural Phát triểnment — food production policy.
Národná rada Slovenskej republiky (National Council) — unicameral, 150 members. thành viên EU since 2004. Contact through nrsr.sk.

SN.s: West African nền kinh tế ($32.8B GDP). Nông nghiệp ở mức 16.6% GDP. Mining 2.9% (phosphates, gold, zircon). Offshore oil and gas discoveries (Sangomar field — first oil expected). Thủy sản crucial for food security. Democracy with peaceful power transitions.

sectors.w: Senegal's fisheries face severe đánh bắt quá mức by foreign industrial fleets (EU, China) competing with artisanal pirogues. Khi per-vessel catch data is published alongside stock assessments, W trở nên có thể tính được.
bp: Cải cách fishing access agreements to limit foreign industrial fleet catch. Khi EU and Chinese DWF (Distant Water Fleet) quotas reflect stock sustainability, lợi ích chồng chéo trong đánh bắt quá mức suy yếu.
VMS (Vessel Monitoring System) data publication and per-vessel catch reporting. Senegal has invested in MCS (Monitoring, Control and Surveillance). Làm cho W có thể tính được.
Có thể phá vỡ một phần. Industrial trawling damages benthic habitats. Artisanal fishing with selective gear reduces sự phụ thuộc hệ thống.
a: Báo cáo cho DPSP (Direction de la Protection et de la Surveillance des Pêches)
Ghi nhận qua ICSF (International Collective in Support of Fishworkers)
Report IUU (Illegal, Unreported, Unregulated) fishing to CNSP (Centre National de Surveillance des Pêches)
Foreign fishing companies: Comply with Senegalese fishing access terms
Fish processing companies: Áp dụng sustainable sourcing certification (MSC)
Artisanal fishing cooperatives: Support co-management of nearshore zones
Ministry of Thủy sản: Cải cách fishing access agreements with EU and China
CRODT (Centre de Recherches Océanographiques de Dakar-Thiaroye): Publish stock assessments
CSRP (Sub-Regional Thủy sản Commission): Coordinate regional management
Liên hệ đại biểu của bạn Député in the Assemblée nationale (165 members) để yêu cầu reform of foreign fishing access agreements
Support CSRP regional fisheries management plans
Vận động qua AU-IBAR for African fisheries sovereignty
Thúc đẩy RFMO (Regional Thủy sản Management Organization) quotas reflecting stock sustainability
i: DPSP — fisheries protection directorate. CNSP — national fisheries surveillance center, operates patrol vessels. Senegal has one of West Africa's most developed fisheries monitoring systems.
Senegal's fisheries employ ~600,000 people. Artisanal pirogues (wooden boats) land ~80% of total catch. GAIPES — fish exporters association.
Ministry of Thủy sản and Maritime Economy. CRODT — oceanographic research center providing stock assessments. CSRP — sub-regional fisheries commission for West Africa.

Assemblée nationale du Sénégal — unicameral, 165 members. Senegal is a presidential republic with a strong democratic tradition (peaceful power transitions in 2000, 2012, 2024). Contact through assemblee-nationale.sn.

SO.s: Fragile state ($12B GDP). Limited economic data available. Tô lâm nghiệp 11.24% GDP (charcoal — major phá rừng driver). Charcoal trade linked to Al-Shabaab financing. Ongoing conflict and state fragility.

sectors.w: Somalia's charcoal production devastates acacia forests and finances armed groups. Khi charcoal trade flows are traced and linked to phá rừng data, W trở nên có thể tính được.
bp: UN Security Council charcoal export ban enforcement (Resolution 2036). Khi the ban is effectively enforced, the lợi ích chồng chéo between Al-Shabaab revenue and charcoal trade suy yếu.
Satellite phá rừng monitoring linked to charcoal trade routes. UN Monitoring Group has documented the flows. Làm cho W có thể tính được.
Không thể phá vỡ. Charcoal production from slow-growing acacia in arid Somali climate causes irreversible desertification.
a: Báo cáo cho UN Monitoring Group on Somalia and Eritrea
Ghi nhận qua Somali môi trường organizations where operational
Report charcoal shipments to naval forces (EU NAVFOR, Combined Maritime Forces)
Shipping companies: Screen for Somali charcoal cargoes
Gulf state importers (UAE, Saudi Arabia, Oman): Thực thi import bans on Somali charcoal
Alternative energy providers: Đầu tư vào LPG distribution as charcoal substitute
Federal Government of Somalia: Thực thi charcoal export ban
Gulf state customs: Screen for Somali charcoal imports
UN SEMG: Tăng cường monitoring of charcoal trade networks
Support UN Security Council charcoal ban enforcement
Advocate for Gulf state cooperation on import screening
Thúc đẩy alternative livelihoods funding through UN Somalia programs
Support Somali Disaster Resilience Institute môi trường programs
i: UN Monitoring Group on Somalia and Eritrea — monitors trừng phạt including the charcoal ban. EU NAVFOR (Operation Atalanta) — maritime security operation. Note: domestic institutional capacity is extremely limited.
Somali charcoal is primarily exported to Gulf states via dhow networks. UAE has been the largest market. Some companies are promoting LPG as an alternative cooking fuel.
Federal Government of Somalia — limited authority outside Mogadishu. Federal Member States have varying governance capacity. UN trừng phạt framework provides the primary regulatory tool.

Federal Parliament of Somalia — bicameral: House of the People (275 members) and Upper House (54 members). Note: clan-based indirect elections, limited institutional capacity. International channels: UN, AU (ATMIS — AU Transition Mission in Somalia), IGAD.

SV.s: Small Central American nền kinh tế ($35.4B GDP). Dịch vụ ở mức 61% GDP. Nông nghiệp ở mức 4.4%. Sản xuất ở mức 12%. Significant remittance dependence (~24% of GDP). Bitcoin adopted as legal tender (2021). State of exception since 2022.

sectors.w: El Salvador's sugarcane monoculture in coastal lowlands is linked to chronic kidney disease of unknown etiology (CKDu) among agricultural workers — one of the highest rates globally. Khi CKDu data is linked to agrochemical exposure per farm, W trở nên có thể tính được.
bp: Agrochemical regulation and worker health monitoring. Khi sugarcane operations internalize CKDu health costs, lợi ích chồng chéo trong unregulated pesticide/herbicide use suy yếu.
Per-farm agrochemical use and worker health outcome data. El Salvador has the world's highest CKDu mortality. Linking these datasets makes W computable.
Có thể phá vỡ một phần. Sugarcane monoculture depletes soils and concentrates agrochemical exposure. Crop diversification and organic practices reduce sự phụ thuộc hệ thống.
a: Báo cáo cho MARN (Ministerio de Medio Ambiente y Recursos Naturales)
Document worker health impacts through ISSS (Instituto Salvadoreño del Seguro Social)
Báo cáo cho MAG (Ministerio de Agricultura y Ganadería)
Sugar mills (ingenios): Thực hiện worker heat stress and agrochemical exposure protocols
Áp dụng mechanized harvesting to reduce worker field exposure
Đầu tư vào worker kidney screening programs
Ministry of Health: Establish CKDu surveillance and prevention program
MARN: Regulate agrochemical use in sugarcane production
MAG: Support crop diversification away from monoculture sugarcane
Engage through available legislative channels — Asamblea Legislativa (84 members); note concentrated executive power under current governance
Support SICA (Central American Integration System) regional CKDu response
Vận động qua PAHO/WHO for CKDu research and prevention funding
Thúc đẩy ILO conventions on agricultural worker health protection
i: MARN — Ministry of Environment and Natural Resources. ISSS — social security institute. MAG — agriculture ministry. La Isla Network — international NGO documenting CKDu in Central America.
El Salvador's sugar industry is concentrated among a few large ingenios (sugar mills). CAMAGRO (Cámara Agropecuaria y Agroindustrial) — agricultural industry chamber.
Ministry of Health — responsible for CKDu response. MARN — môi trường regulation.
Asamblea Legislativa — unicameral, 84 members. Note: since 2021, executive dominance over legislature; limited separation of powers in practice. International channels: SICA, PAHO, ILO.

SY.s: War-devastated nền kinh tế ($23.6B GDP). Nông nghiệp ở mức 43.1% GDP — unusually high due to industrial collapse. Tô dầu mỏ 4.02%, gas 2.33%. Civil war since 2011 has destroyed infrastructure. Ongoing political transition (2024-2025).

sectors.w: Syria's oil infrastructure has been contested between factions (SDF/AANES controls northeastern fields, former regime controlled refineries). Khi oil revenue flows are transparently traced through reconstruction, W trở nên có thể tính được.
bp: Post-conflict transparent governance of oil revenues. Khi reconstruction frameworks require accountable revenue management, lợi ích chồng chéo trong opaque extraction suy yếu.
Oil revenue flow minh bạch as condition of reconstruction assistance and trừng phạt relief. Làm cho W có thể tính được.
Có thể phá vỡ một phần. Oil infrastructure has been extensively damaged — reconstruction offers opportunity to build in môi trường standards.
a: Report through international monitoring organizations
Document môi trường damage from conflict-era oil infrastructure destruction
Report through UN OCHA coordination mechanisms
International reconstruction companies: Áp dụng môi trường standards in oil infrastructure rebuilding
Apply conflict-sensitivity to investment decisions
Require transparent revenue sharing in any production agreements
Transitional governance: Establish transparent hydrocarbon revenue management
International community: Condition reconstruction support on môi trường and governance standards
EITI: Support Syrian membership as part of governance transition
Support international frameworks conditioning reconstruction assistance on transparent resource governance
Vận động qua UN-led political process for resource revenue minh bạch
Thúc đẩy môi trường damage assessment and remediation in reconstruction plans
Support EITI membership for post-transition Syria
i: Note: Syria is in post-conflict transition. Institutional capacity is severely degraded. Multiple governance structures operate in different regions.
Pre-war: Syrian Petroleum Company (state oil company). Current: fragmented control over oil infrastructure.
Regulatory capacity must be rebuilt as part of political transition.

Note: Syria is undergoing political transition following the fall of the Assad regime (late 2024). New governance structures are forming. International channels: UN (Security Council, Special Envoy), Arab League (membership restored 2023), reconstruction donor conferences.

TD.s: Sahelian nền kinh tế ($19.5B GDP). Tô dầu mỏ 16.75% GDP. Nông nghiệp ở mức 37.7%. Tô lâm nghiệp 4.58%. One of the world's poorest countries. Military transitional government. Lake Chad shrinking (~90% since 1960s).

sectors.w: Chad's oil revenues flow through an opaque pipeline (Doba basin to Kribi, Cameroon). The World Bank's original revenue minh bạch mechanism (Collège de Contrôle) was dismantled. Khi oil revenue allocation is made transparent, W trở nên có thể tính được.
bp: Restore oil revenue minh bạch mechanisms. The World Bank's original Chad-Cameroon pipeline project required transparent revenue allocation — this was dismantled. Rebuilding it breaks lợi ích chồng chéo trong opaque revenue flows.
Oil revenue flow disclosure through EITI. Chad was suspended from EITI in 2023 for governance failures. Restoring compliance makes W computable.
Có thể phá vỡ một phần. Oil production in arid Sahel strains water resources. However, the Doba basin fields are maturing and production declining.
a: Report through international oil company channels (CNPC has major presence)
Ghi nhận qua international NGOs (Publish What You Pay, SWISSAID)
Báo cáo cho international financial institutions
CNPC (China National Petroleum Corporation): Thực hiện môi trường and minh bạch standards
Savannah Energy: Áp dụng EITI-aligned reporting
Pipeline operators: Publish transport revenue data
SHT (Société des Hydrocarbures du Tchad): Restore revenue minh bạch
Ministry of Petroleum: Thực thi môi trường regulations
EITI: Support Chad's path to reinstatement
Support international pressure for oil revenue minh bạch
Vận động qua African Union for governance reform and return to constitutional order
Thúc đẩy World Bank re-engagement on revenue management conditionality
Support Lake Chad Basin Commission môi trường programs
i: Note: Chad's xã hội dân sự space is severely restricted. Publish What You Pay — international revenue minh bạch coalition. SWISSAID — has worked on Chad extractives governance.

CNPC — operates major oil fields after acquiring former ExxonMobil assets. Savannah Energy — British company that acquired former Chevron assets. Chad-Cameroon pipeline — 1,070 km pipeline to Atlantic coast.
SHT — state oil company. Ministry of Petroleum, Mines and Energy — oversees hydrocarbons. Chad was suspended from EITI in 2023.

Note: Military transitional government (Conseil Militaire de Transition, succeeded by elected government of Mahamat Déby, 2024). Conseil National de Transition — 93 members, appointed. International channels: AU, Lake Chad Basin Commission, CEMAC.

TG.s: Small West African nền kinh tế ($10.7B GDP). Nông nghiệp ở mức 21.3% GDP. Mining 4.88% (phosphates — world's 5th largest producer). Dịch vụ ở mức 49.2%. Key transit port (Lomé). Governance concerns with limited political competition.

sectors.w: Togo's phosphate khai thác mỏ (SNPT — Société Nouvelle des Phosphates du Togo) generates cadmium-contaminated waste. Khi theo từng mỏ môi trường data is published, W trở nên có thể tính được.
bp: International cadmium standards in phosphate products. Khi export markets require cadmium limits, lợi ích chồng chéo trong unprocessed phosphate extraction suy yếu.
Per-mine môi trường monitoring data including cadmium levels, water contamination, and land rehabilitation. Làm cho W có thể tính được.
Có thể phá vỡ một phần. Phosphate rock contains cadmium. Cadmium removal technology exists and is commercially viable.
a: Báo cáo cho ANGE (Agence Nationale de Gestion de l'Environnement)
Ghi nhận qua community organizations in phosphate khai thác mỏ regions (Hahotoé-Kpogamé)
Report through ITIE-Togo (EITI Togo) channels
SNPT: Đầu tư vào cadmium removal technology
Thực hiện mine rehabilitation for exhausted areas
Áp dụng international môi trường reporting standards
Ministry of Mines: Tăng cường môi trường conditions in khai thác mỏ permits
ANGE: Thực thi môi trường impact assessment requirements
ITIE-Togo: Expand to môi trường data disclosure
Engage through available nghị viện channels — note limited political pluralism under current governance
Support ECOWAS môi trường governance frameworks
Advocate for Codex Alimentarius cadmium limits in phosphate-derived fertilizers
Thúc đẩy EITI full membership with môi trường disclosure
i: ANGE — national môi trường management agency. ITIE-Togo — Togo is an EITI candidate country.
SNPT (Société Nouvelle des Phosphates du Togo) — the state phosphate company, privatized then renationalized. Operates mines in the Hahotoé-Kpogamé region.
Ministry of Mines and Energy — khai thác mỏ oversight. ANGE — môi trường assessment authority.

Assemblée nationale du Togo — 113 members. Note: Togo has been governed by the Gnassingbé family since 1967; limited political competition. Constitutional change in 2024 shifted to nghị viện system. International channels: ECOWAS, AU, EITI.

TH.s: Major Southeast Asian nền kinh tế ($526.5B GDP). Sản xuất ở mức 24.3% GDP (automotive, electronics, food processing). Nông nghiệp ở mức 8.7%. Dịch vụ ở mức 59.2%. World's largest rice exporter. Significant petrochemical sector. Constitutional monarchy.

sectors.w: Thailand is a major UPF producer and exporter (CP Group — Charoen Pokphand — is one of Asia's largest food conglomerates). Khi per-product health impact data is linked to marketing and formulation, W trở nên có thể tính được.
bp: Front-of-pack labeling reform. Thailand's existing traffic-light label (GDA) covers some nutrients — extending to ultra-processing indicators suy yếu lợi ích chồng chéo trong opaque formulation.
Per-product health outcome correlation data. Thailand's rising obesity and diabetes rates can be linked to UPF consumption patterns. Làm cho W có thể tính được.
Không thể phá vỡ. Ultra-processing by definition strips nutritional value.
a: Báo cáo cho Thai FDA (Food and Drug Administration)
Ghi nhận qua Thai Health Promotion Foundation (ThaiHealth)
Report misleading health claims to OCPB (Office of the Consumer Protection Board)
CP Group (Charoen Pokphand): Cải cáchulate products to reduce ultra-processing
Thai Union: Áp dụng transparent nutritional labeling
Retailers: Promote shelf placement for whole foods
Thai FDA: Extend labeling to cover ultra-processing indicators
Ministry of Public Health: Tăng cường sugar tax and UPF marketing restrictions
ThaiHealth: Fund UPF health impact research
Liên hệ đại biểu của bạn สมาชิกสภาผู้แทนราษฎร (Member of the House of Representatives, 500 members) để yêu cầu UPF labeling reform
Support ASEAN food labeling harmonization
Vận động qua WHO SEARO for ultra-processed food regulation
Thúc đẩy Codex Alimentarius UPF classification standards
i: Thai FDA — regulates food safety and labeling. ThaiHealth (สำนักงานกองทุนสนับสนุนการสร้างเสริมสุขภาพ) — independent health promotion agency funded by a 2% surcharge on tobacco and alcohol taxes.
CP Group — one of the world's largest agri-food conglomerates. Thai Union — global seafood company (owner of Chicken of the Sea). Thai Beverage (ThaiBev) — major food and beverage company.
Ministry of Public Health — health policy. Thai FDA — food regulation. Thailand's sugar tax (2017) is one of the region's most progressive.

รัฐสภา (National Assembly) — bicameral: สภาผู้แทนราษฎร (House of Representatives, 500 members) and วุฒิสภา (Senate, 200 members). Thailand is a quân chủ lập hiến. Recent democratic restoration (2023 elections).

TJ.s: Poorest Central Asian nền kinh tế ($14.2B GDP). Mining 7.09% GDP (gold, silver, antimony). Nông nghiệp ở mức 19.7%. Aluminum smelting (TALCO). Remittance-dependent (~30% of GDP from Russia). Authoritarian governance.

sectors.w: Tajikistan's khai thác mỏ sector includes artisanal gold khai thác mỏ with mercury use and the TALCO aluminum smelter (one of Central Asia's largest polluters). Khi per-facility phát thải and môi trường data are published, W trở nên có thể tính được.
bp: International buyer due diligence on Tajik mineral exports. Khi aluminum and gold buyers require môi trường compliance verification, lợi ích chồng chéo trong unregulated production suy yếu.
Per-facility môi trường monitoring data. TALCO's fluoride phát thải and gold khai thác mỏ mercury contamination can be measured and disclosed. Làm cho W có thể tính được.
Có thể phá vỡ một phần. TALCO smelter phát thải can be reduced with modern pot-lining and scrubbing technology. Mercury-free gold processing exists.
a: Report through international partner channels (IFC, EBRD)
Ghi nhận qua Central Asian môi trường networks
Report through EITI channels (Tajikistan is a candidate country)
TALCO (Tajik Aluminum Company): Đầu tư vào phát thải reduction technology
Gold khai thác mỏ companies: Áp dụng mercury-free processing
International buyers: Require môi trường compliance in supply contracts
Committee for Environmental Protection: Tăng cường môi trường enforcement
Ministry of Industry: Require TALCO phát thải modernization
EITI Tajikistan: Expand to môi trường data
Support international pressure for môi trường standards in Tajik khai thác mỏ through EBRD and IFC project conditionality
Vận động qua OSCE môi trường dimension for monitoring support
Thúc đẩy Minamata Convention enforcement on mercury in artisanal khai thác mỏ
Support EITI candidacy advancement with môi trường disclosure
i: Note: Civil society space in Tajikistan is severely restricted. International channels provide the primary avenue for môi trường reporting. EBRD and IFC have invested in Tajik khai thác mỏ.
TALCO — state aluminum company, one of the world's largest smelters. Operates in Tursunzoda (formerly Regar). Gold khai thác mỏ includes both industrial and artisanal operations.
Committee for Environmental Protection under the Government — môi trường regulator. Ministry of Industry and New Technologies — industrial oversight.

Majlisi Oli (Parliament) — bicameral: Majlisi Namoyandagon (lower, 63 members) and Majlisi Milli (upper, 33 members). Note: effectively nhà nước một đảng (PDPT). International channels: OSCE, SCO, EITI.

TM.s: Gas-dependent closed nền kinh tế ($51.4B GDP). Sản xuất ở mức 18% GDP. One of the world's most chuyên quyền states. Massive gas reserves (Galkynysh — world's 2nd largest gas field). Data extremely limited — World Bank reports zeros for many indicators due to government opacity.

sectors.w: Turkmenistan is one of the world's largest methane emitters — satellite monitoring (Sentinel-5P, MethaneSAT) has revealed massive methane leaks from gas infrastructure. Khi methane data is published, W trở nên có thể tính được despite government opacity.
bp: Satellite-based methane monitoring bypasses government opacity. Khi buyers (China — CNPC pipeline) face pressure to account for upstream methane, lợi ích chồng chéo trong unmonitored gas production suy yếu.
Satellite methane emission monitoring (UNEP's IMEO — International Methane Emissions Observatory — has flagged Turkmenistan). Làm cho W có thể tính được without government cooperation.
Không thể phá vỡ. Gas production and transport inherently leak methane, a greenhouse gas 80× more potent than CO₂ over 20 years.
a: Report through international channels only — no domestic xã hội dân sự exists
Provide data to UNEP IMEO or satellite monitoring organizations
Ghi nhận qua Crude Accountability or Turkmen.news (exile media)
CNPC (Central Asia-China gas pipeline): Account for upstream methane in lifecycle phát thải
International engineering firms: Include methane mitigation in infrastructure contracts
Buyers: Apply methane intensity standards to Turkmen gas
UNEP IMEO: Continue satellite monitoring and public reporting
Global Methane Pledge signatories: Press for engagement with Turkmenistan
IEA: Include Turkmenistan in methane tracker reports
Support satellite-based methane monitoring that bypasses government opacity
Vận động qua UNEP for Turkmenistan's engagement with the Global Methane Pledge
Thúc đẩy methane intensity standards in international gas trade
Support OSCE and UN human rights mechanisms for governance reform
i: Note: Turkmenistan is one of the world's most closed societies. No independent xã hội dân sự, media, or judiciary exists. Crude Accountability — international NGO documenting môi trường issues in the Caspian region. Turkmen.news — exile media.
Türkmengaz — state gas company. Türkmennebit — state oil company. CNPC — operates the Central Asia-China gas pipeline (Turkmenistan is the primary source). No independent corporate governance exists.
No independent domestic regulation exists. International monitoring provides the only oversight: UNEP IMEO, IEA Methane Tracker, satellite platforms (MethaneSAT, Sentinel-5P).

Mejlis (Parliament) — 125 members. Turkmenistan is an chuyên quyền state — the legislature has no independent function. International channels: UN (UNEP, OHCHR), OSCE, CIS. Turkmenistan maintains permanent neutrality status (UN-recognized since 1995).

TN.s: North African nền kinh tế ($51.3B GDP). Nông nghiệp ở mức 9.7% GDP. Tô dầu mỏ 1.55%. Sản xuất ở mức 14.8%. Dịch vụ ở mức 62.6%. Birthplace of the Arab Spring (2011). Governance backsliding since 2021 presidential power consolidation.

sectors.w: Tunisia's oil and gas production is modest but state oil company ETAP's revenue flows lack minh bạch. Khi theo từng mỏ môi trường and revenue data is published, W trở nên có thể tính được.
bp: EITI-aligned revenue minh bạch. Tunisia's oil revenues are small relative to GDP but significant for the state budget. Transparent allocation breaks lợi ích chồng chéo trong opaque revenue management.
Per-field môi trường monitoring and revenue flow disclosure. Làm cho W có thể tính được.
Có thể phá vỡ một phần. Tunisia's mature fields are declining. Solar energy potential is enormous (Saharan irradiance) and can reduce hydrocarbon dependence.
a: Báo cáo cho ANPE (Agence Nationale de Protection de l'Environnement)
Ghi nhận qua Tunisian môi trường organizations (FTDES — Forum Tunisien pour les Droits Économiques et Sociaux)
Report through ETAP compliance channels
ETAP (Entreprise Tunisienne d'Activités Pétrolières): Áp dụng revenue minh bạch standards
Đầu tư vào solar energy transition
International partners (ENI, OMV): Apply home-country ESG standards to Tunisian operations
Ministry of Industry, Mines and Energy: Thực hiện hydrocarbon revenue minh bạch
ANPE: Tăng cường môi trường monitoring at production sites
ANME (Agence Nationale pour la Maîtrise de l'Énergie): Accelerate năng lượng tái tạo targets
Engage through available nghị viện channels — Assemblée des Représentants du Peuple (161 members); note limited legislative independence under current governance
Support EU-Tunisia cooperation on energy transition
Vận động qua Union for the Mediterranean for năng lượng tái tạo investment
Thúc đẩy EITI membership as governance minh bạch measure
i: ANPE — môi trường protection agency. FTDES — Tunisian economic and social rights forum, active on môi trường justice. Tunisia has relatively active xã hội dân sự despite recent governance concerns.
ETAP — state oil company. ENI (Italy), OMV (Austria) — major international operators in Tunisia. Tunisia's South Energy Transition Program targets renewable expansion.
Ministry of Industry, Mines and Energy — hydrocarbons oversight. ANME — energy efficiency and năng lượng tái tạo agency.

Assemblée des Représentants du Peuple — unicameral, 161 members. Note: since 2021, presidential power consolidation has weakened legislative independence. International channels: Arab League, AU, Union for the Mediterranean.

TR.s: Major middle-income nền kinh tế ($1,359.1B GDP). Sản xuất ở mức 16.8% GDP. Dịch vụ ở mức 57.5%. NATO member. Mining 0.63%. Nông nghiệp ở mức 5.8%. Significant coal dependence for electricity. G20 member.

sectors.w: Türkiye is expanding coal capacity (including imported coal plants) despite having excellent renewable potential. Khi coal plant health costs are internalized, lợi ích chồng chéo trong cheap coal power breaks.
bp: Carbon pricing or coal plant emission standards aligned with EU CBAM (Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism). Türkiye's EU customs union makes CBAM relevant to industrial exports. Khi coal costs include carbon, renewables are cheaper.
Per-plant phát thải and health cost data. Türkiye's coal plants are concentrated near population centers. HEAL and local NGOs have documented health costs. Làm cho W có thể tính được.
Không thể phá vỡ. Coal combustion releases SO₂, PM2.5, mercury, and CO₂.
a: Báo cáo cho ÇŞB (Çevre, Şehircilik ve İklim Değişikliği Bakanlığı — Ministry of Environment, Urbanization and Climate Change)
Ghi nhận qua TEMA Vakfı (Turkish Foundation for Combating Soil Erosion)
Report through Greenpeace Mediterranean Turkey office
EÜAŞ (Elektrik Üretim A.Ş.): Phát triển coal phase-out timeline
Private coal operators: Đầu tư vào renewable alternatives
Industrial companies: Switch to renewable electricity procurement
EPDK (Enerji Piyasası Düzenleme Kurumu — Energy Market Regulatory Authority): Cải cách tariffs to reflect môi trường costs
ÇŞB: Thực hiện emission standards aligned with EU IED
EMRA: Support năng lượng tái tạo investment framework
Liên hệ đại biểu của bạn Milletvekili in the Türkiye Büyük Millet Meclisi (600 members) để yêu cầu coal phase-out timeline and health cost accounting
Vận động qua G20 for coal phase-out commitments
Thúc đẩy EU CBAM preparation to accelerate industrial decarbonization
Support NATO Green Defence Framework môi trường standards
i: ÇŞB — environment ministry. TEMA Vakfı — major Turkish môi trường NGO focused on soil and forest protection. Greenpeace Mediterranean — active in Türkiye on coal campaigns.
EÜAŞ — state electricity generation company. Significant private coal generation. Türkiye's 2053 net-zero target implies eventual coal phase-out but no timeline exists.
EPDK — energy market regulator. Türkiye ratified the Paris Agreement in 2021. EU Customs Union makes CBAM compliance relevant for Turkish industrial exports.

TBMM (Türkiye Büyük Millet Meclisi — Grand National Assembly) — unicameral, 600 members. Contact through tbmm.gov.tr. Türkiye is a presidential republic, NATO member, G20 member, EU customs union partner.

TT.s: Caribbean energy nền kinh tế ($25.6B GDP). Tô khí đốt 5.09%, oil rents 2.71% GDP. Major petrochemical and LNG producer (Atlantic LNG). Sản xuất ở mức 14.4%. Dịch vụ ở mức 59.2%. Parliamentary dân chủ.

sectors.w: Trinidad's petrochemical industry faces maturing gas fields and declining production. As reserves deplete and global LNG competition increases, lợi ích chồng chéo trong fossil fuel dependence suy yếu naturally.
bp: Declining natural gas reserves force economic diversification. Khi production costs rise on mature fields, lợi ích chồng chéo trong fossil fuel dependence suy yếu as alternative revenue sources become necessary.
Per-facility phát thải and môi trường monitoring at Point Lisas industrial estate and Atlantic LNG. Làm cho W có thể tính được.
Không thể phá vỡ. LNG and petrochemical processing emit CO₂ and other pollutants.
a: Báo cáo cho EMA (Environmental Management Authority)
Báo cáo cho MEEI (Ministry of Energy and Energy Industries)
Ghi nhận qua Fishermen and Friends of the Sea (môi trường NGO)
NGC (National Gas Company): Phát triển gas-to-renewables transition plan
Atlantic LNG: Thực hiện carbon capture at liquefaction facility
Petrochemical companies (Methanex, Nutrien): Reduce process phát thải
EMA: Tăng cường air quality monitoring around Point Lisas
MEEI: Phát triển năng lượng tái tạo framework
RIC (Regulated Industries Commission): Cải cách energy pricing
Liên hệ đại biểu của bạn Member of Parliament in the House of Representatives (41 members) để yêu cầu economic diversification and năng lượng tái tạo policy
Support CARICOM energy transition framework
Vận động qua Alliance of Small Island States (AOSIS) for climate finance
Thúc đẩy IMO shipping emission standards (Trinidad is a major bunkering port)
i: EMA — the Environmental Management Authority, established under the Environmental Management Act 2000. Fishermen and Friends of the Sea — Trinidad's most active môi trường NGO.
NGC (National Gas Company of Trinidad and Tobago) — state gas company. Atlantic LNG — joint venture (Shell, BP, NGC). Point Lisas Industrial Estate — petrochemical complex.
MEEI — energy ministry. RIC — utilities regulator. Trinidad has extremely low domestic energy prices (subsidized), discouraging efficiency.
Parliament of Trinidad and Tobago — bicameral: House of Representatives (41 members) and Senate (31 members). Parliamentary dân chủ with competitive elections. Contact through ttparliament.org.

TZ.s: East African nền kinh tế ($78.8B GDP). Nông nghiệp ở mức 23.3% GDP. Mining 4.03% (gold, tanzanite — found only in Tanzania). Tô lâm nghiệp 2.39%. Gas reserves (offshore). Dịch vụ ở mức 29.6%. Growing nền kinh tế with improving governance.

sectors.w: Tanzania's gold khai thác mỏ (Barrick/Twiga Minerals, AngloGold Ashanti) generates tailings and mercury contamination (artisanal sector). Khi theo từng mỏ môi trường data is published alongside revenue, W trở nên có thể tính được.
bp: Mining Act 2017 local content and minh bạch requirements. Khi enforced alongside môi trường monitoring, lợi ích chồng chéo trong opaque extraction suy yếu.
Per-mine môi trường monitoring data through TEITI (Tanzania Extractive Industries Transparency Initiative). Làm cho W có thể tính được.
Có thể phá vỡ một phần. Mercury-free artisanal khai thác mỏ and improved tailings management reduce sự phụ thuộc hệ thống.
a: Báo cáo cho NEMC (National Environment Management Council)
Báo cáo cho Mining Commission
Ghi nhận qua LEAT (Lawyers' Environmental Action Team)
Twiga Minerals (Barrick/Government JV): Thực hiện international môi trường standards
AngloGold Ashanti (Geita Gold Mine): Áp dụng enhanced tailings management
Tanzanite One: Publish môi trường and community impact data
Mining Commission: Thực thi môi trường conditions in khai thác mỏ licenses
NEMC: Tăng cường môi trường impact assessment requirements
TEITI: Expand to include môi trường data
Liên hệ đại biểu của bạn Mbunge in the Bunge la Tanzania (393 members) để yêu cầu môi trường enforcement in khai thác mỏ
Support EITI enhanced reporting with môi trường data
Vận động qua EAC for regional khai thác mỏ môi trường standards
Thúc đẩy Minamata Convention enforcement on mercury in artisanal khai thác mỏ
i: NEMC — cơ quan môi trường. Mining Commission — khai thác mỏ sector regulator. LEAT — Tanzanian môi trường law NGO. HakiRasilimali (Publish What You Pay Tanzania) — revenue minh bạch advocacy.

Twiga Minerals — 50/50 joint venture between Barrick Gold and Government of Tanzania (created after 2017 tax dispute). Geita Gold Mine — AngloGold Ashanti operation. STAMICO (State Mining Corporation) — government khai thác mỏ entity.
Mining Commission — established under Mining Act 2017. TEITI (Tanzania Extractive Industries Transparency Initiative) — EITI member since 2009.

Bunge la Tanzania (National Assembly) — unicameral, 393 members. Tanzania is a presidential republic with increasing political openness under current administration. Contact through bunge.go.tz. EAC (East African Community) member.

UA.s: War-affected nền kinh tế ($190.7B GDP). Mining 5.32% GDP. Chi tiêu quân sự 34.48% GDP (wartime). Nông nghiệp ở mức 7.1%. Coal 0.34%. ứng cử viên EU country (2022). Under Russian invasion since February 2022. Massive môi trường damage from war.

sectors.w: Ukraine's khai thác mỏ sector (iron ore, manganese, titanium) has suffered massive môi trường damage from the Russian invasion — flooded mines, destroyed infrastructure, contaminated land. Post-war reconstruction offers opportunity for transparent môi trường standards. Khi reconstruction môi trường data is published, W trở nên có thể tính được.
bp: EU accession conditionality requiring môi trường standards in post-war reconstruction. Khi reconstruction adheres to EU môi trường acquis, lợi ích chồng chéo trong rapid but dirty rebuilding suy yếu.
Environmental damage assessment and remediation tracking. Ukraine's Ministry of Environmental Protection is already documenting war damage with international support. Làm cho W có thể tính được.
Có thể phá vỡ một phần. Mining inherently disturbs landscapes, but post-war reconstruction can implement best-practice tailings management and water treatment from the start.
a: Báo cáo cho Derzhekoinspektsiia (State Environmental Inspectorate)
Ghi nhận qua OSCE môi trường monitoring
Report war-related môi trường damage through Ukraine's Ecodozor platform
Metinvest (Akhmetov): Thực hiện EU-aligned môi trường standards in reconstruction
ArcelorMittal Kryvyi Rih: Apply global môi trường standards
Reconstruction companies: Áp dụng green building and môi trường remediation standards
Ministry of Environmental Protection: Thực thi môi trường standards in reconstruction
State Subsoil Service: Cải cách khai thác mỏ licensing with môi trường conditions
EU pre-accession assistance: Support môi trường governance capacity building
Liên hệ đại biểu của bạn Narodnyi deputat in the Verkhovna Rada (450 members) để yêu cầu môi trường standards in reconstruction legislation
Support Ukraine Recovery Conference môi trường commitments
Vận động qua EU accession process for môi trường chapter prioritization
Thúc đẩy international môi trường damage assessment and Russian liability for war-related môi trường destruction
i: Derzhekoinspektsiia — State Environmental Inspectorate. Ministry of Environmental Protection and Natural Resources — documents war-related môi trường damage. Ecodozor — citizen reporting platform.
Metinvest — Ukraine's largest steel and khai thác mỏ group (Rinat Akhmetov). ArcelorMittal Kryvyi Rih — major steel producer. Ferrexpo — iron ore pellet producer.
Ministry of Environmental Protection and Natural Resources. State Subsoil Service (Derzhgeonadra) — khai thác mỏ licensing. Ukraine's EU candidacy requires môi trường acquis alignment.

Verkhovna Rada — unicameral, 450 members. Contact through rada.gov.ua. ứng cử viên EU country since 2022. International channels: EU accession process, Ukraine Recovery Conference, International Criminal Court (môi trường damage documentation).

UG.s: East African nền kinh tế ($53.9B GDP). Nông nghiệp ở mức 24.6% GDP. Tô lâm nghiệp 7.48% (one of the highest in the dataset). Oil production beginning (Tilenga and Kingfisher projects, EACOP pipeline). Authoritarian governance.

sectors.w: Uganda's new oil projects (TotalEnergies' Tilenga and CNOOC's Kingfisher, plus EACOP — East African Crude Oil Pipeline) face massive international scrutiny. Khi project-level môi trường data is published, W trở nên có thể tính được.
bp: International ESG pressure on project financiers. Khi banks and insurers withdraw from EACOP financing, lợi ích chồng chéo trong unscrutinized pipeline construction suy yếu. Several major banks have already declined.
Per-project môi trường impact data for Tilenga (in Murchison Falls National Park), Kingfisher, and EACOP. Làm cho W có thể tính được.
Không thể phá vỡ. Crude oil production and 1,443-km heated pipeline through sensitive ecosystems inherently create môi trường risk.
a: Báo cáo cho NEMA (National Environment Management Authority)
Ghi nhận qua international môi trường organizations (350.org, BankTrack)
Report through TotalEnergies compliance channels
TotalEnergies: Thực hiện comprehensive biodiversity offsets for Tilenga (inside Murchison Falls NP)
CNOOC Uganda: Áp dụng international môi trường standards for Kingfisher
Banks: Apply Equator Principles to EACOP financing decisions
PAU (Petroleum Authority of Uganda): Thực thi môi trường conditions in production licenses
NEMA: Tăng cường môi trường monitoring of oil projects
MEMD (Ministry of Energy and Mineral Phát triểnment): Ensure transparent revenue management
Support international ESG pressure on EACOP project financing
Vận động qua European Parliament for TotalEnergies duty of vigilance enforcement (French Loi de Vigilance)
Thúc đẩy EITI membership with môi trường disclosure
Support East African Court of Justice jurisdiction on transboundary môi trường issues
i: NEMA — cơ quan môi trường. Note: Ugandan môi trường activists have faced government harassment. International channels are safer: 350.org has led the #StopEACOP campaign. BankTrack monitors EACOP financing.

TotalEnergies — operator of Tilenga project and EACOP. CNOOC Uganda — operates Kingfisher project. EACOP (East African Crude Oil Pipeline) — 1,443 km from Hoima to Tanga (Tanzania). UNOC (Uganda National Oil Company) — state oil company.
PAU — petroleum sector regulator. MEMD — energy and mineral development ministry. Uganda's Petroleum Revenue Management policy is under development.

Parliament of Uganda — unicameral, 529 members. Note: Uganda is effectively under one-party dominant governance (NRM). International channels: EAC (East African Community), African Court on Human and Peoples' Rights, European Parliament (regarding EU-headquartered companies like TotalEnergies).

UY.s: Small South American nền kinh tế ($81B GDP). Nông nghiệp ở mức 6.4% GDP. Dịch vụ ở mức 65.3%. Tô lâm nghiệp 1.91%. Generates nearly 100% of electricity from renewables (wind, hydro, solar, biomass). Strong dân chủ — one of Latin America's most stable.

sectors.w: Uruguay's soy and eucalyptus monoculture expansion is degrading soils and displacing native grasslands (campos). Khi soil health and biodiversity data is linked to agricultural production per department, W trở nên có thể tính được.
bp: National soil conservation plan enforcement. Uruguay's Ley de Uso y Conservación de Suelos (Soil Use and Conservation Law) requires mandatory soil plans — strengthening enforcement breaks lợi ích chồng chéo trong soil-exhaustive monoculture.
Per-farm soil erosion and grassland conversion monitoring. MGAP already requires Plan de Uso y Manejo de Suelos for farms >50 ha. Publishing compliance data makes W computable.

Có thể phá vỡ một phần. Soy monoculture and eucalyptus plantations degrade native grassland ecosystems. Integrated crop-livestock systems and native grassland preservation reduce sự phụ thuộc hệ thống.
a: Báo cáo cho DINAMA (Dirección Nacional de Medio Ambiente)
Báo cáo cho RENARE (Dirección General de Recursos Naturales Renovables)
Ghi nhận qua Vida Silvestre Uruguay
Large agricultural companies: Tăng cường soil conservation plan compliance
UPM, Montes del Plata (forestry): Maintain native grassland corridors between eucalyptus plantations
Meat exporters: Áp dụng pasture-based certification
MGAP (Ministerio de Ganadería, Agricultura y Pesca): Thực thi mandatory soil plans
DINAMA: Tăng cường môi trường assessment for land-use change
INIA (Instituto Nacional de Investigación Agropecuaria): Publish soil health monitoring data
Liên hệ đại biểu của bạn Diputado in the Cámara de Representantes (99 members) or Senador in the Cámara de Senadores (30 members) để yêu cầu enforcement of the Soil Conservation Law
Support Mercosur môi trường cooperation frameworks
Advocate for native grassland (campos) conservation in international biodiversity frameworks
Thúc đẩy soil carbon accounting in climate commitments
i: DINAMA — national environment directorate. RENARE — renewable natural resources directorate under MGAP. Vida Silvestre Uruguay — biodiversity conservation organization.
UPM (Finnish company) — major eucalyptus plantation and pulp mill operator. Montes del Plata (UPM/Arauco) — forestry. Large-scale soy farming often by Brazilian/Argentine operators.
MGAP — agriculture, livestock and fisheries ministry. INIA — national agricultural research institute.
Asamblea General — bicameral: Cámara de Representantes (99 members) and Cámara de Senadores (30 members). Contact through parlamento.gub.uy. Uruguay is one of Latin America's strongest democracies.

UZ.s: Central Asian nền kinh tế ($115B GDP). Tô khí đốt 11.04% GDP. Mining 8.5% (gold — Muruntau is world's largest open-pit gold mine, uranium). Nông nghiệp ở mức 18.3%. Sản xuất ở mức 20.2%. Post-Karimov liberalization (since 2016).

sectors.w: Uzbekistan's gas sector (Uzbekneftegaz) consumes most production domestically at heavily subsidized prices, encouraging waste. Khi theo từng mỏ production and domestic consumption data is published, W trở nên có thể tính được.
bp: Gas price reform eliminating subsidies that encourage wasteful consumption. Khi domestic gas prices reflect market value, lợi ích chồng chéo trong underpriced energy suy yếu.
Per-field production, distribution, and consumption data. Uzbekistan has begun EITI implementation. Làm cho W có thể tính được.
Có thể phá vỡ một phần. Gas combustion emits CO₂. However, Uzbekistan's enormous solar potential (300+ sunny days/year) can displace gas in electricity generation.
a: Báo cáo cho State Committee for Ecology and Environmental Protection
Report through EITI Uzbekistan channels
Ghi nhận qua international partner organizations
Uzbekneftegaz: Publish theo từng mỏ production and môi trường data
Navoi Mining (NMMC): Áp dụng international môi trường standards for gold and uranium khai thác mỏ
Reduce methane leakage from gas infrastructure
Ministry of Energy: Thực hiện gas price reform roadmap
Goskomekologiya: Tăng cường môi trường enforcement at khai thác mỏ and gas facilities
EITI Uzbekistan: Expand to môi trường data disclosure
Engage through Oliy Majlis (parliament) — bicameral: Legislative Chamber (150 members) and Senate (100 members)
Support EITI enhanced reporting with môi trường data
Vận động qua EBRD and ADB for gas price reform conditionality
Thúc đẩy Aral Sea môi trường restoration international cooperation
i: State Committee for Ecology and Environmental Protection (Goskomekologiya) — môi trường regulator. EITI Uzbekistan — Uzbekistan became an EITI member in 2021.

Uzbekneftegaz — state gas company. NMMC (Navoi Mining and Metallurgical Company) — operates Muruntau gold mine (world's largest open-pit) and uranium mines. Almalyk MMC — copper and gold khai thác mỏ.
Ministry of Energy — energy policy. Goskomekologiya — môi trường regulation. Uzbekistan has been implementing significant economic reforms since 2016.

Oliy Majlis — bicameral: Legislative Chamber (Qonunchilik palatasi, 150 members) and Senate, 100 members. Note: limited political pluralism. International channels: EITI, EBRD, ADB, SCO. Aral Sea môi trường disaster requires international cooperation.

VE.s: Oil-dependent nền kinh tế in crisis ($119.8B GDP — severely contracted from peak). World's largest proven oil reserves. Economic data largely unavailable (World Bank reports zeros for most indicators). Hyperinflation, mass emigration. Authoritarian governance.

sectors.w: Venezuela's oil industry has collapsed from ~3.3M bpd (1990s) to ~700K bpd due to mismanagement, underinvestment, and trừng phạt. The lợi ích chồng chéo is already weakened by operational failure.
bp: Production collapse has already weakened the lợi ích chồng chéo — PDVSA lacks the capital and technical capacity to maintain production. Sanctions further constrain revenue.
Oil revenue minh bạch is impossible under current governance opacity. However, international trừng phạt monitoring (OFAC designations) provides partial W computability.
Không thể phá vỡ. Oil extraction and refining emit CO₂. Venezuela's heavy crude (Orinoco Belt) is particularly phát thải-intensive to process.
a: Report through international channels (Transparencia Venezuela, PROVEA)
Ghi nhận qua exile media and research organizations
Provide data to international trừng phạt enforcement authorities
International oil companies with remaining interests (Chevron, Repsol, ENI): Apply môi trường standards to limited operations
Chevron: Publish per-facility môi trường data for Venezuela operations
Service companies: Maintain môi trường standards in contracted work
OFAC: Maintain trừng phạt conditionality linked to governance reform
EU: Coordinate trừng phạt policy
OPEC: Address Venezuela's production reporting minh bạch
Support international trừng phạt conditionality requiring democratic governance and môi trường standards
Vận động qua Lima Group/International Contact Group for governance reform
Thúc đẩy PDVSA operational and môi trường minh bạch as condition of trừng phạt relief
Support post-transition EITI membership planning
i: Note: No independent domestic institutions exist. Transparencia Venezuela — anti-corruption NGO. PROVEA — Venezuelan human rights organization. Operating environment is extremely hostile to xã hội dân sự.
PDVSA (Petróleos de Venezuela, S.A.) — state oil company, severely degraded operationally. Chevron — received limited US OFAC license to operate. Repsol, ENI — maintain limited presence.

No independent domestic regulation exists. OFAC (Office of Foreign Assets Control, US Treasury) — administers Venezuela trừng phạt. EU — maintains trừng phạt. PDVSA is both regulator and operator — no separation exists.

Asamblea Nacional — 277 members. Note: Venezuela's institutions lack independence under current governance. International channels: OAS (Venezuela withdrawn/suspended), International Contact Group, ICC preliminary examination, Lima Group (reduced activity).

VN.s: Fast-growing nền kinh tế ($476.4B GDP). Sản xuất ở mức 24.4% GDP. Nông nghiệp ở mức 11.9%. Tô than đá 0.38%. Oil 0.67%. Tô lâm nghiệp 1.07%. Major electronics and textile manufacturing hub. One-party state (Communist Party).

sectors.w: Viet Nam is rapidly expanding coal power capacity despite excellent renewable potential (solar, wind, offshore wind). JETP (Just Energy Transition Partnership) funding ($15.5B pledged) creates leverage to shift the lợi ích chồng chéo away from coal.
bp: JETP implementation — $15.5B pledged by international partners for coal-to-renewables transition. Khi JETP funding makes renewables cheaper than new coal, lợi ích chồng chéo trong coal expansion breaks.
Per-plant phát thải and health cost data. Viet Nam's coal plants are concentrated in the north (Quảng Ninh) and south (Bình Thuận). Làm cho W có thể tính được.
Không thể phá vỡ. Coal combustion releases SO₂, PM2.5, and CO₂.
a: Báo cáo cho MONRE (Bộ Tài nguyên và Môi trường — Ministry of Natural Resources and Environment)
Ghi nhận qua VUSTA (Viet Nam Union of Science and Technology Associations)
Report through international development partner channels (World Bank, ADB)
EVN (Electricity of Viet Nam): Accelerate Power Phát triểnment Plan VIII renewable targets
PVN (PetroVietnam): Đầu tư vào offshore wind
International manufacturers (Samsung, Intel): Demand renewable electricity procurement options
MOIT (Ministry of Industry and Trade): Thực hiện PDP VIII renewable targets
MONRE: Tăng cường emission standards for coal plants
JETP Secretariat: Accelerate disbursement of transition funding
Support JETP implementation monitoring through international partner coordination
Vận động qua ASEAN for regional energy transition cooperation
Thúc đẩy JETP minh bạch and accountability mechanisms
Support World Bank and ADB năng lượng tái tạo financing for Viet Nam
i: MONRE — environment and natural resources ministry. VUSTA — umbrella organization for Vietnamese xã hội dân sự (within party framework). Note: independent xã hội dân sự is not permitted in Viet Nam's one-party system.

EVN (Tập đoàn Điện lực Việt Nam) — state electricity utility. PVN (PetroVietnam) — state oil and gas company. TKV (Vinacomin — Tập đoàn Công nghiệp Than - Khoáng sản Việt Nam) — state coal khai thác mỏ company.

MOIT — energy and industrial policy. PDP VIII (Power Phát triểnment Plan VIII, approved 2023) — sets năng lượng tái tạo targets. JETP — Just Energy Transition Partnership ($15.5B pledged by IPG partners including US, EU, UK, Japan).

Quốc hội (National Assembly) — unicameral, 500 members. Viet Nam is a nhà nước một đảng (Communist Party). JETP International Partners Group provides the primary leverage mechanism. International channels: ASEAN, World Bank, ADB, JETP IPG.

XK.s: Small Western Balkan nền kinh tế ($11.2B GDP). Sản xuất ở mức 12.6%. Tô than đá 0.38%. Mining 0.55%. Nông nghiệp ở mức 7.3%. Youngest population in Europe. ứng cử viên EU status pending. Two aging lignite plants (Kosovo A and B) supply ~95% of electricity.

sectors.w: Kosovo's near-total dependence on two aging lignite plants (Kosovo A — one of Europe's worst polluters — and Kosovo B) faces EU accession conditionality and enormous health costs.
bp: EU accession pathway requiring IED/LCPD compliance. Kosovo A is scheduled for decommissioning. Khi môi trường compliance costs are applied, new renewables are cheaper than coal retrofit.
Per-plant phát thải and health cost data. Kosovo A and B cause severe air pollution in Pristina — among Europe's worst air quality. Làm cho W có thể tính được.
Không thể phá vỡ. Lignite combustion releases SO₂, PM2.5, mercury, and CO₂.
a: Báo cáo cho AMMK (Agjencia për Mbrojtjen e Mjedisit të Kosovës — Kosovo Environmental Protection Agency)
Ghi nhận qua INDEP or GAP Institute (Kosovo think tanks)
Report through KEK compliance channels
KEK (Korporata Energjetike e Kosovës): Plan Kosovo A decommissioning and Kosovo B modernization or replacement
Đầu tư vào solar and wind capacity
Thực hiện just transition plans for Obiliq/Kastriot khai thác mỏ communities
ERO (Energy Regulatory Office): Cải cách tariffs to incentivize renewable investment
MMPH (Ministry of Environment): Thực thi emission standards
Energy Community Secretariat: Hold Kosovo accountable for compliance
Liên hệ đại biểu của bạn Deputet in the Kuvendi i Kosovës (120 members) để yêu cầu Kosovo A decommissioning timeline and năng lượng tái tạo investment
Support EU integration benchmarks on môi trường standards
Vận động qua Energy Community for just transition support
Thúc đẩy World Bank and EBRD financing of năng lượng tái tạo replacement
i: AMMK — môi trường protection agency. INDEP (Institute for Phát triểnment Policy) — research and advocacy. GAP Institute — Kosovo public policy think tank.
KEK — Kosovo Energy Corporation, nhà nước, operates Kosovo A (5 units, 800 MW, built 1962-1975) and Kosovo B (2 units, 678 MW, built 1983-1984). KOSTT — transmission system operator.
ERO — cơ quan quản lý năng lượng. MMPH (Ministria e Mjedisit, Planifikimit Hapësinor dhe Infrastrukturës) — environment ministry. Kosovo is an Energy Community Treaty member.

Kuvendi i Kosovës (Assembly of Kosovo) — unicameral, 120 members. Contact through kuvendikosoves.org. Kosovo declared independence in 2008 (recognized by ~100 UN members). Energy Community Treaty member.

ZA.s: Largest sub-Saharan nền kinh tế ($401.1B GDP). Tô than đá 2.44% GDP. Mining 3.83% (gold, platinum group metals, chrome, manganese). Sản xuất ở mức 12.8%. Dịch vụ ở mức 63%. Constitutional dân chủ. Severe electricity crisis (load shedding).

sectors.w: South Africa generates ~80% of electricity from coal (Eskom's aging fleet). JETP funding ($8.5B pledged) and Eskom's operational crisis (load shedding) create dual pressure. Khi coal plant health costs are internalized, the lợi ích chồng chéo breaks.
bp: JETP implementation and Eskom restructuring. $8.5B pledged for coal-to-renewables transition. Khi renewable IPPs are cheaper and more reliable than aging coal plants, lợi ích chồng chéo trong coal dependence breaks.

Per-plant phát thải, health costs, and reliability data. Eskom's coal fleet is extensively documented — multiple plants fail to meet South Africa's own emission standards (granted repeated postponements). Làm cho W có thể tính được.
Không thể phá vỡ. Coal combustion releases SO₂, PM2.5, mercury, and CO₂. South Africa's coal is high-ash content, exacerbating particulate phát thải.
a: Báo cáo cho DFFE (Department of Forestry, Thủy sản and the Environment)
Report through groundWork or Centre for Environmental Rights
Ghi nhận qua Public Protector complaints
Eskom: Thực hiện coal plant decommissioning schedule aligned with IRP 2019
Mining companies (Exxaro, Thungela, Seriti): Phát triển coal transition plans
Renewable IPPs: Scale deployment to replace coal capacity
NERSA (National Energy Regulator): Cải cách tariffs to reflect coal externalities
DFFE: Thực thi Minimum Emission Standards without further postponements
DMRE (Department of Mineral Resources and Energy): Accelerate IRP 2019 renewable targets
Liên hệ đại biểu của bạn Member of Parliament in the National Assembly (400 members) or NCOP (National Council of Provinces, 90 members) để yêu cầu Eskom emission standard compliance
Support JETP implementation and accountability mechanisms
Vận động qua BRICS for just energy transition principles
Thúc đẩy climate finance delivery through Green Climate Fund
i: DFFE — the environment department. groundWork — South African môi trường justice organization. Centre for Environmental Rights — public interest môi trường law organization. Life After Coal campaign — coalition challenging Eskom's coal dependence.

Eskom — state electricity utility, operates 15 coal-fired power stations. Exxaro Resources — coal khai thác mỏ. Thungela Resources — thermal coal (spun off from Anglo American). Seriti Resources — coal khai thác mỏ. REIPPPP (Renewable Energy Independent Power Producer Procurement Programme) — auction program.

NERSA — cơ quan quản lý năng lượng. DMRE — mineral resources and energy department. IRP 2019 (Integrated Resource Plan) — South Africa's electricity plan. JETP Investment Plan — guides $8.5B transition funding.

Parliament of South Africa — bicameral: National Assembly (400 members) and National Council of Provinces (90 members). Contact through parliament.gov.za. South Africa is a constitutional dân chủ, G20 member, BRICS member. JETP International Partners Group: France, Germany, UK, US, EU.

ZM.s: Southern African nền kinh tế ($25.3B GDP). Mining 28.25% GDP — one of the highest khai thác mỏ dependencies globally (copper). Tô lâm nghiệp 6.78%. Dịch vụ ở mức 57.2%. Africa's second-largest copper producer. Democratic governance with peaceful power transitions.

sectors.w: Zambia's copper khai thác mỏ generates acid mine drainage and SO₂ from smelting (Mopani, KCM — historically among Africa's worst polluters). Khi theo từng mỏ môi trường data is published, W trở nên có thể tính được.
bp: Mining royalty reform with môi trường earmarking. Khi khai thác mỏ revenue is partly allocated to môi trường remediation, lợi ích chồng chéo trong externalizing pollution costs suy yếu.
Per-mine môi trường monitoring data through ZEITI and ZEMA. Làm cho W có thể tính được.
Có thể phá vỡ một phần. Copper smelting phát thải can be reduced with modern sulfuric acid capture technology. Mopani smelter upgrade demonstrates this.
a: Báo cáo cho ZEMA (Zambia Environmental Management Agency)
Ghi nhận qua community organizations in Copperbelt Province
Report through khai thác mỏ company compliance channels
First Quantum Minerals (Kansanshi): Thực hiện international môi trường standards
Barrick Gold (Lumwana): Áp dụng enhanced tailings management
ZCCM-IH (state khai thác mỏ holding): Require môi trường compliance from partners
ZEMA: Thực thi emission standards for copper smelters
Ministry of Mines: Tăng cường môi trường conditions in khai thác mỏ licenses
ZEITI: Expand to include môi trường data
Liên hệ đại biểu của bạn Member of Parliament in the National Assembly (156 members) để yêu cầu môi trường enforcement on the Copperbelt
Support EITI enhanced reporting with môi trường data
Vận động qua SADC for regional khai thác mỏ môi trường standards
Thúc đẩy responsible mineral supply chain standards (copper is critical for energy transition)
i: ZEMA — môi trường management agency. Copperbelt communities have suffered decades of SO₂ and heavy metal pollution — documented by multiple studies and legal cases (e.g., Vedanta/KCM litigation in UK courts).

First Quantum Minerals — operates Kansanshi (one of Africa's largest copper mines) and Sentinel mines. Barrick Gold — operates Lumwana copper mine. Mopani Copper Mines — majority owned by ZCCM-IH after Glencore divestment. KCM (Konkola Copper Mines) — under provisional liquidation.
Ministry of Mines and Minerals Phát triểnment. ZEITI (Zambia Extractive Industries Transparency Initiative) — EITI member. Mining Cadastre Department — licensing authority.

National Assembly of Zambia — unicameral, 156 elected members + 8 nominated. Contact through parliament.gov.zm. Zambia is a presidential republic with competitive elections (peaceful transitions in 1991, 2011, 2021). SADC (Southern African Phát triểnment Community) member.

ZW.s: Southern African nền kinh tế ($41.5B GDP). Mining 4.24% GDP (platinum group metals, gold, lithium, diamonds). Nông nghiệp ở mức 8.7%. Sản xuất ở mức 15.6%. Tô lâm nghiệp 1.82%. Governance concerns. Major lithium reserves (Bikita, Arcadia).

sectors.w: Zimbabwe's khai thác mỏ sector is expanding rapidly (lithium — critical for EV batteries — and PGMs). Khi theo từng mỏ môi trường data is published alongside revenue, W trở nên có thể tính được.
bp: International supply chain due diligence for critical minerals (lithium for EU Battery Regulation compliance). Khi EU buyers require môi trường verification, lợi ích chồng chéo trong unregulated extraction suy yếu.
Per-mine môi trường monitoring through ZEITI (Zimbabwe applied for EITI candidacy). Làm cho W có thể tính được.
Có thể phá vỡ một phần. Lithium khai thác mỏ (hard-rock) generates waste rock and uses water. Best-practice processing and water recycling reduce sự phụ thuộc hệ thống.
a: Báo cáo cho EMA (Environmental Management Agency)
Ghi nhận qua ZELA (Zimbabwe Environmental Law Association)
Report through international khai thác mỏ company compliance channels
Zimplats (Impala Platinum): Thực hiện international môi trường standards
Prospect Lithium (Bikita Minerals): Áp dụng responsible lithium khai thác mỏ practices
Zim Integrated (Arcadia): Apply EU Battery Regulation-aligned môi trường standards
Ministry of Mines: Thực thi môi trường conditions in khai thác mỏ licenses
EMA: Tăng cường môi trường impact assessment for lithium projects
ZMDC (Zimbabwe Mining Phát triểnment Corporation): Require môi trường compliance from joint venture partners
Engage through available nghị viện channels — Parliament of Zimbabwe: National Assembly (270 members) and Senate (80 members); note limited political pluralism in practice
Support EU Battery Regulation supply chain due diligence requirements for Zimbabwean lithium
Vận động qua SADC Mining Protocol for regional môi trường standards
Thúc đẩy EITI membership to improve khai thác mỏ minh bạch
i: EMA — môi trường management agency. ZELA — môi trường law organization. Note: xã hội dân sự space is constrained in Zimbabwe.

Zimplats — Zimbabwe's largest PGM producer (Impala Platinum subsidiary). Bikita Minerals — lithium khai thác mỏ (Sinomine Resources acquired). Arcadia Lithium — major lithium deposit (Zhejiang Huayou Cobalt acquired). Caledonia Mining — gold.
Ministry of Mines and Mining Phát triểnment. EMA — môi trường regulation. ZMDC — state khai thác mỏ company. Zimbabwe's Mines and Minerals Act governs the sector.

Parliament of Zimbabwe — bicameral: National Assembly (270 members) and Senate (80 members). Note: ZANU-PF dominance limits effective legislative oversight. International channels: SADC, AU, EITI (Zimbabwe has expressed interest in joining).

CN.s: World's second-largest nền kinh tế ($18,743.8B GDP). Sản xuất ở mức 24.9% GDP — global factory floor. Tô than đá 0.61%. Công nghiệp ở mức 36.5%. Dịch vụ ở mức 56.7%. One-party state (CPC). World's largest CO₂ emitter. Rapid renewable deployment alongside continued coal expansion.

sectors.w: China operates ~1,100 GW of coal capacity — more than the rest of the world combined. However, China also deploys more năng lượng tái tạo annually than any other country. Khi renewable deployment makes new coal uneconomic, lợi ích chồng chéo trong coal expansion breaks.
bp: Renewable energy cost competitiveness — China's solar and wind are already cheaper than new coal in most provinces. Khi existing coal plants become more expensive to run than new renewables, the lợi ích chồng chéo breaks. This is already happening in eastern provinces.
Per-plant phát thải data. China's national ETS (launched 2021) covers ~4.5 billion tonnes CO₂. Expanding coverage from electricity to industry sectors makes W computable.
Không thể phá vỡ. Coal combustion releases CO₂, SO₂, PM2.5, and mercury by chemistry.
a: Báo cáo cho MEE (Ministry of Ecology and Environment, 生态环境部)
Report through provincial môi trường protection bureaus
Ghi nhận qua 12369 môi trường complaint hotline
State energy companies (CHN Energy, Huaneng, Datang, Huadian, SPIC): Accelerate coal-to-renewables transition
Reduce new coal plant approvals
Đầu tư vào grid-scale storage to enable renewable integration
NEA (National Energy Administration, 国家能源局): Limit new coal approvals to replace-and-retire
MEE: Accelerate national ETS coverage expansion to cement, steel, aluminum
NDRC: Align electricity market reform with carbon reduction targets
Support US-China climate cooperation mechanisms (Sunnylands process)
Vận động qua COP process for China's coal phase-down commitments
Thúc đẩy national ETS carbon price to rise above marginal abatement cost
Support technology cooperation on CCS and grid-scale storage
i: MEE (Ministry of Ecology and Environment) — central cơ quan môi trường. 12369 hotline — môi trường complaint system receiving millions of reports annually. Provincial Environmental Protection Bureaus — local enforcement. IPE (Institute of Public & Environmental Affairs, 公众环境研究中心) — Ma Jun's NGO providing corporate môi trường data.

China's 'Big Five' power generators: CHN Energy (国家能源集团), China Huaneng (华能), China Datang (大唐), China Huadian (华电), SPIC (国家电投). All nhà nước, collectively operating most coal capacity. Also rapidly scaling renewables.

NEA (National Energy Administration) — energy planning and regulation. NDRC (National Phát triểnment and Cải cách Commission, 国家发展和改革委员会) — economic planning, sets electricity prices. National ETS — world's largest carbon market by coverage (power sector).

National People's Congress (全国人民代表大会) — ~3,000 members. China is a nhà nước một đảng — the NPC does not function as an independent legislature. International channels: US-China climate bilateral, COP/UNFCCC, G20. China's dual carbon targets: peak CO₂ before 2030, carbon neutrality by 2060.

KR.s: Advanced nền kinh tế ($1,875.4B GDP). Sản xuất ở mức 26.6% GDP (semiconductors, automobiles, shipbuilding, petrochemicals). Dịch vụ ở mức 57.5%. Heavy energy import dependence. Fourth-largest coal importer globally. G20 member. Vibrant dân chủ.

sectors.w: South Korea operates ~37 GW of coal capacity and is the world's 4th-largest coal importer. The 10th Basic Plan for Electricity Supply and Demand targets coal phase-down. Khi carbon pricing (K-ETS) makes coal uncompetitive versus LNG and renewables, the lợi ích chồng chéo breaks.
bp: K-ETS (Korea Emissions Trading Scheme) carbon price escalation. Khi carbon costs make coal-fired generation more expensive than LNG and renewables, lợi ích chồng chéo trong coal dependence breaks.
Per-plant phát thải and health cost data. Korea Environment Institute and Korean medical associations have documented coal plant health impacts. Làm cho W có thể tính được.
Không thể phá vỡ. Coal combustion releases SO₂, PM2.5, and CO₂.
a: Báo cáo cho Ministry of Environment (환경부)
Ghi nhận qua KFEM (Korean Federation for Environmental Movements, 환경운동연합)
Report through KEPCO compliance channels
KEPCO (Korea Electric Power Corporation, 한국전력공사): Thực hiện coal retirement schedule aligned with NDC
POSCO: Scale hydrogen-based steelmaking (HyREX)
Samsung, SK, Hyundai: Expand renewable electricity procurement (RE100 commitments)
MOTIE (Ministry of Trade, Industry and Energy, 산업통상자원부): Accelerate coal retirement in Basic Electricity Plan
Ministry of Environment: Tăng cường K-ETS carbon price floor
KPX (Korea Power Exchange): Cải cách merit order to disadvantage coal
Liên hệ đại biểu của bạn 국회의원 (Member of the National Assembly, 300 members) để yêu cầu coal phase-out timeline in energy legislation
Support Powering Past Coal Alliance membership
Vận động qua OECD for coal finance phase-out
Thúc đẩy G20 commitment to end international coal financing (South Korea pledged to end overseas coal finance in 2021)
i: Ministry of Environment (환경부) — cơ quan môi trường. KFEM (환경운동연합) — South Korea's largest môi trường NGO. Solutions for Our Climate (기후솔루션) — climate policy advocacy organization.
KEPCO — state electricity company (subsidiary gencos operate coal plants). POSCO — steelmaker, major coal consumer. Samsung, SK Group, Hyundai — major conglomerates with growing RE100 commitments.
MOTIE — energy and industry ministry. K-ETS — Korea Emissions Trading Scheme (launched 2015, covers ~70% of national phát thải). KPX (한국전력거래소) — electricity market operator.

국회 (National Assembly) — unicameral, 300 members. Contact through assembly.go.kr. South Korea is a presidential republic with competitive elections. G20 member, OECD member, Powering Past Coal Alliance member (joined 2021).
